title_en: Words of remembrance for morning and evening

duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ ﴿اللَّهُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ لاَ تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلاَ نَوْمٌ لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الأَرْضِ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلاَ يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلاَّ بِمَا شَاء وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَلاَ يَؤُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ﴾.
duas.translation_en: Allah - there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of [all] existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
duas.reference: Recite Ayat-Al-Kursiy (Al-Baqarah :255)
duas.translation_fr: Allah - il n'y a de divinité que Lui, le Vivant, Celui qui soutient [toute] l'existence. Ni la somnolence ne l’envahit, ni le sommeil. A Lui appartient tout ce qui est dans les cieux et tout ce qui est sur la terre. Qui peut intercéder auprès de Lui sans sa permission ? Il sait ce qui est [actuellement] avant eux et ce qui sera après eux, et ils n'englobent rien de sa connaissance, sauf ce qu'il veut. Son Kursi s'étend sur les cieux et la terre, et leur préservation ne le fatigue pas. Et Il est le Très-Haut, le Très Grand.
duas.phonetic: aa'uwdhu biallahi mina alshaytaani alrajiymi ﴿allahu laa iilaha iilaa huwa alhayu alqayuwmu laa taakhudhuhu sinahun walaa nawmun lahu maa fiy alsamawaati wamaa fiy alaardi man dhaa aladhiy yashfa'u 'indahu iilaa biiidhnihi ya'lamu maa bayna aaydiyhim wamaa khalfahum walaa yuhiytuwna bishay'in min 'ilmihi iilaa bimaa shaa' wasi'a kursiyuhu alsamawaati waalaarda walaa yauwduhu hifdhuhumaa wahuwa al'aliyu al'adhiymu﴾.

duas.arabic: (بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ﴿قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ* اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ* لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ* وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ﴾.) (بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ﴿قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ* مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ* وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ* وَمِن شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ* وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ﴾.) (بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ﴿قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ* مَلِكِ النَّاسِ* إِلَهِ النَّاسِ* مِن شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ* الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ* مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَ النَّاسِ﴾)
duas.translation_en: ([Soorah al-Ikhlaas (112)]( 1 )   Say, He is Allah, [who is] One,( 2 )   Allah, the Eternal Refuge.( 3 )   He neither begets nor is born,( 4 )   Nor is there to Him any equivalent.)([Soorah al-Falaq (113)] ( 1 )   Say, I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak( 2 )   From the evil of that which He created( 3 )   And from the evil of darkness when it settles( 4 )   And from the evil of the blowers in knots( 5 )   And from the evil of an envier when he envies. )([Soorah an-Naas (114)])( 1 )   Say, I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind,( 2 )   The Sovereign of mankind.( 3 )   The God of mankind,( 4 )   From the evil of the retreating whisperer -( 5 )   Who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind -( 6 )   From among the jinn and mankind.
duas.reference: Then recite [Soorah al-Ikhlaas (112)], [Soorah al-Falaq (113)] and [Soorah an-Naas (114)]
duas.translation_fr: ([Sourate al-Ikhlaas (112)]( 1 ) Dis : Il est Allah, [qui est] Un, ( 2 ) Allah, le Refuge éternel. ( 3 ) Il n'engendre ni n'est né, ( 4 ) Il n'y a pas non plus d'équivalent.)([Sourate al-Falaq (113)] ( 1 ) Dis : Je cherche refuge auprès du Seigneur de l'aube ( 2 ) Contre le mal de ce qui Il a créé (3) Et contre le mal des ténèbres quand elles s'installent (4) Et contre le mal des souffleurs dans les nœuds (5) Et contre le mal de l'envieux quand il envie. )([Sourate an-Naas (114)])( 1) Dis : Je cherche refuge auprès du Seigneur de l'humanité, (2) Le Souverain de l'humanité. (3) Le Dieu de l'humanité, (4) Contre le mal des retraités. murmureur -( 5 ) Qui murmure [le mal] dans la poitrine des hommes - ( 6 ) Parmi les djinns et les hommes.
duas.phonetic: (bsm allh alrhmn alrhym ﴿qul huwa allahu aahadun* allahu alsamadu* lam yalid walam yuwlad* walam yakun lahu kufuwaan aahadun﴾.) (bsm allh alrhmn alrhym ﴿qul aa'uwdhu birabi alfalaqi* min shari maa khalaqa* wamin shari ghaasiqin iidhaa waqaba* wamin shari alnafaathaati fiy al'uqadi* wamin shari haasidin iidhaa hasada﴾.) (bsm allh alrhmn alrhym ﴿qul aa'uwdhu birabi alnaasi* maliki alnaasi* iilahi alnaasi* min shari alwaswaasi alkhanaasi* aladhiy yuwaswisu fiy suduwri alnaasi* mina aljinahi wa alnaasi﴾)

duas.arabic: ((أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لاَ إِلَهَ إلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، رَبِّ أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ مَا فِي هَذَا الْيَوْمِ وَخَيرَ مَا بَعْدَهُ ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا فِي  هَذَا الْيَوْمِ وَشَرِّ مَا بَعْدَهُ، رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكَسَلِ وَسُوءِ الْكِبَرِ، رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ فِي النَّارِ وَعَذَابٍ فِي الْقَبْرِ)). [ وإذا أمسى قال: أمسينا وأمسى الملك للَّه] [وإذا أمسى قال: رب أسألك خير ما في هذه الليلة، وخير ما بعدها، وأعوذ بك من شر ما في هذه الليلة، وشر ما بعدها.]
duas.translation_en: ‘We have reached the morning and at this very time unto Allaah, belongs all sovereignty , and all praise is for Allaah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allaah, alone, without any partner, to Him belong all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent. My Lord, I ask You for the good of this day and the good of what follows it and I take refuge in You from the evil of this day and the evil of what follows it . My Lord, I take refuge in You from laziness and senility. My Lord, I take refuge in You from torment in the Fire and punishment in the grave.’
duas.reference: Asbahna wa-asbahal-mulku lillah walhamdu lillah la ilaha illal-lah, wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeer, rabbi as-aluka khayra ma fee hathihil-laylah, wakhayra ma baAAdaha, wa-aAAoothu bika min sharri hathihil-laylah, washarri ma baAAdaha, rabbi aAAoothu bika minal-kasal, wasoo-il kibar, rabbi aAAoothu bika min AAathabin fin-nar, waAAathabin fil-qabr.‘We have reached the morning and at this very time unto Allah belongs all sovereignty, and all praise is for Allah.  None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent. My Lord, I ask You for the good of this night and the good of what follows it and I take refuge in You from the evil of this night and the evil of what follows it.  My Lord, I take refuge in You from laziness and senility.  My Lord, I take refuge in You from torment in the Fire and punishment in the grave.’…likewise, one says in the morning:Amsayna wa-amsal-mulku lillah….‘We have reached the evening and at this very time unto Allah belongs all sovereignty…’
duas.translation_fr: « Nous avons atteint le matin et à cette heure précis, c'est à Allah que revient toute la souveraineté et toute louange est à Allah. Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Allah, seul, sans aucun associé, à Lui appartiennent toute la souveraineté et la louange et Il est sur toutes choses tout-puissant. Mon Seigneur, je Te demande le bien de ce jour et le bien de ce qui le suit et je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre le mal de ce jour et le mal de ce qui le suit. Mon Seigneur, je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre la paresse et la sénilité. Mon Seigneur, je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre les tourments du Feu et le châtiment dans la tombe.
duas.phonetic: ((aasbahnaa waaasbaha almulku lilahi waalhamdu lilahi laa iilaha ilaa allahu wahdahu laa shariyka lahu lahu almulku walahu alhamdu wahuwa 'alaa kuli shay'in qadiyrun rabi aasaaluka khayra maa fiy hadhaa alyawmi wakhayra maa ba'dahu waaa'uwdhu bika min shari maa fiy hadhaa alyawmi washari maa ba'dahu rabi aa'uwdhu bika mina alkasali wasuw'i alkibari rabi aa'uwdhu bika min 'adhaabin fiy alnaari wa'adhaabin fiy alqabri)). [ widha amsa qal: amsyna wamsa almlk llah] [widha amsa qal: rb asalk khyr ma fy hdhh allylh wkhyr ma b'dha wa'wdh bk mn shr ma fy hdhh allylh wshr ma b'dha.]

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا، وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا ، وَبِكَ نَحْيَا، وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ)). [وإذا أمسى قال: اللَّهم بك أمسينا، وبك أصبحنا، وبك نحيا، وبك نموت، وإليك المصير.]
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, by your leave we have reached the morning and by Your leave we have reached the evening, by Your leave we live and die and unto You is our resurrection.)[In the evening:](O Allah, by Your leave we have reached the evening and by Your leave we have reached the morning, by Your leave we live and die and unto You is our return.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma bika asbahna wabika amsayna, wabika nahya ,wabika namootu wa-ilaykan-nushoor.)[In the evening:] (Allahumma bika amsayna, wabika asbahna, wabika nahya wabika namootu wa-ilaykal-maseer.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, par ta permission nous avons atteint le matin et par Ta permission nous avons atteint le soir, par Ta permission nous vivons et mourons et c'est à Toi qu'est notre résurrection.) [Le soir :] (O Allah, par Ta permission nous avons atteint le soir et par Ta permission nous avons atteint le matin, par Ta permission nous vivons et mourons et vers Toi est notre retour.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma bika asbahna wabika amsayna, wabika nahya ,wabika namootu wa-ilaykan-nushoor.)[In the evening:] (Allahumma bika amsayna, wabika asbahna, wabika nahya wabika namootu wa-ilaykal-maseer.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ، وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنوبَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You, You created me and I am Your servant and I abide to Your covenant and promise as best I can, I take refuge in You from the evil of which I have committed.  I acknowledge Your favour upon me and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for verily none can forgive sin except You.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma anta rabbee la ilaha illa ant, khalaqtanee wa-ana AAabduk, wa-ana AAala AAahdika wawaAAdika mas-tataAAt, aAAoothu bika min sharri ma sanaAAt, aboo-o laka biniAAmatika AAalay, wa-aboo-o bithanbee, faghfir lee fa-innahu la yaghfiruth-thunooba illa ant.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, Tu es mon Seigneur, nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Toi, Tu m'as créé et je suis Ton serviteur et je respecte Ton alliance et promets du mieux que je peux, je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre le mal dont j'ai commis. Je reconnais Ta faveur sur moi et je reconnais mon péché, alors pardonne-moi, car en vérité personne ne peut pardonner le péché sauf Toi.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma anta rabbee la ilaha illa ant, khalaqtanee wa-ana AAabduk, wa-ana AAala AAahdika wawaAAdika mas-tataAAt, aAAoothu bika min sharri ma sanaAAt, aboo-o laka biniAAmatika AAalay, wa-aboo-o bithanbee, faghfir lee fa-innahu la yaghfiruth-thunooba illa ant.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَصْبَحْتُ أُشْهِدُكَ، وَأُشْهِدُ حَمَلَةَ عَرْشِكَ، وَمَلاَئِكَتِكَ، وَجَمِيعَ خَلْقِكَ، أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَكَ، وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُولُكَ)) (أربعَ مَرَّاتٍ).[ وإذا أمسى قال: اللَّهم إني أمسيت...]
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, verily I have reached the morning and call on You, the bearers of Your throne, Your angles, and all of Your creation to witness that You are Allah, none has the right to be worshipped except You, alone, without partner and that Muhammad is Your Servant and Messenger.) (four times in the morning & evening)(Note: for the evening, one reads (amsaytu) instead of (asbahtu).)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee asbahtu oshhiduk, wa-oshhidu hamalata AAarshik, wamala-ikatak, wajameeAAa khalqik, annaka antal-lahu la ilaha illa ant, wahdaka la shareeka lak, wa-anna Muhammadan AAabduka warasooluk .) (four times in the morning & evening)(Note: for the evening, one reads (amsaytu) instead of (asbahtu).)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, en vérité, j'ai atteint le matin et je t'invoque, toi, les porteurs de ton trône, de tes angles et de toute ta création, pour témoigner que tu es Allah, nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf toi, seul, sans partenaire et que Muhammad est ton serviteur et messager.) (quatre fois le matin et le soir) (Remarque : pour le soir, on lit (amsaytu) au lieu de (asbahtu).)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee asbahtu oshhiduk, wa-oshhidu hamalata AAarshik, wamala-ikatak, wajameeAAa khalqik, annaka antal-lahu la ilaha illa ant, wahdaka la shareeka lak, wa-anna Muhammadan AAabduka warasooluk .) (four times in the morning & evening)(Note: for the evening, one reads (amsaytu) instead of (asbahtu).

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَصْبَحَ بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ أَوْ بِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَكَ، فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَلَكَ الشُّكْرُ)). [وإذا أمسى قال: اللَّهم ما أمسى بي...]
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, what blessing I or any of Your creation have risen upon, is from You alone, without partner, so for You is all praise and unto You all thanks.)(…whoever says this in the morning has indeed offered his day’s thanks and whoever says this in the evening has indeed offered his night’s thanks.)(Note: for the evening, one reads (amsa) instead of (asbaha).)
duas.reference: (Allahumma ma asbaha bee min niAAmatin, aw bi-ahadin min khalqik, faminka wahdaka la shareeka lak, falakal-hamdu walakash-shukr.)(Note: for the evening, one reads (amsa) instead of (asbaha).)
duas.translation_fr: (O Allah, quelle bénédiction sur laquelle moi ou l'un de Tes créations nous sommes levés vient de Toi seul, sans partenaire, donc pour Toi est toute louange et à Toi tous remerciements.)(… celui qui dit cela le matin a en effet offert ses remerciements de la journée et celui qui dit cela le soir a en effet offert ses remerciements de la nuit.)(Remarque : pour le soir, on lit (amsa) au lieu de (asbaha).)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma ma asbaha bee min niAAmatin, aw bi-ahadin min khalqik, faminka wahdaka la shareeka lak, falakal-hamdu walakash-shukr.)(Note: for the evening, one reads (amsa) instead of (asbaha).

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ. اللَّهُمَّ  إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكُفْرِ، وَالفَقْرِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ القَبْرِ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ)) (ثلاثَ مرَّاتٍ).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, grant my body health, O Allah, grant my hearing health, O Allah, grant my sight health.  None has the right to be worshipped except You.)(three times) (O Allah, I take refuge with You from disbelief and poverty, and I take refuge with You from the punishment of the grave.  None has the right to be worshipped except You. (three times))
duas.reference: (Allahumma AAafinee fee badanee, allahumma AAafinee fee samAAee, allahumma AAafinee fee basaree, la ilaha illa ant.(three times).)(Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-kufr, walfaqr, wa-aAAoothu bika min AAathabil-qabr, la ilaha illa ant (three times).)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, accorde à mon corps la santé, Ô Allah, accorde à mon ouïe, Ô Allah, accorde à ma vue la santé. Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Toi.)(trois fois) (Ô Allah, je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre l'incrédulité et la pauvreté, et je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre le châtiment de la tombe. Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Toi. (trois fois))
duas.phonetic: Allahumma AAafinee fee badanee, allahumma AAafinee fee samAAee, allahumma AAafinee fee basaree, la ilaha illa ant.(three times).)(Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-kufr, walfaqr, wa-aAAoothu bika min AAathabil-qabr, la ilaha illa ant (three times).

duas.arabic: ((حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ عَلَيهِ تَوَكَّلتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ)) (سَبْعَ مَرّاتٍ).
duas.translation_en: Allah is Sufficient for me, none has the right to be worshipped except Him, upon Him I rely and He is Lord of the exalted throne.’ (Recite seven times in Arabic.)
duas.reference: (Hasbiyal-lahu la ilaha illa huwa, AAalayhi tawakkalt, wahuwa rabbul-AAarshil-AAatheem (Recite seven times in Arabic.)
duas.translation_fr: Allah me suffit, nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Lui, c'est sur Lui que je m'appuie et Il est le Seigneur du trône exalté.' (Récitez sept fois en arabe.)
duas.phonetic: Hasbiyal-lahu la ilaha illa huwa, AAalayhi tawakkalt, wahuwa rabbul-AAarshil-AAatheem (Recite seven times in Arabic.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ: فِي دِينِي وَدُنْيَايَ وَأَهْلِي، وَمَالِي، اللَّهُمَّ اسْتُرْ عَوْرَاتِي، وَآمِنْ رَوْعَاتِي، اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْنِي مِنْ بَينِ يَدَيَّ، وَمِنْ خَلْفِي، وَعَنْ يَمِينِي، وَعَنْ شِمَالِي، وَمِنْ فَوْقِي، وَأَعُوذُ بِعَظَمَتِكَ أَنْ أُغْتَالَ مِنْ تَحْتِي)).
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in this life and the next. O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in my religious and worldly affairs, and my family and my wealth. O Allah, veil my weaknesses and set at ease my dismay. O Allah, preserve me from the front and from behind and on my right and on my left and from above, and I take refuge with You lest I be swallowed up by the earth.
duas.reference: Allahumma innee as-alukal-AAafwa walAAafiyah, fid-dunya wal-akhirah, allahumma innee as-alukal-AAafwa walAAafiyah fee deenee, wadunyaya wa-ahlee, wamalee, allahummas-tur AAawratee, wa-amin rawAAatee, allahummah-fathnee min bayni yaday, wamin khalfee, waAAan yameenee, waAAan shimalee, wamin fawqee, wa-aAAoothu biAAathamatika an oghtala min tahtee.
duas.translation_fr: Ô Allah, je Te demande pardon et bien-être dans cette vie et dans l'autre. Ô Allah, je Te demande pardon et bien-être dans mes affaires religieuses et mondaines, ainsi que dans ma famille et mes richesses. Ô Allah, voile mes faiblesses et apaise mon désarroi. Ô Allah, préserve-moi devant et derrière et à ma droite et à ma gauche et d'en haut, et je me réfugie auprès de Toi de peur d'être englouti par la terre.
duas.phonetic: ((allahuma iiniy aasaaluka al'afwa waal'aafiyaha fiy aldunyaa waalaakhirahi allahuma iiniy aasaaluka al'afwa waal'aafiyaha: fiy diyniy wadunyaaya waaahliy wamaaliy allahuma astur 'awraatiy waaamin raw'aatiy allahuma ahfadhniy min bayni yadaya wamin khalfiy wa'an yamiyniy wa'an shimaaliy wamin fawqiy waaa'uwdhu bi'adhamatika aan aughtaala min tahtiy)).

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ عَالِمَ الغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ فَاطِرَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ، رَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمَلِيكَهُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ الشَّيْطانِ وَشَرَكِهِ، وَأَنْ أَقْتَرِفَ عَلَى  نَفْسِي سُوءاً، أَوْ أَجُرَّهُ إِلَى مُسْلِمٍ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, Knower of the unseen and the seen, Creator of the heavens and the Earth, Lord and Sovereign of all things, I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except You. I take refuge in You from the evil of my soul and from the evil and shirk of the devil, and from committing wrong against my soul or bringing such upon another Muslim.)(shirk: to associate others with Allah in those things which are specific to Him.  This can occur in (1) belief, e.g. to believe that other than Allah has the power to benefit or harm, (2) speech, e.g. to swear by other than Allah and (3) action, e.g. to bow or prostrate to other than Allah.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma AAalimal-ghaybi washshahadah, fatiras-samawati wal-ard, rabba kulli shayin wamaleekah, ashhadu an la ilaha illa ant, aAAoothu bika min sharri nafsee wamin sharrish-shaytani washirkih, waan aqtarifa AAala nafsee soo-an aw ajurrahu ila muslim.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, Connaisseur de l'invisible et du visible, Créateur des cieux et de la terre, Seigneur et Souverain de toutes choses, j'atteste que nul n'a le droit d'être adoré en dehors de Toi. Je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre le mal de mon âme et contre le mal et le shirk du diable, et contre le mal envers mon âme ou contre un autre musulman.)(shirk : associer les autres à Allah dans les choses qui Lui sont spécifiques. Cela peut se produire dans (1) la croyance, par exemple croire qu'un autre qu'Allah a le pouvoir de bénéficier ou de nuire, (2) la parole, par exemple jurer par un autre qu'Allah et (3) l'action, par exemple s'incliner ou se prosterner devant un autre qu'Allah.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma AAalimal-ghaybi washshahadah, fatiras-samawati wal-ard, rabba kulli shayin wamaleekah, ashhadu an la ilaha illa ant, aAAoothu bika min sharri nafsee wamin sharrish-shaytani washirkih, waan aqtarifa AAala nafsee soo-an aw ajurrahu ila muslim.

duas.arabic: ((بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لاَ يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلاَ فِي السّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ)) (ثلاثَ مرَّاتٍ).
duas.translation_en: (In the name of Allah with whose name nothing is harmed on earth nor in the heavens and He is The All-Seeing, The All-Knowing.’(three times))
duas.reference: (Bismil-lahil-lathee la yadurru maAAas-mihi shay-on fil-ardi wala fis-sama-i wahuwas-sameeAAul-AAaleem. (three times).)
duas.translation_fr: (Au nom d’Allah au nom duquel rien n’est nuisible sur terre ni dans les cieux et Il est Celui qui voit tout et qui sait tout.’(trois fois))
duas.phonetic: Bismil-lahil-lathee la yadurru maAAas-mihi shay-on fil-ardi wala fis-sama-i wahuwas-sameeAAul-AAaleem. (three times).

duas.arabic: ((رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبَّاً، وَبِالْإِسْلاَمِ دِيناً، وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ صلى الله عليه وسلم نَبِيّاً)) (ثلاثَ مرَّاتٍ).
duas.translation_en: (I am pleased with Allah as a Lord, and Islam as a religion and Muhammad  as a Prophet.’(three times))
duas.reference: (Radeetu billahi rabban wabil-islami deenan wabiMuhammadin  nabiyya. (three times))
duas.translation_fr: (Je suis satisfait d’Allah comme Seigneur, de l’Islam comme religion et de Muhammad comme Prophète.’(trois fois))
duas.phonetic: Radeetu billahi rabban wabil-islami deenan wabiMuhammadin  nabiyya. (three times

duas.arabic: ((يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغيثُ أَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِيَ كُلَّهُ وَلاَ تَكِلْنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Ever Living, O Self-Subsisting and Supporter of all, by Your mercy I seek assistance, rectify for me all of my affairs and do not leave me to myself, even for the blink of an eye.)
duas.reference: (Ya hayyu ya qayyoom, birahmatika astagheeth, aslih lee sha/nee kullah, wala takilnee ila nafsee tarfata AAayn.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Éternel Vivant, ô Auto-subsistant et Supporteur de tous, par Ta miséricorde je demande de l'aide, rectifie pour moi toutes mes affaires et ne me laisse pas seul, même pour un clin d'œil.)
duas.phonetic: Ya hayyu ya qayyoom, birahmatika astagheeth, aslih lee sha/nee kullah, wala takilnee ila nafsee tarfata AAayn.

duas.arabic: ((أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ، اللَّهُـمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ هَذَا الْيَوْمِ:فَتْحَهُ، وَنَصْرَهُ، وَنورَهُ، وَبَرَكَتَهُ، وَهُدَاهُ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا فِيهِ وَشَرِّ مَا بَعْدَهُ)). [وإذا أمسى قال: أمسينا وأمسى الملك للَّه ربّ العالمين اللَّهم إني أسألك خير هذه الليلة: فتحها، ونصرها، ونورها، وبركتها، وهداها، وأعوذ بك من شر ما فيها، وشر ما بعدها.]
duas.translation_en: (We have reached the morning and at this very time all sovereignty belongs to Allah, Lord of the worlds. O Allah, I ask You for the good of this day, its triumphs and its victories, its light and its blessings and its guidance, and I take refuge in You from the evil of this day and the evil that follows it.)[For the evening, the supplication is read as follows:](We have reached the evening and at this very time all sovereignty belongs to Allah, Lord of the worlds. O Allah, I ask You for the good of tonight, its triumphs and its victories, its light and its blessings and its guidance, and I take refuge in You from the evil of tonight and the evil that follows it.)
duas.reference: (Asbahna wa-asbahal-mulku lillahi rabbil-AAalameen, allahumma innee as-aluka khayra hathal-yawm, fat-hahu, wanasrahu, wanoorahu, wabarakatahu, wahudahu, wa-aAAoothu bika min sharri ma feehi, washarri ma baAAdah.)[For the evening, the supplication is read as follows: ](Amsayna wa-amsal-mulku lillahi rabbil-AAalameen, allahumma innee as-aluka khayra hathihil-laylah, fat-haha, wanasraha, wanooraha, wabarakataha, wahudaha, wa-aAAoothu bika min sharri ma feeha washarri ma baAAdaha.)
duas.translation_fr: (Nous avons atteint le matin et à ce moment précis toute souveraineté appartient à Allah, Seigneur des mondes. Ô Allah, je Te demande le bien de ce jour, ses triomphes et ses victoires, sa lumière et ses bénédictions et sa direction, et je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre le mal de ce jour et le mal qui le suit.) le bien de cette nuit, ses triomphes et ses victoires, sa lumière et ses bénédictions et sa direction, et je me réfugie en Toi contre le mal de cette nuit et le mal qui la suit.)
duas.phonetic: Asbahna wa-asbahal-mulku lillahi rabbil-AAalameen, allahumma innee as-aluka khayra hathal-yawm, fat-hahu, wanasrahu, wanoorahu, wabarakatahu, wahudahu, wa-aAAoothu bika min sharri ma feehi, washarri ma baAAdah.)[For the evening, the supplication is read as follows: ](Amsayna wa-amsal-mulku lillahi rabbil-AAalameen, allahumma innee as-aluka khayra hathihil-laylah, fat-haha, wanasraha, wanooraha, wabarakataha, wahudaha, wa-aAAoothu bika min sharri ma feeha washarri ma baAAdaha.

duas.arabic: ((أَصْبَحْنا عَلَى فِطْرَةِ الْإِسْلاَمِ، وَعَلَى كَلِمَةِ الْإِخْلاَصِ، وَعَلَى دِينِ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ صلى الله عليه وسلم، وَعَلَى مِلَّةِ أَبِينَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ، حَنِيفاً مُسْلِماً وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ الْمُشرِكِينَ)). [وإذا أمسى قال: أمسينا على فطرة الإسلام...]
duas.translation_en: (We rise upon the fitrah of Islam, and the word of pure faith, and upon the religion of our Prophet Muhammad  and the religion of our forefather Ibraheem, who was a Muslim and of true faith and was not of those who associate others with Allah.)(fitrah: the religion of Islam, the way of Ibraheem u.)(Note: for the evening, one reads amsayna instead of asbahna.)
duas.reference: (Asbahna AAala fitratil-islam, waAAala kalimatil-ikhlas, waAAala deeni nabiyyina Muhammad  waAAala millati abeena Ibraheem, haneefan musliman wama kana minal-mushrikeen.)(Note: for the evening, one reads amsayna instead of asbahna.)
duas.translation_fr: (Nous nous élevons sur la fitrah de l'Islam, et sur la parole de foi pure, et sur la religion de notre Prophète Muhammad et sur la religion de notre ancêtre Ibraheem, qui était musulman et de vraie foi et n'était pas de ceux qui associent les autres à Allah.)(fitrah : la religion de l'Islam, la voie d'Ibraheem u.)(Remarque : pour le soir, on lit amsayna au lieu d'asbahna.)
duas.phonetic: Asbahna AAala fitratil-islam, waAAala kalimatil-ikhlas, waAAala deeni nabiyyina Muhammad  waAAala millati abeena Ibraheem, haneefan musliman wama kana minal-mushrikeen.)(Note: for the evening, one reads amsayna instead of asbahna.

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ)) (مائة مرَّةٍ).
duas.translation_en: (How perfect Allah is and I praise Him.)(one hundred times)
duas.reference: (Subhanal-lahi wabihamdih.)one hundred times)
duas.translation_fr: (Comme Allah est parfait et je Le loue.)(cent fois)
duas.phonetic: Subhanal-lahi wabihamdih.)one hundred times

duas.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ)) (عشرَ مرَّات) ، أَوْ (مرَّةً واحدةً عندَ الكَسَلِ).
duas.translation_en: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things omnipotent.)( [ten times or once if lazy])
duas.reference: (La ilaha illal-lah, wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shay-in qadeer.  [ten times or once if lazy])
duas.translation_fr: (Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Allah, seul, sans associé, à Lui appartiennent toute la souveraineté et la louange, et Il est sur toutes choses tout-puissant.)( [dix fois ou une fois si paresseux])
duas.phonetic: La ilaha illal-lah, wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shay-in qadeer.  [ten times or once if lazy]

duas.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ، وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ)) (مائةَ مرَّةٍ إذا أصبحَ).
duas.translation_en: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things omnipotent.)((one hundred times every day))
duas.reference: (La ilaha illal-lah, wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shay-in qadeer. (one hundred times every day))
duas.translation_fr: (Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Allah, seul, sans associé, à Lui appartiennent toute la souveraineté et la louange, et Il est sur toutes choses tout-puissant.)((cent fois chaque jour))
duas.phonetic: La ilaha illal-lah, wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shay-in qadeer. (one hundred times every day

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ: عَدَدَ خَلْقِهِ، وَرِضَا نَفْسِهِ، وَزِنَةَ عَرْشِهِ، وَمِدَادَ كَلِمَاتِهِ)) (ثلاثَ مرَّاتٍ إذا أصبحَ).
duas.translation_en: (How perfect Allah is and I praise Him by the number of His creation and His pleasure, and by the weight of His throne, and the ink of His words.)(three times)
duas.reference: (Subhanal-lahi wabihamdih, AAadada khalqihi warida nafsih, wazinata AAarshih, wamidada kalimatih.)(three times)
duas.translation_fr: (Comme Allah est parfait et je Le loue par le nombre de Sa création et Son plaisir, et par le poids de Son trône et l'encre de Ses paroles.)(trois fois)
duas.phonetic: Subhanal-lahi wabihamdih, AAadada khalqihi warida nafsih, wazinata AAarshih, wamidada kalimatih.)(three times

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْماً نَافِعاً، وَرِزْقاً طَيِّباً، وَعَمَلاً مُتَقَبَّلاً)) (إذا أصبحَ).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I ask You for knowledge which is beneficial and sustenance which is good, and deeds which are acceptable.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee as-aluka AAilman nafiAAan, warizqan tayyiban, waAAamalan mutaqabbalan.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je Te demande une connaissance bénéfique, une subsistance bonne et des actions acceptables.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee as-aluka AAilman nafiAAan, warizqan tayyiban, waAAamalan mutaqabbalan.

duas.arabic: ((أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ)) (مِائَةَ مَرَّةٍ فِي الْيَوْمِ).
duas.translation_en: ‘I seek Allaah’s forgiveness and I turn to Him in repentance.’ [one hundred times a day]
duas.reference: Astaghfirullaaha wa 'atoobu 'ilayhi[one hundred times a day]
duas.translation_fr: « Je demande le pardon d’Allah et je me tourne vers Lui avec repentance. » [cent fois par jour]
duas.phonetic: ((aastaghfiru allaha waaatuwbu iilayhi)) (miaaha marahin fiy alyawmi).

duas.arabic: ((أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ)) (ثلاثَ مرَّاتٍ إذا أمسى).
duas.translation_en: (I take refuge in Allah’s perfect words from the evil He has created.)(three times in the evening)
duas.reference: (aAAoothu bikalimatil-lahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq.) (three times in the evening)
duas.translation_fr: (Je me réfugie dans les paroles parfaites d’Allah contre le mal qu’Il ​​a créé.)(trois fois le soir)
duas.phonetic: aAAoothu bikalimatil-lahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq.) (three times in the evening

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ عَلَى نَبَيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ)) (عشرَ مرَّاتٍ).
duas.translation_en: ‘O Allaah, send prayers and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad.’ [ten times]
duas.reference: Allaahumma salli wa sallim 'alaa Nabiyyinaa Muhammadin[ten times]
duas.translation_fr: «Ô Allah, envoie des prières et la paix sur notre Prophète Muhammad.» [dix fois]
duas.phonetic: ((allahuma sali wasalim 'alaa nabayinaa muhamadin)) ('shra mraatin).

title_fr: Invocations du matin et du soir

title_en: What to say before sleeping

duas.arabic: ((يَجْمَعُ كَفَّيْهِ ثُمَّ يَنْفُثُ فِيهِمَا فَيَقْرَأُ فِيهِمَا:بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ﴿قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ * اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ* لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ* وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ﴾.  بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ﴿قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ* مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ* وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ* وَمِن شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ* وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ﴾.  بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ﴿قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ* مَلِكِ النَّاسِ* إِلَهِ النَّاسِ* مِن شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ* الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ* مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَ النَّاسِ﴾ ثُمَّ يَمْسَحُ بِهِمَا مَا اسْتَطَاعَ مِنْ جَسَدِهِ يَبْدَأُ بِهِمَا عَلَى رَأْسِهِ وَوَجْهِهِ وَمَا أَقبَلَ مِنْ جَسَدِهِ)) (يفعلُ ذلك ثلاثَ مرَّاتٍ).
duas.translation_en: (When retiring to his bed every night, the Prophet  would hold his palms together, spit (A form of spitting comprising mainly of air with little spittle) in them, recite the last three chapters (Al-Ikhlas, Al-Falaq, An-Nas) of the Quran and then wipe over his entire body as much as possible with his hands, beginning with his head and face and then all parts of the body, he would do this three times.)
duas.translation_fr: (En se retirant dans son lit chaque nuit, le Prophète tenait ses paumes jointes, y crachait (une forme de crachat comprenant principalement de l'air avec peu de crachats), récitait les trois derniers chapitres (Al-Ikhlas, Al-Falaq, An-Nas) du Coran puis essuyait tout son corps autant que possible avec ses mains, en commençant par sa tête et son visage, puis toutes les parties du corps, il le faisait trois fois.)
duas.phonetic: ((yajma'u kafayhi thuma yanfuthu fiyhimaa fayaqraau fiyhimaa:bsm allh alrhmn alrhym ﴿qul huwa allahu aahadun * allahu alsamadu* lam yalid walam yuwlad* walam yakun lahu kufuwaan aahadun﴾. bsm allh alrhmn alrhym ﴿qul aa'uwdhu birabi alfalaqi* min shari maa khalaqa* wamin shari ghaasiqin iidhaa waqaba* wamin shari alnafaathaati fiy al'uqadi* wamin shari haasidin iidhaa hasada﴾. bsm allh alrhmn alrhym ﴿qul aa'uwdhu birabi alnaasi* maliki alnaasi* iilahi alnaasi* min shari alwaswaasi alkhanaasi* aladhiy yuwaswisu fiy suduwri alnaasi* mina aljinahi wa alnaasi﴾ thuma yamsahu bihimaa maa astataa'a min jasadihi yabdaau bihimaa 'alaa raasihi wawajhihi wamaa aaqbala min jasadihi)) (yf'lu dhlk thlatha mraatin).

duas.arabic: ﴿اللَّهُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ لاَ تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلاَ نَوْمٌ لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الأَرْضِ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْـــــــــــدَهُ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلاَ يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلاَّ بِمَا شَاء وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضَ وَلاَ يَؤُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ﴾.
duas.translation_en: Allah - there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of [all] existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
duas.reference: Recite Ayat-Al-Kursiy (Al-Baqarah :255)
duas.translation_fr: Allah - il n'y a de divinité que Lui, le Vivant, Celui qui soutient [toute] l'existence. Ni la somnolence ne l’envahit, ni le sommeil. A Lui appartient tout ce qui est dans les cieux et tout ce qui est sur la terre. Qui peut intercéder auprès de Lui sans sa permission ? Il sait ce qui est [actuellement] avant eux et ce qui sera après eux, et ils n'englobent rien de sa connaissance, sauf ce qu'il veut. Son Kursi s'étend sur les cieux et la terre, et leur préservation ne le fatigue pas. Et Il est le Très-Haut, le Très Grand.
duas.phonetic: ﴿allahu laa iilaha iilaa huwa alhayu alqayuwmu laa taakhudhuhu sinahun walaa nawmun lahu maa fiy alsamawaati wamaa fiy alaardi man dhaa aladhiy yashfa'u 'indahu iilaa biiidhnihi ya'lamu maa bayna aaydiyhim wamaa khalfahum walaa yuhiytuwna bishay'in min 'ilmihi iilaa bimaa shaa' wasi'a kursiyuhu alsamawaati waalaarda walaa yauwduhu hifdhuhumaa wahuwa al'aliyu al'adhiymu﴾.

duas.arabic: ﴿آمَنَ الرَّسُولُ بِمَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْهِ مِن رَّبِّهِ وَالْمُؤْمِنُونَ كُلٌّ آمَنَ بِاللَّهِ وَمَلآئِكَتِهِ وَكُتُبِهِ وَرُسُلِهِ لاَ نُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ أَحَدٍ مِّن رُّسُلِهِ وَقَالُواْ سَمِعْنَا وَأَطَعْنَا غُفْرَانَكَ رَبَّنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ* لاَ يُكَلِّفُ اللَّهُ نَفْساً إِلاَّ وُسْعَهَا لَهَا مَا كَسَبَتْ وَعَلَيْهَا مَا اكْتَسَبَتْ رَبَّنَا لاَ تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِن نَّسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا رَبَّنَا وَلاَ تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْنَا إِصْراً كَمَا حَمَلْتَهُ عَلَى الَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِنَا رَبَّنَا وَلاَ تُحَمِّلْنَا مَا لاَ طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِ وَاعْفُ عَنَّا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَارْحَمْنَآ أَنتَ مَوْلاَنَا فَانصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ﴾.
duas.translation_en: ( 285 )   The Messenger has believed in what was revealed to him from his Lord, and [so have] the believers. All of them have believed in Allah and His angels and His books and His messengers, [saying], We make no distinction between any of His messengers. And they say, We hear and we obey. [We seek] Your forgiveness, our Lord, and to You is the [final] destination.( 286 )   Allah does not charge a soul except [with that within] its capacity. It will have [the consequence of] what [good] it has gained, and it will bear [the consequence of] what [evil] it has earned. Our Lord, do not impose blame upon us if we have forgotten or erred. Our Lord, and lay not upon us a burden like that which You laid upon those before us. Our Lord, and burden us not with that which we have no ability to bear. And pardon us; and forgive us; and have mercy upon us. You are our protector, so give us victory over the disbelieving people.
duas.reference: Recite last two verses of Soorah (Al-Baqarah :285-286)
duas.translation_fr: (285) Le Messager a cru à ce qui lui a été révélé par son Seigneur, ainsi que les croyants. Tous ont cru en Allah et en Ses anges et en Ses livres et en Ses messagers, [disant] : Nous ne faisons aucune distinction entre aucun de Ses messagers. Et ils disent : Nous entendons et nous obéissons. [Nous recherchons] Ton pardon, notre Seigneur, et vers Toi est la destination [finale]. (286) Allah ne charge une âme que [de ce qui est dans] sa capacité. Il aura [la conséquence de] ce [bien] qu'il a gagné, et il supportera [la conséquence de] ce [mal] qu'il a gagné. Notre Seigneur, ne nous blâme pas si nous avons oublié ou commis une erreur. Notre Seigneur, et ne nous impose pas un fardeau comme celui que Tu as imposé à ceux qui nous ont précédés. Notre Seigneur, et ne nous charge pas de ce que nous ne sommes pas capables de supporter. Et pardonne-nous ; et pardonne-nous; et aie pitié de nous. Tu es notre protecteur, alors donne-nous la victoire sur les gens mécréants.
duas.phonetic: ﴿aamana alrasuwlu bimaa aunzila iilayhi min rabihi waalmuminuwna kulun aamana biallahi wamalaaikatihi wakutubihi warusulihi laa nufariqu bayna aahadin min rusulihi waqaaluwa sami'naa waaata'naa ghufraanaka rabanaa waiilayka almasiyru* laa yukalifu allahu nafsaan iilaa wus'ahaa lahaa maa kasabat wa'alayhaa maa aktasabat rabanaa laa tuaakhidhnaa iin nasiynaa aaw aakhtaanaa rabanaa walaa tahmil 'alaynaa iisraan kamaa hamaltahu 'alaa aladhiyna min qablinaa rabanaa walaa tuhamilnaa maa laa taaqaha lanaa bihi waa'fu 'anaa waaghfir lanaa waarhamnaaa aanta mawlaanaa faansurnaa 'alaa alqawmi alkaafiriyna﴾.

duas.arabic: ((بِاسْمِكَ رَبِّي وَضَعْتُ جَنْبِي، وَبِكَ أَرْفَعُهُ، فَإِن أَمْسَكْتَ نَفْسِي فارْحَمْهَا، وَإِنْ أَرْسَلْتَهَا فَاحْفَظْهَا، بِمَا تَحْفَظُ بِهِ عِبَادَكَ الصَّالِحِينَ)).
duas.translation_en: (In Your name my Lord, I lie down and in Your name I rise, so if You should take my soul then have mercy upon it, and if You should return my soul then protect it in the manner You do so with Your righteous servants.)
duas.reference: (Bismika rabbee wadaAAtu janbee wabika arfaAAuh, fa-in amsakta nafsee farhamha, wa-in arsaltaha fahfathha bima tahfathu bihi AAibadakas-saliheen.)
duas.translation_fr: (En ton nom mon Seigneur, je me couche et en ton nom je me lève, donc si tu prends mon âme, aie pitié d'elle, et si tu me rends mon âme, protège-la de la manière dont tu le fais avec tes serviteurs justes.)
duas.phonetic: Bismika rabbee wadaAAtu janbee wabika arfaAAuh, fa-in amsakta nafsee farhamha, wa-in arsaltaha fahfathha bima tahfathu bihi AAibadakas-saliheen.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ خَلَقْتَ نَفْسِي وَأَنْتَ تَوَفَّاهَا، لَكَ مَمَاتُهَا وَمَحْياهَا، إِنْ أَحْيَيْتَهَا فَاحْفَظْهَا، وَإِنْ أَمَتَّهَا فَاغْفِرْ لَهَا. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ العَافِيَةَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, verily You have created my soul and You shall take it’s life, to You belongs it’s life and death. If You should keep my soul alive then protect it, and if You should take it’s life then forgive it. O Allah, I ask You to grant me good health.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innaka khalaqta nafsee wa-anta tawaffaha, laka mamatuha wamahyaha in ahyaytaha fahfathha, wa-in amattaha faghfir laha. Allahumma innee as-alukal-AAafiyah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, en vérité Tu as créé mon âme et Tu lui ôteras la vie, à Toi appartiennent la vie et la mort. Si Tu dois garder mon âme en vie alors protège-la, et si Tu dois lui ôter la vie alors pardonne-lui. Ô Allah, je Te demande de m'accorder une bonne santé.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innaka khalaqta nafsee wa-anta tawaffaha, laka mamatuha wamahyaha in ahyaytaha fahfathha, wa-in amattaha faghfir laha. Allahumma innee as-alukal-AAafiyah.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ قِنِي عَذَابَكَ يَوْمَ تَبْعَثُ عِبَادَكَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the day Your servants are resurrected.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma qinee AAathabaka yawma tabAAathu AAibadak.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, protège-moi de Ton châtiment le jour où Tes serviteurs seront ressuscités.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma qinee AAathabaka yawma tabAAathu AAibadak.

duas.arabic: ((بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا)).
duas.translation_en: (In Your name O Allah, I live and die.)
duas.reference: (Bismikal-lahumma amootu wa-ahya.)
duas.translation_fr: (En ton nom, ô Allah, je vis et je meurs.)
duas.phonetic: Bismikal-lahumma amootu wa-ahya.

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ (ثلاثاً وثلاثين) وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ (ثلاثاً وثلاثين) وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ (أربعاً وثلاثينَ))).
duas.translation_en: (How Perfect Allah is. (thirty-three times) All praise is for Allah.(thirty-three times) Allah is the greatest.(thirty-four times))
duas.reference: (Subhanal-lah. (thirty-three times) Alhamdu lillah. (thirty-three times) Allahu akbar. (thirty-four times))
duas.translation_fr: (Comme Allah est parfait. (trente-trois fois) Toute louange est à Allah. (trente-trois fois) Allah est le plus grand. (trente-quatre fois))
duas.phonetic: Subhanal-lah. (thirty-three times) Alhamdu lillah. (thirty-three times) Allahu akbar. (thirty-four times

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمَوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَرَبَّ الأَرْضِ، وَرَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، رَبَّنَا وَرَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ، فَالِقَ الْحَبِّ وَالنَّوَى، وَمُنْزِلَ التَّوْرَاةِ وَالْإِنْجِيلِ، وَالْفُرْقَانِ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ أَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهِ. اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الأَوَّلُ فَلَيْسَ قَبْلَكَ شَيْءٌ، وَأَنْتَ الآخِرُ فَلَيسَ بَعْدَكَ شَيْءٌ، وَأَنْتَ الظَّاهِرُ فَلَيْسَ فَوْقَكَ شَيْءٌ، وَأَنْتَ الْبَاطِنُ فَلَيْسَ دُونَكَ شَيْءٌ، اقْضِ عَنَّا الدَّيْنَ وَأَغْنِنَا مِنَ الْفَقْرِ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens and the exalted throne, our Lord and Lord of all things, Splitter of the seed and the date stone, Revealer of the Tawrah, the Injeel and the Furqan, I take refuge in You from the evil of all things You shall seize by the forelock (i.e. You have total mastery over). O Allah, You are The First so there is nothing before You and You are The Last so there is nothing after You.You are Aththahir so there is nothing above You and You are Al-Batin so there is nothing closer than You.Settle our debt for us and spare us from poverty.)(Tawrah: The book revealed to Moosa u.)(Injeel: The book revealed to Easa u.)(Furqan: One of the many names of the Quran, means: The Criterion which distinguishes between truth and falsehood.)(Aththahir: Indicates the greatness of His attributes and the insignificance of every single creation in respect to His greatness and Highness, for He is above all of His creation as regards His essence and attributes.)(Al-Batin: Indicates His awareness and knowledge of all secrets, of that which is in the hearts and the most intimate of things just as it indicates His closeness and nearness to all in a manner which befits His majesty.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma rabbas-samawatis-sabAA, warabbal-AAarshil-AAatheem, rabbana warabba kulli shay/, faliqal-habbi wannawa, wamunazzilat-tawra, wal-injeel, walfurqan, aAAoothu bika min sharri kulli shayin anta akhithun binasiyatih. Allahumma antal-awwal, falaysa qablaka shay/, wa-antal-akhir, falaysa baAAdaka shay/, wa-antath-thahir falaysa fawqaka shay/, waantal-batin, falaysa doonaka shay/, iqdi AAannad-dayna wa-aghnina minal-faqr.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, Seigneur des sept cieux et du trône exalté, notre Seigneur et Seigneur de toutes choses, Séparateur de la graine et de la pierre de datte, Révélateur de la Tawrah, de l'Injeel et du Furqan, je prends refuge auprès de Toi contre le mal de toutes choses que Tu saisiras par le toupet (c'est-à-dire que Tu as la maîtrise totale sur). Ô Allah, Tu es le Premier donc il n'y a rien avant Toi et Tu es le Dernier donc il n'y a rien après Toi. Tu es Aththahir ainsi il n'y a rien au-dessus de Toi et Tu es Al-Batin donc il n'y a rien de plus proche que Toi. Règle notre dette pour nous et épargne-nous de la pauvreté.) (Tawrah : Le livre révélé à Moosa u.) (Injeel : Le livre révélé à Easa u.) (Furqan : L'un des nombreux noms du Coran signifie : Le critère qui distingue la vérité du mensonge.) (Aththahir : Indique la grandeur de Ses attributs et l'insignifiance de chaque création par rapport à Sa grandeur et son Altesse, car Il est au-dessus de toute Sa création en ce qui concerne Son essence et ses attributs. (Al-Batin : Indique Sa conscience et sa connaissance de tous les secrets, de ce qui est dans les cœurs et des choses les plus intimes, tout comme cela indique Sa proximité avec tous d'une manière qui convient à Sa majesté.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma rabbas-samawatis-sabAA, warabbal-AAarshil-AAatheem, rabbana warabba kulli shay/, faliqal-habbi wannawa, wamunazzilat-tawra, wal-injeel, walfurqan, aAAoothu bika min sharri kulli shayin anta akhithun binasiyatih. Allahumma antal-awwal, falaysa qablaka shay/, wa-antal-akhir, falaysa baAAdaka shay/, wa-antath-thahir falaysa fawqaka shay/, waantal-batin, falaysa doonaka shay/, iqdi AAannad-dayna wa-aghnina minal-faqr.

duas.arabic: ((الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا، وَكَفَانَا، وَآوَانَا، فَكَمْ مِمَّنْ لاَ كَافِيَ لَهُ وَلاَ مُؤْوِيَ)).
duas.translation_en: (All praise is for Allah, Who fed us and gave us drink, and Who is sufficient for us and has sheltered us, for how many have none to suffice them or shelter them.)
duas.reference: (Alhamdu lillahil-lathee atAAamana wasaqana, wakafana, wa-awana, fakam mimman la kafiya lahu wala mu'wee.)
duas.translation_fr: (Toute louange est à Allah, Qui nous a nourris et nous a donné à boire, et Qui nous suffit et nous a abrité, car combien n'ont personne pour leur suffire ou les abriter.)
duas.phonetic: Alhamdu lillahil-lathee atAAamana wasaqana, wakafana, wa-awana, fakam mimman la kafiya lahu wala mu'wee.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ عَالِمَ الغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ فَاطِرَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ، رَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمَلِيكَهُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ الشَّيْطانِ وَشِرْكِهِ، وَأَنْ أَقْتَرِفَ عَلَى نَفْسِي سُوءاً، أَوْ أَجُرَّهُ إِلَى مُسْلِمٍ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, Knower of the seen and the unseen, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Lord and Sovereign of all things I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except You.  I take refuge in You from the evil of my soul and from the evil and shirk of the devil, and from committing wrong against my soul or bringing such upon another Muslim.)(shirk: to associate others with Allah in those things which are specific to Him.  This can occur in (1) belief, e.g. to believe that other than Allah has the power to benefit or harm, (2) speech, e.g. to swear by other than Allah and (3) action, e.g. to bow or prostrate to other than Allah.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma AAalimal-ghaybi washshahadah, fatiras-samawati wal-ard, rabba kulli shayin wamaleekah, ashhadu an la ilaha illa ant, aAAoothu bika min sharri nafsee wamin sharrish-shaytani washirkih, wa-an aqtarifa AAala nafsee soo-an aw ajurrahu ila muslim.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, Connaisseur du visible et de l'invisible, Créateur des cieux et de la terre, Seigneur et Souverain de toutes choses, j'atteste que nul n'a le droit d'être adoré en dehors de Toi. Je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre le mal de mon âme et contre le mal et le shirk du diable, et contre le mal envers mon âme ou contre un autre musulman.)(shirk : associer les autres à Allah dans les choses qui Lui sont spécifiques. Cela peut se produire dans (1) la croyance, par exemple croire qu'un autre qu'Allah a le pouvoir de bénéficier ou de nuire, (2) la parole, par exemple jurer par un autre qu'Allah et (3) l'action, par exemple s'incliner ou se prosterner devant un autre qu'Allah.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma AAalimal-ghaybi washshahadah, fatiras-samawati wal-ard, rabba kulli shayin wamaleekah, ashhadu an la ilaha illa ant, aAAoothu bika min sharri nafsee wamin sharrish-shaytani washirkih, wa-an aqtarifa AAala nafsee soo-an aw ajurrahu ila muslim.

duas.arabic: ((يَقْرَأُ ﴿الم﴾ تَنْزِيلَ السَّجْدَة ِ،  وَتَبَارَكَ الَّذي بِيَدِهِ الْمُلْكُ)).
duas.translation_en: (The Prophet  never used to sleep until he had recited Soorat As-Sajdah (chapter 32) and Soorat Al-Mulk (chapter 67).)
duas.translation_fr: (Le Prophète ne dormait jamais avant d'avoir récité la Soorat As-Sajdah (chapitre 32) et la Soorat Al-Mulk (chapitre 67).)
duas.phonetic: ((yaqraau ﴿alm﴾ tanziyla alsajdah i watabaaraka aladhy biyadihi almulku)).

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَسْلَمْتُ نَفْسِي إِلَيْكَ، وَفَوَّضْتُ أَمْرِي إِلَيْكَ، وَوَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِي إِلَيْكَ، وَأَلْجَأْتُ ظَهْرِي إِلَيْكَ، رَغْبَةً وَرَهْبَةً إِلَيْكَ، لاَ مَلْجَأَ وَلاَ مَنْجَا مِنْكَ إِلاَّ إِلَيْكَ، آمَنْتُ بِكِتَابِكَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَ، وَبِنَبِيِّكَ الَّذِي أَرْسَلْتَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I submit my soul unto You, and I entrust my affair unto You, and I turn my face towards You, and I totally rely on You, in hope and fear of You.Verily there is no refuge nor safe haven from You except with You.  I believe in Your Book which You have revealed and in Your Prophet whom You have sent.)(If you then die, you will die upon the fitrah.)(fitrah: the religion of Islam, the way of Ibraheem u.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma aslamtu nafsee ilayk, wafawwadtu amree ilayk, wawajjahtu wajhee ilayk, wa-alja/tu thahree ilayk, raghbatan warahbatan ilayk, la maljaa wala manja minka illa ilayk, amantu bikitabikal-lathee anzalt, wabinabiyyikal-lathee arsalt.)
duas.translation_fr: (O Allah, je Te soumets mon âme, et je Te confie mes affaires, et je tourne mon visage vers Toi, et je m'appuie totalement sur Toi, dans l'espoir et la crainte de Toi. En vérité, il n'y a de refuge ni de refuge contre Toi qu'avec Toi. Je crois en Ton Livre que Tu as révélé et en Ton Prophète que Tu as envoyé.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma aslamtu nafsee ilayk, wafawwadtu amree ilayk, wawajjahtu wajhee ilayk, wa-alja/tu thahree ilayk, raghbatan warahbatan ilayk, la maljaa wala manja minka illa ilayk, amantu bikitabikal-lathee anzalt, wabinabiyyikal-lathee arsalt.

title_en: supplications for when you wake up

duas.arabic: (.الْحَمْدُ للَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا، وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ )
duas.translation_en: (All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having taken it from us and unto Him is the resurrection.)
duas.reference: (Alhamdu lillahil-lathee ahyana baAAda ma amatana wa-ilayhin-nushoor.)
duas.translation_fr: (Toute louange est à Allah qui nous a donné la vie après nous l'avoir prise et à Lui est la résurrection.)
duas.phonetic: Alhamdu lillahil-lathee ahyana baAAda ma amatana wa-ilayhin-nushoor.

duas.arabic: لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَريكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ للَّهِ، وَلاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ، وَاللَّهُ أَكبَرُ، وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ، رَبِّ اغْفرْ لِي
duas.translation_en: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone without associate, to Him belongs sovereignty and praise and He is over all things wholly capable.  How perfect Allah is, and all praise is for Allah, and none has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Allah is the greatest and there is no power nor might except with Allah, The Most High, The Supreme.O my Lord forgive me)
duas.reference: (La ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shay-in qadeer, subhanal-lah, walhamdu lillah, wala  ilaha illal-lah wallahu akbar, wala hawla wala quwwata illa billahil-AAaliyyil AAatheem. Rabbigh-fir lee)
duas.translation_fr: (Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré en dehors d'Allah, Seul sans associé, à Lui appartiennent la souveraineté et la louange et Il est tout à fait capable de toutes choses. Comme Allah est parfait, et toute louange est à Allah, et personne n'a le droit d'être adoré en dehors d'Allah, Allah est le plus grand et il n'y a de pouvoir ni de puissance qu'en Allah, le Très-Haut, le Suprême. Ô mon Seigneur, pardonne-moi)
duas.phonetic: La ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shay-in qadeer, subhanal-lah, walhamdu lillah, wala  ilaha illal-lah wallahu akbar, wala hawla wala quwwata illa billahil-AAaliyyil AAatheem. Rabbigh-fir lee

duas.arabic: ( الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي فِي جَسَدِي، وَرَدَّ عَلَيَّ رُوحِي، وَأَذِنَ لي بِذِكْرِهِ )
duas.translation_en: (All praise is for Allah who restored to me my health and returned my soul and  has allowed me to remember Him.)
duas.reference: (Alhamdu lillahil-lathee AAafanee fee jasadee waradda AAalayya roohee wa-athina lee bithikrih.)
duas.translation_fr: (Toute louange est à Allah qui m'a restitué ma santé, qui m'a rendu mon âme et qui m'a permis de me souvenir de Lui.)
duas.phonetic: Alhamdu lillahil-lathee AAafanee fee jasadee waradda AAalayya roohee wa-athina lee bithikrih.

duas.arabic: ﴿ إِنَّ فِي خَلْقِ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ وَاخْتِلاَفِ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ لَآيَاتٍ لأُوْلِي الألْبَابِ * الَّذِينَ يَذْكُرُونَ اللَّهَ قِيَاماً وَقُعُوداً وَعَلَىَ جُنُوبِهِمْ وَيَتَفَكَّرُونَ فِي خَلْقِ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ رَبَّنَا مَا خَلَقْتَ هَذا بَاطِلاً سُبْحَانَكَ فَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ* رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ مَن تُدْخِلِ النَّارَ فَقَدْ أَخْزَيْتَهُ وَمَا لِلظَّالِمِينَ مِنْ أَنصَارٍ* رَّبَّنَا إِنَّنَا سَمِعْنَا مُنَادِياً يُنَادِي لِلإِيمَانِ أَنْ آمِنُواْ بِرَبِّكُمْ فَآمَنَّا رَبَّنَا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَكَفِّرْ عَنَّا سَيِّئَاتِنَا وَتَوَفَّنَا مَعَ الأبْرَارِ* رَبَّنَا وَآتِنَا مَا وَعَدتَّنَا عَلَى رُسُلِكَ وَلاَ تُخْزِنَا يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ إِنَّكَ لاَ تُخْلِفُ الْمِيعَادَ* فَاسْتَجَابَ لَهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ أَنِّي لاَ أُضِيعُ عَمَلَ عَامِلٍ مِّنكُم مِّن ذَكَرٍ أَوْ أُنثَى بَعْضُكُم مِّن بَعْضٍ فَالَّذِينَ هَاجَرُواْ وَأُخْرِجُواْ مِن دِيَارِهِمْ وَأُوذُواْ فِي سَبِيلِي وَقَاتَلُواْ وَقُتِلُواْ لأُكَفِّرَنَّ عَنْهُمْ سَيِّئَاتِهِمْ وَلأُدْخِلَنَّهُمْ جَنَّاتٍ تَجْرِي مِن تَحْتِهَا الأَنْهَارُ ثَوَاباً مِّن عِندِ اللَّهِ وَاللَّهُ عِندَهُ حُسْنُ الثَّوَابِ * لاَ يَغُرَّنَّكَ تَقَلُّبُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ فِي الْبِلاَدِ * مَتَاعٌ قَلِيلٌ ثُمَّ مَأْوَاهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ وَبِئْسَ الْمِهَادُ * لَكِنِ الَّذِينَ اتَّقَوْاْ رَبَّهُمْ لَهُمْ جَنَّاتٌ تَجْرِي مِنْ تَحْتِهَا الأَنْهَارُ خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا نُزُلاً مِّنْ عِندِ اللَّهِ وَمَا عِندَ اللَّهِ خَيْرٌ لِّلأَبْرَارِ * وَإِنَّ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ لَمَن يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَمَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ وَمَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْهِمْ خَاشِعِينَ لِلَّهِ لاَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِآيَاتِ اللَّهِ ثَمَناً قَلِيلاً أُوْلَئِكَ لَهُمْ أَجْرُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ سَرِيعُ الْحِسَابِ*يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُواْ اصْبِرُواْ وَصَابِرُواْ وَرَابِطُواْ وَاتَّقُواْ اللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ ﴾
duas.translation_en: ( 190 )   Indeed, in the creation of the heavens and the earth and the alternation of the night and the day are signs for those of understanding.( 191 )   Who remember Allah while standing or sitting or [lying] on their sides and give thought to the creation of the heavens and the earth, [saying], Our Lord, You did not create this aimlessly; exalted are You [above such a thing]; then protect us from the punishment of the Fire.( 192 )   Our Lord, indeed whoever You admit to the Fire - You have disgraced him, and for the wrongdoers there are no helpers.( 193 )   Our Lord, indeed we have heard a caller calling to faith, [saying], 'Believe in your Lord,' and we have believed. Our Lord, so forgive us our sins and remove from us our misdeeds and cause us to die with the righteous.( 194 )   Our Lord, and grant us what You promised us through Your messengers and do not disgrace us on the Day of Resurrection. Indeed, You do not fail in [Your] promise.( 195 )   And their Lord responded to them, Never will I allow to be lost the work of [any] worker among you, whether male or female; you are of one another. So those who emigrated or were evicted from their homes or were harmed in My cause or fought or were killed - I will surely remove from them their misdeeds, and I will surely admit them to gardens beneath which rivers flow as reward from Allah, and Allah has with Him the best reward.( 196 )   Be not deceived by the [uninhibited] movement of the disbelievers throughout the land.( 197 )   [It is but] a small enjoyment; then their [final] refuge is Hell, and wretched is the resting place.( 198 )   But those who feared their Lord will have gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding eternally therein, as accommodation from Allah. And that which is with Allah is best for the righteous.( 199 )   And indeed, among the People of the Scripture are those who believe in Allah and what was revealed to you and what was revealed to them, [being] humbly submissive to Allah. They do not exchange the verses of Allah for a small price.Those will have their reward with their Lord. Indeed, Allah is swift in account.( 200 )   O you who have believed, persevere and endure and remain stationed and fear Allah that you may be successful.
duas.reference: From Verse 3:190 till the end of the chapter Al-Imran
duas.translation_fr: ( 190 ) En effet, la création des cieux et de la terre et l'alternance de la nuit et du jour sont des signes pour ceux qui sont intelligents. ( 191 ) Ceux qui se souviennent d'Allah debout, assis ou couchés sur le côté et pensent à la création des cieux et de la terre, [en disant] : Notre Seigneur, Tu n'as pas créé cela sans but ; Tu es exalté [au-dessus d'une telle chose] ; alors protège-nous du châtiment du Feu.( 192 ) Notre Seigneur, en effet, quiconque Tu fais entrer dans le Feu - Tu l'as déshonoré, et il n'y a pas de secoureur pour les injustes. ( 193 ) Notre Seigneur, en effet, nous avons entendu un appel à la foi, [disant] : "Crois en ton Seigneur", et nous avons cru. Notre Seigneur, pardonne-nous donc nos péchés et éloigne de nous nos méfaits et fais-nous mourir avec les justes.( 194 ) Notre Seigneur, et accorde-nous ce que Tu nous as promis par Tes messagers et ne nous déshonore pas le Jour de la Résurrection. En effet, Tu ne manques pas à [Ta] promesse.( 195 ) Et leur Seigneur leur répondit : Jamais Je ne permettrai que soit perdue l'œuvre de [aucun] ouvrier parmi vous, qu'il soit homme ou femme ; vous êtes les uns des autres. Ainsi donc, ceux qui ont émigré ou ont été expulsés de leurs maisons ou qui ont été blessés dans Ma cause ou qui ont combattu ou ont été tués, j'effacerai d'eux leurs méfaits et je les ferai certainement entrer dans des jardins sous lesquels coulent des rivières en récompense d'Allah. Et Allah a avec Lui la meilleure récompense. Alors leur [dernier] refuge sera l'Enfer, et misérable est le lieu de repos. (198) Mais ceux qui craignent leur Seigneur auront des jardins sous lesquels coulent les rivières, et y demeureront éternellement, comme refuge auprès d'Allah. Et ce qui est auprès d'Allah est le meilleur pour les pieux. (199) Et parmi les gens du Livre, il y a ceux qui croient en Allah, à ce qui vous a été révélé et à ce qui leur a été révélé, et qui se soumettent humblement à Allah. Ils n'échangent pas les versets d'Allah contre un petit prix. Ceux-là auront leur récompense auprès de leur Seigneur. Certes, Allah est prompt à rendre compte. (200) Ô vous qui avez cru, persévérez et endurez, restez stationnés et craignez Allah afin que vous réussissiez.
duas.phonetic: ﴿ iina fiy khalqi alsamawaati waalaardi waakhtilaafi allayli waalnahaari laaayaatin lauwliy alalbaabi * aladhiyna yadhkuruwna allaha qiyaamaan waqu'uwdaan wa'alaaa junuwbihim wayatafakaruwna fiy khalqi alsamawaati waalaardi rabanaa maa khalaqta hadha baatilaan subhaanaka faqinaa 'adhaaba alnaari* rabanaa iinaka man tudkhili alnaara faqad aakhzaytahu wamaa lildhaalimiyna min aansaarin* rabanaa iinanaa sami'naa munaadiyaan yunaadiy liliiymaani aan aaminuwa birabikum faaamanaa rabanaa faaghfir lanaa dhunuwbanaa wakafir 'anaa sayiaatinaa watawafanaa ma'a alabraari* rabanaa waaatinaa maa wa'adtanaa 'alaa rusulika walaa tukhzinaa yawma alqiyaamahi iinaka laa tukhlifu almiy'aada* faastajaaba lahum rabuhum aaniy laa audiy'u 'amala 'aamilin minkum min dhakarin aaw aunthaa ba'dukum min ba'din faaladhiyna haajaruwa waaukhrijuwa min diyaarihim waauwdhuwa fiy sabiyliy waqaataluwa waqutiluwa laukafirana 'anhum sayiaatihim walaudkhilanahum janaatin tajriy min tahtihaa alaanhaaru thawaabaan min 'indi allahi waallahu 'indahu husnu althawaabi * laa yaghuranaka taqalubu aladhiyna kafaruwa fiy albilaadi * mataa'un qaliylun thuma maawaahum jahanamu wabisa almihaadu * lakini aladhiyna ataqawa rabahum lahum janaatun tajriy min tahtihaa alaanhaaru khaalidiyna fiyhaa nuzulaan min 'indi allahi wamaa 'inda allahi khayrun lilaabraari * waiina min aahli alkitaabi laman yuminu biallahi wamaa aunzila iilaykum wamaaa aunzila iilayhim khaashi'iyna lilahi laa yashtaruwna biaayaati allahi thamanaan qaliylaan auwlaika lahum aajruhum 'inda rabihim iina allaha sariy'u alhisaabi*yaa aayuhaa aladhiyna aamanuwa asbiruwa wasaabiruwa waraabituwa waataquwa allaha la'alakum tuflihuwna ﴾

title_en: Invocation for entering the restroom

duas.arabic: ([بِسْمِ اللَّهِ] اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبْثِ وَالْخَبائِث).
duas.translation_en: ((In the name of Allah).  O Allah, I take refuge with you from all evil and evil-doers.)
duas.reference: ((Bismil-lah) allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-khubthi wal-khaba-ith.)
duas.translation_fr: ((Au nom d'Allah). Ô Allah, je prends refuge auprès de toi contre tous les méchants et les malfaiteurs.)
duas.phonetic: Bismil-lah) allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-khubthi wal-khaba-ith.

title_en: Invocation for leaving the restroom

duas.arabic: (غُفْرَانَكَ).
duas.translation_en: (I ask You (Allah) for forgiveness.)
duas.reference: (Ghufranak.)
duas.translation_fr: (Je Te demande (Allah) pardon.)
duas.phonetic: Ghufranak.

title_en: What to say before performing ablution

duas.arabic: (بِسْمِ اللَّهِ).
duas.translation_en: (In the name of Allah.)
duas.reference: (Bismil-lah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Au nom d'Allah.)
duas.phonetic: Bismil-lah.

title_en: What to say upon completing ablution

duas.arabic: (أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ..).
duas.translation_en: (I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone without partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and Messenger.)
duas.reference: (Ashhadu an la ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, wa-ashhadu anna Muhammadan AAabduhu warasooluh.)
duas.translation_fr: (J'atteste que nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Allah, seul sans associé, et j'atteste que Mohammed est Son esclave et Son Messager.)
duas.phonetic: Ashhadu an la ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, wa-ashhadu anna Muhammadan AAabduhu warasooluh.

duas.arabic: (اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي مِنَ التَّوَّابِينَ وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنَ الْمُتَطَهِّرِينَ)
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, make me of those who return to You often in repentance and make me of those who remain clean and pure.)
duas.reference: (Allahummaj-AAalnee minat-tawwabeena wajAAalnee minal-mutatahhireen.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, fais de moi ceux qui reviennent souvent vers Toi avec repentance et fais de moi ceux qui restent purs et purs.)
duas.phonetic: Allahummaj-AAalnee minat-tawwabeena wajAAalnee minal-mutatahhireen.

duas.arabic: (سُبْحانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتوبُ إِلَيْكَ).
duas.translation_en: (How perfect You are O Allah, and I praise You, I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except You, I seek Your forgiveness and turn in repentance to You.)
duas.reference: (Subhanakal-lahumma wabihamdika ashhadu an la ilaha illa anta astaghfiruka wa-atoobu ilayk.)
duas.translation_fr: (Comme Tu es parfait ô Allah, et je Te loue, j'atteste que personne n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Toi, je demande Ton pardon et me tourne vers Toi dans la repentance.)
duas.phonetic: Subhanakal-lahumma wabihamdika ashhadu an la ilaha illa anta astaghfiruka wa-atoobu ilayk.

title_en: What to say when leaving the home

duas.arabic: (بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، وَلَاَ حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ).
duas.translation_en: (In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.)
duas.reference: (Bismil-lah, tawakkaltu AAalal-lah, wala hawla wala quwwata illa billah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Au nom d'Allah, je place ma confiance en Allah, et il n'y a de force ni de pouvoir qu'en Allah.)
duas.phonetic: Bismil-lah, tawakkaltu AAalal-lah, wala hawla wala quwwata illa billah.

duas.arabic: (اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَضِلَّ، أَوْ أُضَلَّ، أَوْ أَزِلَّ، أَوْ أُزَلَّ، أَوْ أَظْلِمَ، أَوْ أُظْلَمَ، أَوْ أَجْهَلَ، أَوْ يُجْهَلَ عَلَيَّ).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I take refuge with You lest I should stray or be led astray, or slip or be tripped, or oppress or be oppressed, or behave foolishly or be treated foolishly.)(slip: i.e. to commit a sin unintentionally)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika an adilla aw odal, aw azilla aw ozall, aw athlima aw othlam, aw ajhala aw yujhala AAalay.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je prends refuge auprès de Toi de peur de m'égarer ou d'être égaré, ou de glisser ou de trébucher, ou d'opprimer ou d'être opprimé, ou de me comporter de manière insensée ou d'être traité de manière insensée.)(glisser : c'est-à-dire commettre un péché involontairement)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika an adilla aw odal, aw azilla aw ozall, aw athlima aw othlam, aw ajhala aw yujhala AAalay.

title_fr: Invocation en sortant de la maison

title_en: What to say when entering the home

duas.arabic: (بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا، ثُمَّ لِيُسَلِّمْ عَلَى أَهْلِهِ).
duas.translation_en: (In the name of Allah we enter and in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we place our trust.)
duas.reference: (Bismil-lahi walajna, wabismil-lahi kharajna, waAAala rabbina tawakkalna.)
duas.translation_fr: (Au nom d'Allah nous entrons et au nom d'Allah nous partons, et nous plaçons notre confiance en notre Seigneur.)
duas.phonetic: Bismil-lahi walajna, wabismil-lahi kharajna, waAAala rabbina tawakkalna.

title_fr: Invocation en entrant a la maison

title_en: Invocation for going to the mosque

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ اجْعَـلْ فِي قَلْبـي نُوراً ، وَفي لِسَـانِي نُوراً، وَفِي سَمْعِي نُوراً, وَفِي بَصَرِيِ نُوراً, وَمِنْ فََوْقِي نُوراً , وَ مِنْ تَحْتِي نُوراً, وَ عَنْ يَمِينيِ نُوراَ, وعَنْ شِمَالِي نُوراً, وَمْن أَماَمِي نُوراً, وَمِنْ خَلْفيِ نُوراَ, واجْعَلْ فِي نَفْسِي نُوراً, وأَعْظِمْ لِي نُوراً, وَعظِّمْ لِي نُوراً, وَاجْعَلْ لِي نُوراً, واجْعَلنِي نُوراً, أللَّهُمَّ أَعْطِنِي نُوراً, واجْعَلْ فِي عَصَبِي نُوراً, وَفِي لَحْمِي نُوراً, وَفِي دَمِي نُوراً وَفِي شَعْرِي نُوراً, وفِي بَشَرِي نُوراً (أَللَّهُمَّ اجِعَلْ لِي نُوراً فِي قّبْرِي وَ نُوراَ فِي عِظاَمِي) (وَزِدْنِي نُوراً, وَزِدْنِي نُوراَ , وَزِدْنِي نُوراً) (وَهَبْ لِي نُوراً عَلَى نُوراً )
duas.translation_en: (‘O Allaah, place within my heart light; and upon my tongue light; and within my ears light; and within my eyes light; and place above me light; and beneath me light; and on my right light; and on my left light; and in front of me light; and behind me light; and place light within my soul; and augment light for me; and greaten light for me; and grant me light and make me light. O Allaah, bestow upon me light; and place light in my tendons; and light in my flesh; and light in my blood; and in light in my hair and light in my skin.’ [O Allaah, place light for me in my grave and light in my bones]. [And increase me with light and increase me with light and increase me with light]. [And grant me light upon light.]’)
duas.reference: Allaahummaj 'al fee qalbee nooran, wa fee lisaanee nooran, wa fee sam'ee nooran, wa fee basaree nooran, wa min fawqee nooran, wa min tahtee nooran, wa 'an yameenee nooran, wa 'an shimaalee nooran, wa min 'amaamee nooran, wa min khalfee nooran. Wa j'al fee nafsee nooran, wa 'a'dhim lee nooran, wa 'a'dhim lee nooran. Waj'al lee nooran, waj'alnee nooran. Allaahumma a'tineje nooran, waj'al fee 'asabee nooran, wa fee lahmee nooran, wa fee damee nooran, wa fee sha'ree nooran, wa fee basharee nooran.[Allaahummaj'al lee nooran fee qabree, wa nooran fee 'idhaamee.][Wa zidnee nooran, wa zidnee nooran, wa zidnee nooran.][Wa hab lee nooran 'alaa noor.]
duas.translation_fr: (« Ô Allah, place la lumière dans mon cœur, et sur ma langue la lumière, et dans mes oreilles la lumière, et dans mes yeux la lumière ; et place la lumière au-dessus de moi ; et au-dessous de moi la lumière ; et à ma droite la lumière ; et à ma gauche la lumière ; et devant moi la lumière ; et derrière moi la lumière ; et place la lumière dans mon âme ; ma chair ; et de la lumière dans mon sang ; et de la lumière dans mes cheveux et de la lumière dans ma peau. » [Ô Allah, place pour moi de la lumière dans ma tombe et de la lumière dans mes os.] [Et augmente-moi de lumière et augmente-moi de lumière et augmente-moi de lumière.]
duas.phonetic: allhuma aj'al fiy qalby nuwraan wafy lisaaniy nuwraan wafiy sam'iy nuwraan, wafiy basariyi nuwraan, wamin faawqiy nuwraan , wa min tahtiy nuwraan, wa 'an yamiynyi nuwraa, w'an shimaaliy nuwraan, wamn aamaamiy nuwraan, wamin khalfyi nuwraa, waj'al fiy nafsiy nuwraan, waa'dhim liy nuwraan, wa'dhim liy nuwraan, waaj'al liy nuwraan, waj'alniy nuwraan, allahuma aa'tiniy nuwraan, waj'al fiy 'asabiy nuwraan, wafiy lahmiy nuwraan, wafiy damiy nuwraan wafiy sha'riy nuwraan, wfiy bashariy nuwraan (aallahuma aji'al liy nuwraan fiy qbriy wa nuwraa fiy 'idhaamiy) (wazidniy nuwraan, wazidniy nuwraa , wazidniy nuwraan) (wahab liy nuwraan 'alaa nuwraan )

title_fr: Invocation en allant a la mosquee

title_en: Invocation for entering the mosque

duas.arabic: (يَبْدَأُ بِرِجْلِهِ الْيُمْنَى) ، وَيَقُولُ: ((أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ العَظِيمِ، وَبِوَجْهِهِ الْكَرِيمِ، وَسُلْطَانِهِ الْقَدِيمِ، مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ))  [بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، وَالصَّلَاةُ] [وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ]  ((اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ)).
duas.translation_en: (I take refuge with Allah, The Supreme and with His Noble Face, and His eternal authority from the accursed devil. In the name of Allah, and prayers and peace be upon the Messenger of Allah.  O Allah, open the gates of Your mercy for me.)
duas.reference: (aAAoothu billahil-AAatheem wabiwajhihil-kareem wasultanihil-qadeem minash-shaytanir-rajeem, [bismil-lah, wassalatu] [wassalamu AAala rasoolil-lah] , allahumma iftah lee abwaba rahmatik.)
duas.translation_fr: (Je me réfugie auprès d'Allah, Le Suprême et auprès de Sa Noble Face, et de Son autorité éternelle contre le diable maudit. Au nom d'Allah, et que les prières et la paix soient sur le Messager d'Allah. Ô Allah, ouvre-moi les portes de Ta miséricorde.)
duas.phonetic: aAAoothu billahil-AAatheem wabiwajhihil-kareem wasultanihil-qadeem minash-shaytanir-rajeem, [bismil-lah, wassalatu] [wassalamu AAala rasoolil-lah] , allahumma iftah lee abwaba rahmatik.

title_fr: Invocation pour entrer a la mosquee

title_en: Invocation for leaving the mosque

duas.arabic: ((يَبْدَأُ بِرِجْلِهِ الْيُسْرَى))  وَيَقُولُ: ((بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَالصّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِك، اللَّهُمَّ اعْصِمْنِي مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ)).
duas.translation_en: (In the name of Allah, and prayers and peace be upon the Messenger of Allah.  O Allah, I ask You from Your favour.  O Allah, guard me from the accursed devil.)
duas.reference: (Bismil-lah wassalatu wassalamu AAala rasoolil-lah, allahumma innee as-aluka min fadlik, allahumma iAAsimnee minash-shaytanir-rajeem.)
duas.translation_fr: (Au nom d'Allah, et que la prière et la paix soient sur le Messager d'Allah. Ô Allah, je Te demande ta faveur. Ô Allah, garde-moi du diable maudit.)
duas.phonetic: Bismil-lah wassalatu wassalamu AAala rasoolil-lah, allahumma innee as-aluka min fadlik, allahumma iAAsimnee minash-shaytanir-rajeem.

title_fr: Invocation pour sortir de la mosquee

title_en: What to say upon hearing the Athan (call to prayer)

duas.arabic: يَقُولُ مِثْلَ مَا يَقُولُ المُؤَذِّنُ إِلاَّ فِي ((حَيَّ عَلَى الصَّلَاةِ وَحَيَّ عَلَى الْفَلَاحِ)) فَيقُولُ: ((لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ)).
duas.translation_en: ‘One repeats just as the mu-aththin (one who calls to prayer) says, except when he says: Hayya AAalas-salah (or) hayya AAalal-falah ‘come to prayer, come to success’ instead, one should say: La hawla wala quwwata illa billah. ‘There is no might nor power except with Allah.’
duas.translation_fr: « On répète exactement ce que dit le mu-aththin (celui qui appelle à la prière), sauf quand il dit : Hayya AAalas-salah (ou) hayya AAalal-falah « viens à la prière, viens au succès ». Au lieu de cela, il faut dire : La hawla wala quwwata illa billah. « Il n’y a de puissance ni de puissance qu’en Allah. »
duas.phonetic: yaquwlu mithla maa yaquwlu almuadhinu iilaa fiy ((haya 'alaa alsalaahi wahaya 'alaa alfalaahi)) fayquwlu: ((laa hawla walaa quwaha iilaa biallahi)).

duas.arabic: يَقُولُ: ((وَأَنَا أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ، رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبَّاً، وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ رَسُولاً، وَبِالْإِسْلاَمِ دِينَاً)) ((يَقُولُ ذَلِكَ عَقِبَ تَشَهُّدِ الْمُؤَذِّنِ)).
duas.translation_en: Immediately following the declaration of faith called by the mu-aththin, one says:‘And I too bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, and that Muhammad is His salve and Messenger.  I am pleased with Allah as a Lord, and Muhammad as a Messenger and Islam as a religion.’
duas.reference: Immediately following the declaration of faith called by the mu-aththin, one says:Wa-ana ashhadu an la ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, wa-anna Muhammadan AAabduhu warasooluh, radeetu billahi rabban wabimuhammadin rasoolan wabil-islami deena.
duas.translation_fr: Immédiatement après la déclaration de foi invoquée par le mu-aththin, on dit : « Et moi aussi, je témoigne que nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Allah, seul, sans associé, et que Mahomet est Son salve et Son Messager.  Je suis satisfait d’Allah comme Seigneur, de Muhammad comme Messager et de l’Islam comme religion.’
duas.phonetic: yaquwlu: ((waaanaa aashhadu aan laa iilaha iilaa allahu wahdahu laa shariyka lahu waaana muhamadaan 'abduhu warasuwluhu radiytu biallahi rabaaan wabimuhamadin rasuwlaan wabialiislaami diynaaan)) ((yaquwlu dhalika 'aqiba tashahudi almuadhini)).

duas.arabic: ((يُصَلِّي عَلَى النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بَعْدَ فَرَاغِهِ مِنْ إِجَابَةِ الْمُؤَذِّنِ)).
duas.translation_en: ‘One should then send prayers on the Prophet (sal-Allaahu 'alayhe wa sallam) after answering the call of the mu.adhdhin’.
duas.translation_fr: « Il faut ensuite envoyer des prières sur le Prophète (sal-Allahu 'alayhe wa sallam) après avoir répondu à l'appel du mu.adhdhin ».
duas.phonetic: ((yusaliy 'alaa alnabiyi sla allh 'lyh wslm ba'da faraaghihi min iijaabahi almuadhini)).

duas.arabic: يَقُولُ: ((اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ، وَالصَّلاَةِ الْقَائِمَةِ، آتِ مُحَمَّداً الْوَسِيلَةَ وَالْفَضِيلَةَ، وَابْعَثْهُ مَقَامَاً مَحمُوداً الَّذِي وَعَدْتَهُ، [إِنَّكَ لَا تُخْلِفُ الْمِيعَادَ])).
duas.translation_en: ‘O Allah, Owner of this perfect call and Owner of this prayer to be performed, bestow upon Muhammad al-waseelah and al-fadeelah and send him upon a praised platform which You have promised him.  Verily, You never fail in Your promise.’al-waseelah: A station in paradise.al-fadeelah: A rank above the rest of creation.praised platform: One in which all of creation will praise him on, in order to bring about the account quickly and be relieved from the lengthy standing or the role of intercession.
duas.reference: Allahumma rabba hathihid-daAAwatit-tammah, wassalatil-qa-imah ati Muhammadan alwaseelata wal-fadeelah, wabAAath-hu maqaman mahmoodan allathee waAAadtah, innaka la tukhliful-meeAAad.
duas.translation_fr: «Ô Allah, propriétaire de cet appel parfait et propriétaire de cette prière à accomplir, accorde-le à Muhammad al-waseelah et al-fadeelah et envoie-le sur une plate-forme louée que tu lui as promise.»  En vérité, tu ne manques jamais à ta promesse.'al-waseelah : Une station au paradis.al-fadeelah : Un rang au-dessus du reste de la création.plate-forme louée : Une sur laquelle toute la création le louera, afin de réaliser rapidement le compte et d'être soulagé de sa longue position ou du rôle d'intercession.
duas.phonetic: yaquwlu: ((allahuma raba hadhihi alda'wahi altaamahi waalsalaahi alqaaimahi aati muhamadaan alwasiylaha waalfadiylaha waab'athhu maqaamaaan mahmuwdaan aladhiy wa'adtahu [iinaka laa tukhlifu almiy'aada])).

duas.arabic: ((يَدْعُو لِنَفسِهِ بَيْنَ الْأَذَانِ وَالْإِقَامَةِ فَإِنَّ الدُّعَاءَ حِينَئِذٍ لاَ يُرَدُّ)).
duas.translation_en: One should also supplicate for himself during the time between the athan and the iqamah as supplication at such time is not rejected.
duas.translation_fr: Il faut également invoquer pour soi-même pendant le temps entre l'athan et l'iqamah, car la supplication à ce moment-là n'est pas rejetée.
duas.phonetic: ((yad'uw linafsihi bayna alaadhaani waaliiqaamahi faiina aldu'aa'a hiynaidhin laa yuradu)).

title_en: Invocation when getting dressed

duas.arabic: (الْحَمْدُ للَّهِ الَّذِي كَسَانِي هَذَا (الثَّوْبَ) وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلاَ قُوَّة...)
