duas.translation_en: (All Praise is for Allah who has clothed me with this garment and provided it for me, with no power nor might from myself.)
duas.reference: (Alhamdu lillahil-lathee kasanee hatha (aththawb) warazaqaneehi min ghayri hawlin minnee wala quwwah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Toute louange est à Allah qui m'a revêtu de ce vêtement et me l'a fourni, sans pouvoir ni puissance de ma part.)
duas.phonetic: Alhamdu lillahil-lathee kasanee hatha (aththawb) warazaqaneehi min ghayri hawlin minnee wala quwwah.

title_en: Invocation when putting on new clothes

duas.arabic: ( اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ كَسَوْتَنِيهِ، أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِهِ وَخَيْرِ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهِ وَشَرِّ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, for You is all praise, You have clothed me with it (i.e. the garment), I ask You for the good of it and the good for which it was made, and I seek refuge with You from the evil of it and the evil for which it was made.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma lakal-hamdu anta kasawtaneeh, as-aluka min khayrihi wakhayri ma suniAAa lah, wa-aAAoothu bika min sharrihi washarri ma suniAAa lah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, car Toi est toute louange, Tu m'en as revêtu (c'est-à-dire le vêtement), je Te demande le bien et le bien pour lequel il a été fait, et je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le mal et le mal pour lequel il a été fait.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma lakal-hamdu anta kasawtaneeh, as-aluka min khayrihi wakhayri ma suniAAa lah, wa-aAAoothu bika min sharrihi washarri ma suniAAa lah.

title_fr: Invocation en portant un vetement neuf

title_en: Invocations for someone who has put on new clothes

duas.arabic: (تُبْلِي وَيُخْلِفُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى)
duas.translation_en: (May you wear it out and Allah تعالى replace it (with another).’ The intended meaning: A supplication for long life.)
duas.reference: (Tublee wayukhliful-lahu taAAala.)
duas.translation_fr: (Puissiez-vous l'user et Allah تعالى le remplacer (par un autre).' Le sens voulu : Une supplication pour une longue vie.)
duas.phonetic: Tublee wayukhliful-lahu taAAala.

duas.arabic: (اِلْبَسْ جَدِيداً وَعِشْ حَمِيداً وَمُتْ شَهِيداً).
duas.translation_en: (Wear anew, live commendably and die a shaheed.)(shaheed:One who dies fighting the kuffar in order to make the word of Allah superior or in defense of Islam.  It also has other meanings found in the Sunnah such as: the one who dies defending his life, wealth or family; the woman who passes away due to childbirth; one who drowns…etc.)
duas.reference: (Ilbas jadeedan waAAish hameedan wamut shaheedan.)
duas.translation_fr: (Portez-vous à nouveau, vivez de manière louable et mourez en shahid.)(shaheed : Celui qui meurt en combattant les mécréants afin de rendre la parole d'Allah supérieure ou pour défendre l'Islam. Il a également d'autres significations trouvées dans la Sunna telles que : celui qui meurt en défendant sa vie, sa richesse ou sa famille ; la femme qui décède à cause de l'accouchement ; celui qui se noie… etc.)
duas.phonetic: Ilbas jadeedan waAAish hameedan wamut shaheedan.

title_en: What to say when undressing

duas.arabic: (بِسْمِ اللَّهِ).
duas.translation_en: (In the name of Allah.)
duas.reference: (Bismil-lah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Au nom d'Allah.)
duas.phonetic: Bismil-lah.

title_en: Invocations for the beginning of the prayer

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ بَاعِدْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ خَطَايَايَ كَمَا بَاعَدْتَ بَيْنَ الْمَشْرِقِ وَالْمَغْرِبِ، اللَّهُمَّ نَقِّنِي مِنْ خَطَايَايَ كَمَا يُنَقَّى الثَّوْبُ الْأَبْيَضُ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ، اللَّهُمَّ اغْسِلْني مِنْ خَطَايَايَ، بِالثَّلْجِ وَالْماءِ وَالْبَرَدِ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, distance me from my sins just as You have distanced The East from The West, O Allah, purify me of my sins as a white robe is purified of filth, O Allah, cleanse me of my sins with snow, water, and ice.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma baAAid baynee wabayna khatayaya kama baAAadta baynal-mashriqi walmaghrib, allahumma naqqinee min khatayaya kama yunaqqath-thawbul-abyadu minad-danas, allahummagh-silnee min khatayaya biththalji walma/i walbarad.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, éloigne-moi de mes péchés tout comme Tu as éloigné l'Orient de l'Occident, Ô Allah, purifie-moi de mes péchés comme une robe blanche est purifiée de la saleté, Ô Allah, purifie-moi de mes péchés avec de la neige, de l'eau et de la glace.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma baAAid baynee wabayna khatayaya kama baAAadta baynal-mashriqi walmaghrib, allahumma naqqinee min khatayaya kama yunaqqath-thawbul-abyadu minad-danas, allahummagh-silnee min khatayaya biththalji walma/i walbarad.

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ، وَتَبارَكَ اسْمُكَ، وَتَعَالَى جَدُّكَ، وَلاَ إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ)).
duas.translation_en: (How perfect You are O Allah, and I praise You.  Blessed be Your name, and lofty is Your position and none has the right to be worshipped except You.)
duas.reference: (Subhanakal-lahumma wabihamdika watabarakas-muka wataAAala jadduka wala ilaha ghayruk.)
duas.translation_fr: (Comme tu es parfait, ô Allah, et je te loue. Béni soit ton nom, et ta position est élevée et nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf toi.)
duas.phonetic: Subhanakal-lahumma wabihamdika watabarakas-muka wataAAala jadduka wala ilaha ghayruk.

duas.arabic: ((وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي فَطَرَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضَ حَنِيفَاً وَمَا أَنَا مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ، إِنَّ صَلاَتِي، وَنُسُكِي، وَمَحْيَايَ، وَمَمَاتِي لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ، لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَبِذَلِكَ أُمِرْتُ وَأَنَا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ. اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ المَلِكُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، أَنْتَ رَبِّي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي وَاعْتَرَفْتُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي ذُنُوبي جَمِيعَاً إِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنوبَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ. وَاهْدِنِي لِأَحْسَنِ الأَخْلاقِ لاَ يَهْدِي لِأَحْسَنِها إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، وَاصْرِفْ عَنِّي سَيِّئَهَا، لاَ يَصْرِفُ عَنِّي سَيِّئَهَا إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، لَبَّيْكَ وَسَعْدَيْكَ، وَالخَيْرُ كُلُّهُ بِيَـــــــدَيْكَ، وَالشَّـــــرُّ لَيْسَ إِلَيْــــــكَ، أَنَا بِكَ وَإِلَيْكَ، تَبارَكْتَ وَتَعَالَيْتَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتوبُ إِلَيْكَ)).
duas.translation_en: (I have turned my face sincerely towards He who has brought forth the heavens and the Earth and I am not of those who associate (others with Allah).  Indeed my prayer, my sacrifice, my life and my death are for Allah, Lord of the worlds, no partner has He, with this I am commanded and I am of the Muslims. O Allah, You are the Sovereign, none has the right to be worshipped except You.  You are my Lord and I am Your servant, I have wronged my own soul and have acknowledged my sin, so forgive me all my sins for no one forgives sins except You.  Guide me to the best of characters for none can guide to it other than You, and deliver me from the worst of characters for none can deliver me from it other than You.  Here I am, in answer to Your call, happy to serve you.  All good is within Your hands and evil does not stem from You.  I exist by your will and will return to you.  Blessed and High are You, I seek Your forgiveness and repent unto You.)(Allah does not create pure evil which does not have any good or contain any benefit, wisdom or mercy at all, nor does He punish anyone without having commited a sin. Something can be good in terms of its creation when viewed in a particular  perspective and at the same time be evil when viewed in another way. Allah created the devil and by him, He tests His servants, so there are those who hate the devil, fight him and his way and they stand at enmity towards him and his followers and there are others who are at allegiance with the devil and follow his steps. So evil exists in His creatures by His will and wisdom, not in His actions or act of creating.)
duas.reference: (Wajjahtu wajhiya lillathee fataras-samawati wal-arda haneefan wama ana minal-mushrikeen, inna salatee wanusukee wamahyaya wamamatee lillahi rabbil-AAalameen, la shareeka lahu wabithalika omirtu wa-ana minal-muslimeen. Allahumma antal-maliku la ilaha illa ant. anta rabbee wa-ana AAabduk, thalamtu nafsee waAAtaraftu bithanbee faghfir lee thunoobee jameeAAan innahu la yaghfiruth-thunooba illa ant.wahdinee li-ahsanil-akhlaqi la yahdee li-ahsaniha illa ant, wasrif AAannee sayyi-aha la yasrifu AAannee sayyi-aha illa ant, labbayka wasaAAdayk,walkhayru kulluhu biyadayk, washsharru laysa ilayk, ana bika wa-ilayk, tabarakta wataAAalayt, astaghfiruka wa-atoobu ilayk.)
duas.translation_fr: (J'ai tourné mon visage sincèrement vers Celui qui a engendré les cieux et la terre et je ne suis pas de ceux qui associent (les autres à Allah). En effet, ma prière, mon sacrifice, ma vie et ma mort sont pour Allah, Seigneur des mondes, il n'a pas d'associé, avec cela je suis ordonné et je suis du nombre des musulmans. mon péché, alors pardonne-moi tous mes péchés car personne ne pardonne les péchés à part Toi. Guide-moi vers le meilleur des caractères car personne d'autre que Toi ne peut me guider vers cela, et délivre-moi du pire des caractères car personne ne peut m'en délivrer autre que Toi. Me voici, en réponse à Ton appel, heureux de te servir. (Allah le fait). Il ne crée pas de mal pur qui n'a aucun bien et ne contient aucun bénéfice, sagesse ou miséricorde, et Il ne punit personne sans avoir commis un péché. Quelque chose peut être bon en termes de sa création vu dans une perspective particulière et en même temps être mal vu d'une autre manière. et suivez ses traces. Ainsi, le mal existe dans ses créatures par sa volonté et sa sagesse, et non dans ses actions ou son acte de création.)
duas.phonetic: Wajjahtu wajhiya lillathee fataras-samawati wal-arda haneefan wama ana minal-mushrikeen, inna salatee wanusukee wamahyaya wamamatee lillahi rabbil-AAalameen, la shareeka lahu wabithalika omirtu wa-ana minal-muslimeen. Allahumma antal-maliku la ilaha illa ant. anta rabbee wa-ana AAabduk, thalamtu nafsee waAAtaraftu bithanbee faghfir lee thunoobee jameeAAan innahu la yaghfiruth-thunooba illa ant.wahdinee li-ahsanil-akhlaqi la yahdee li-ahsaniha illa ant, wasrif AAannee sayyi-aha la yasrifu AAannee sayyi-aha illa ant, labbayka wasaAAdayk,walkhayru kulluhu biyadayk, washsharru laysa ilayk, ana bika wa-ilayk, tabarakta wataAAalayt, astaghfiruka wa-atoobu ilayk.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ جِبْرَائِيلَ، وَمِيْكَائِيلَ، وَإِسْرَافِيلَ، فَاطِرَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ، عَالِمَ الغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ أَنْتَ تَحْكُمُ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ فِيمَا كَانُوا فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ. اهْدِنِي لِمَا اخْتُلِفَ فِيهِ مِنَ الْحَقِّ بِإِذْنِكَ إِنَّكَ تَهْدِي مَنْ تَشَاءُ إِلَى صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقيمٍ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, Lord of Jibra-eel, Meeka-eel and Israfeel (great angles), Creator of the heavens and the Earth, Knower of the seen and the unseen.  You are the arbitrator  between Your servants in that which they have disputed.  Guide me to the truth by Your leave, in that which they have differed, for verily You guide whom You will to a straight path.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma rabba jibra-eel, wameeka-eel, wa-israfeel fatiras-samawati walard, AAalimal-ghaybi washshahadah, anta tahkumu bayna AAibadika feema kanoo feehi yakhtalifoon. ihdinee limakh-tulifa feehi minal-haqqi bi-ithnik, innaka tahdee man tasha-o ila siratin mustaqeem.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, Seigneur de Jibra-eel, Meeka-eel et Israfeel (grands angles), Créateur des cieux et de la terre, Connaisseur du visible et de l'invisible. Tu es l'arbitre entre Tes serviteurs dans ce qu'ils ont contesté. Guide-moi vers la vérité par Ta permission, dans ce qu'ils ont divergé, car en vérité Tu guides qui Tu veux vers un chemin droit.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma rabba jibra-eel, wameeka-eel, wa-israfeel fatiras-samawati walard, AAalimal-ghaybi washshahadah, anta tahkumu bayna AAibadika feema kanoo feehi yakhtalifoon. ihdinee limakh-tulifa feehi minal-haqqi bi-ithnik, innaka tahdee man tasha-o ila siratin mustaqeem.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ كَبِيرَاً، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ كَبِيراً، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ كَبِيراً، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَثيراً، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَثيراً، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَثيراً، وَسُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلاً)) ثَلاثاً ((أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ: مِنْ نَفْخِهِ، وَنَفْثِهِ، وَهَمْزِهِ)).
duas.translation_en: (Allah is Most Great, Allah is Most Great, Allah is Most Great, much praise is for Allah, much praise is for Allah, much praise is for Allah, and I declare the perfection of Allah in the early morning and in the late afternoon.)(I take refuge with Allah from the devil, from his pride, his poetry and his madness.)
duas.reference: (Allahu akbaru kabeera, Allahu akbaru kabeera, Allahu akbaru kabeera, walhamdu lillahi katheera, walhamdu lillahi katheera, walhamdu lillahi katheera, wasubhanal-lahi bukratan wa-aseela.)(aAAoothu billahi minash-shaytani min nafkhihi wanafthihi wahamzih.)
duas.translation_fr: (Allah est le plus grand, Allah est le plus grand, Allah est le plus grand, beaucoup de louanges à Allah, beaucoup de louanges à Allah, beaucoup de louanges à Allah, et je déclare la perfection d'Allah tôt le matin et en fin d'après-midi.)(Je me réfugie auprès d'Allah contre le diable, contre son orgueil, sa poésie et sa folie.)
duas.phonetic: Allahu akbaru kabeera, Allahu akbaru kabeera, Allahu akbaru kabeera, walhamdu lillahi katheera, walhamdu lillahi katheera, walhamdu lillahi katheera, wasubhanal-lahi bukratan wa-aseela.)(aAAoothu billahi minash-shaytani min nafkhihi wanafthihi wahamzih.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ، أَنْتَ نُورُ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ وَمَنْ فِيهِنَّ، وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ قَيِّمُ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ وَمَنْ فِيهِنَّ، [وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ رَبُّ السَّمَواتِ وَالأَرْضِ وَمَنْ فِيهِنَّ] [وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ لَكَ مُلْكُ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ وَمَنْ فِيهِنَّ] [وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ مَلِكُ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ] [وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ] [أَنْتَ الْحَقُّ، وَوَعْدُكَ الْحَقُّ، وَقَوْلُكَ الْحَقُّ، وَلِقاؤُكَ الْحَقُّ، وَالْجَنَّةُ حَقٌّ، وَالنَّارُ حَقٌّ، وَالنَّبِيُّونَ حَقٌّ، وَمحَمَّدٌ صلى الله عليه وسلم حَقٌّ، وَالسّاعَةُ حَقٌّ] [اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ أَسْلَمتُ، وَعَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ، وَبِكَ آمَنْتُ، وَإِلَيْكَ أَنَبْتُ، وَبِكَ خاصَمْتُ، وَإِلَيْكَ حاكَمْتُ. فَاغْفِرْ لِي مَا قَدَّمْتُ، وَمَا أَخَّرْتُ، وَمَا أَسْرَرْتُ، وَمَا أَعْلَنْتُ] [وَمَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي] [أَنْتَ المُقَدِّمُ، وَأَنْتَ المُؤَخِّرُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ] [أَنْتَ إِلَهِي لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ] [وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ])).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, to You belongs all praise, You are the Light of the heavens and the Earth and all that is within them.  To You belongs all praise, You are the Sustainer of the heavens and the Earth and all that is within them.  To You belongs all praise.  You are Lord of the heavens and the Earth and all that is within them.  To You belongs all praise and the kingdom of the heavens and the Earth and all that is within them.  To You belongs all praise, You are the King of the heavens and the Earth and to You belongs all praise. You are The Truth, Your promise is true, your Word is true, and the Day in which we will encounter You is true, the Garden of Paradise is true and the Fire is true, and the Prophets are true, Muhammad  is true and the Final Hour is true.  O Allah, unto You I have submitted, and upon You I have relied, and in You I have believed, and to You I have turned in repentance, and over You I have disputed, and to You I have turned for judgment.  So forgive me for what has come to pass of my sins and what will come to pass, and what I have hidden and what I have made public.  You are Al-Muqaddim and Al-Mu-akhkhir. None has the right to be worshipped except You, You are my Deity, none has the right to be worshipped except You.)(Meaning of Al-Muqaddim and Al-Mu-akhkhir: Allah puts forward and favours whom He wills from amongst His creation just as He defers and holds back whom He wills in accordance to His wisdom.  E.g. Favouring man over the rest of creation, favouring the Prophets over the rest of mankind, favouring Muhammad  over all the Prophets and Messengers…etc.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma lakal-hamd anta noorus-samawati wal-ardi waman feehin, walakal-hamd, anta qayyimus-samawati walardi waman feehin, [walakal-hamd, anta rabbus-samawati walardi waman feehin], [walakal-hamd, laka mulkus-samawati walardi waman feehin] [walakal-hamd, anta malikus-samawati walard] [walakal-hamd] [antal-haq, wawaAAdukal-haq, waqawlukal-haq, waliqa-okal-haq, waljannatu haq wannaru haq, wannabiyyoona haq, wa Muhammadun  haq, wassaAAatu haq] [allahumma laka aslamt, waAAalayka tawakkalt, wabika amant, wa-ilayka anabt, wabika khasamt, wa-ilayka hakamt, faghfir lee ma qaddamt, wama akhkhart, wama asrart, wama aAAlant] [antal-muqaddim, wa-antal-mu-akhkhir, la ilaha illa ant] [anta ilahee la ilaha illa ant .)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, à Toi appartient toute louange, Tu es la Lumière des cieux et de la terre et de tout ce qui est en eux. A Toi appartient toute louange, Tu es le Soutien des cieux et de la terre et de tout ce qui est en eux. A Toi appartient toute louange. Tu es le Seigneur des cieux et de la terre et de tout ce qui est en eux. A Toi appartient toute louange et le royaume des cieux et de la terre et de tout ce qui est en eux. A Toi appartient toute louange, Tu es le Roi des cieux et de la terre. et à Toi appartient toute louange. Tu es la Vérité, Ta promesse est vraie, ta Parole est vraie, et le jour où nous te rencontrerons est vrai, le Jardin du Paradis est vrai et le Feu est vrai, et les Prophètes sont vrais, Muhammad est vrai et l'Heure Dernière est vraie. car ce qui est arrivé de mes péchés et ce qui arrivera, et ce que j'ai caché et ce que j'ai rendu public. Vous êtes Al-Muqaddim et Al-Mu-akhkhir nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Toi, Tu es ma Divinité, nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Toi.)(Signification d'Al-Muqaddim et Al-Mu-akhkhir : Allah met en avant et favorise qui Il veut parmi Sa création. tout comme Il diffère et retient qui Il veut conformément à Sa sagesse (par exemple, favorisant l'homme par rapport au reste de la création, favorisant les Prophètes par rapport au reste de l'humanité, favorisant Mahomet par rapport à tous les Prophètes et Messagers… etc.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma lakal-hamd anta noorus-samawati wal-ardi waman feehin, walakal-hamd, anta qayyimus-samawati walardi waman feehin, [walakal-hamd, anta rabbus-samawati walardi waman feehin], [walakal-hamd, laka mulkus-samawati walardi waman feehin] [walakal-hamd, anta malikus-samawati walard] [walakal-hamd] [antal-haq, wawaAAdukal-haq, waqawlukal-haq, waliqa-okal-haq, waljannatu haq wannaru haq, wannabiyyoona haq, wa Muhammadun  haq, wassaAAatu haq] [allahumma laka aslamt, waAAalayka tawakkalt, wabika amant, wa-ilayka anabt, wabika khasamt, wa-ilayka hakamt, faghfir lee ma qaddamt, wama akhkhart, wama asrart, wama aAAlant] [antal-muqaddim, wa-antal-mu-akhkhir, la ilaha illa ant] [anta ilahee la ilaha illa ant .

title_fr: Invocations pour d'ouverture de la priere

title_en: Invocations during Ruki' (bowing in prayer)

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحانَ رَبِّيَ الْعَظِيمِ)). ثلاث مرَّاتٍ.
duas.translation_en: (How perfect my Lord is, The Supreme.’(three times))
duas.reference: (Subhana rabbiyal-AAatheem (three times))
duas.translation_fr: (Comme mon Seigneur est parfait, Le Suprême.’(trois fois))
duas.phonetic: Subhana rabbiyal-AAatheem (three times

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا وَبِحَمْدِكَ، اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي)).
duas.translation_en: (How perfect You are O Allah, our Lord and I praise You.  O Allah, forgive me.)
duas.reference: (Subhanakal-lahumma rabbana wabihamdik, allahummagh-fir lee)
duas.translation_fr: (Comme tu es parfait, ô Allah, notre Seigneur et je te loue. Ô Allah, pardonne-moi.)
duas.phonetic: Subhanakal-lahumma rabbana wabihamdik, allahummagh-fir lee

duas.arabic: ((سُبُّوُحٌ، قُدُّوسٌ، رَبُّ المَلاَئِكَةِ وَالرُّوحِ)).
duas.translation_en: (Perfect and Holy (He is), Lord of the angles and the Rooh (i.e. Jibra-eel).)
duas.reference: (Subboohun quddoos, rabbul-mala-ikati warrooh.)
duas.translation_fr: (Parfait et Saint (Il est), Seigneur des angles et du Rooh (c'est-à-dire Jibra-eel).)
duas.phonetic: Subboohun quddoos, rabbul-mala-ikati warrooh.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ رَكَعْتُ، وَبِكَ آمَنْتُ، وَلَكَ أَسْلَمْتُ، خَشَعَ لَكَ سَمْعِي، وَبَصَرِي، وَمُخِّي، وَعَــــظْمِي، وَعَصَبِي، [وَمَا استَقَلَّتْ بِهِ قَدَمِي])).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, unto You I have bowed, and in You I have believed, and to You I have submitted. My hearing, sight, mind, bones, tendons and what my feet carry are humbled before You.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma laka rakaAAt, wabika amant, walaka aslamt, khashaAAa laka samAAee, wabasaree, wamukhkhee, waAAathmee, waAAasabee, wamas-taqalla bihi qadamee.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, devant Toi je me suis incliné, et en Toi j'ai cru, et à Toi je me suis soumis. Mon ouïe, ma vue, mon esprit, mes os, mes tendons et ce que portent mes pieds sont humiliés devant Toi.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma laka rakaAAt, wabika amant, walaka aslamt, khashaAAa laka samAAee, wabasaree, wamukhkhee, waAAathmee, waAAasabee, wamas-taqalla bihi qadamee.

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَ ذِي الْجَبَرُوتِ، وَالْمَلَكُوتِ، وَالْكِبْرِيَاءِ، وَالْعَظَمَةِ)).
duas.translation_en: (How perfect He is, The Possessor of total power, sovereignty, magnificence and grandeur.)
duas.reference: (Subhana thil-jabaroot, walmalakoot, walkibriya/, walAAathamah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Comme il est parfait, le détenteur du pouvoir total, de la souveraineté, de la magnificence et de la grandeur.)
duas.phonetic: Subhana thil-jabaroot, walmalakoot, walkibriya/, walAAathamah.

title_en: Invocations for rising from the Ruki'

duas.arabic: ((سَمِعَ اللَّهُ لِمَنْ حَمِدَهُ)).
duas.translation_en: (May Allah answer he who praises Him.)(This supplication is to be made while rising.)
duas.reference: (SamiAAal-lahu liman hamidah)
duas.translation_fr: (Qu'Allah réponde à celui qui Le loue.)(Cette supplication doit être faite en se levant.)
duas.phonetic: SamiAAal-lahu liman hamidah

duas.arabic: ((رَبَّنَا وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ، حَمْداً كَثيراً طَيِّباً مُبارَكاً فِيهِ)).
duas.translation_en: (Our Lord, for You is all praise, an abundant beautiful blessed praise.)
duas.reference: (Rabbana walakal-hamdu hamdan katheeran tayyiban mubarakan feeh.)
duas.translation_fr: (Notre Seigneur, pour Toi toute louange, une abondante et belle louange bénie.)
duas.phonetic: Rabbana walakal-hamdu hamdan katheeran tayyiban mubarakan feeh.

duas.arabic: ((مِلْءَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَمِلْءَ الأَرْضِ، وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا، وَمِلْءَ مَا شِئْتَ مِنْ شَيءٍ بَعْدُ. أَهلَ الثَّناءِ وَالْمَجْدِ، أَحَقُّ مَا قَالَ الْعَبْدُ، وَكُلُّنَا لَكَ عَبْدٌ. اللَّهُمَّ لاَ مَانِعَ لِمَا أَعْطَيْتَ، وَلاَ مُعْطِيَ لِمَا مَنَعْتَ، وَلاَ يَنْفَعُ ذَا الجَدِّ مِنْكَ الجَدُّ)).
duas.translation_en: (The heavens and the Earth and all between them abound with Your praises, and all that You will abounds with Your praises. O Possessor of praise and majesty, the truest thing a slave has said (of You) and we are all Your slaves.  O Allah, none can prevent what You have willed to bestow and none can bestow what You have willed to prevent, and no wealth or majesty can benefit anyone, as from You is all wealth and majesty.)(This supplication is made optionally only in conjunction with the previous one.)
duas.reference: (Mil-as-samawati wamil-al-ard, wama baynahuma, wamil/a ma shi/ta min shay-in baAAd, ahlath-thana-i walmajd, ahaqqu ma qalal-AAabd, wakulluna laka AAabd. Allahumma la maniAAa lima aAAtayt, wala muAAtiya lima manaAAt, wala yanfaAAu thal-jaddi minkal-jad.)
duas.translation_fr: (Les cieux et la terre et tout ce qui les sépare regorgent de Tes louanges, et tout ce que Tu veux abonde de Tes louanges. Ô Possesseur de louange et de majesté, la chose la plus vraie qu'un esclave ait dit (de Toi) et nous sommes tous Tes esclaves. Ô Allah, personne ne peut empêcher ce que Tu as voulu accorder et personne ne peut accorder ce que Tu as voulu empêcher, et aucune richesse ni majesté ne peut profiter à qui que ce soit, car de Toi viennent toute richesse et toute majesté.) (Ceci la supplication n'est faite facultativement qu'en conjonction avec la précédente.)
duas.phonetic: Mil-as-samawati wamil-al-ard, wama baynahuma, wamil/a ma shi/ta min shay-in baAAd, ahlath-thana-i walmajd, ahaqqu ma qalal-AAabd, wakulluna laka AAabd. Allahumma la maniAAa lima aAAtayt, wala muAAtiya lima manaAAt, wala yanfaAAu thal-jaddi minkal-jad.

title_en: Invocations during Sujood

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الأَعْلَى)) ثلاث مرَّاتٍ.
duas.translation_en: (How perfect my Lord is, The Most High.’(three times))
duas.reference: (Subhana rabbiyal-aAAla. (three times)))
duas.translation_fr: (Comme mon Seigneur, le Très-Haut est parfait.’(trois fois))
duas.phonetic: Subhana rabbiyal-aAAla. (three times

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا وَبِحَمْدِكَ، اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي)).
duas.translation_en: (How perfect You are O Allah, our Lord, and I praise You. O Allah, forgive me.)
duas.reference: (Subhanakal-lahumma rabbana wabihamdik, allahummagh- fir lee.)
duas.translation_fr: (Comme tu es parfait, ô Allah, notre Seigneur, et je te loue. Ô Allah, pardonne-moi.)
duas.phonetic: Subhanakal-lahumma rabbana wabihamdik, allahummagh- fir lee.

duas.arabic: ((سُبوحٌ، قُدُّوسٌ، رَبُّ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَالرُّوحِ)).
duas.translation_en: (Perfect and Holy (He is), Lord of the angles and the Rooh (i.e. Jibra-eel).)
duas.reference: (Subbohoon quddos, rabbul-mala-ikati warrooh.)
duas.translation_fr: (Parfait et Saint (Il est), Seigneur des angles et du Rooh (c'est-à-dire Jibra-eel).)
duas.phonetic: Subbohoon quddos, rabbul-mala-ikati warrooh.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ سَجَدْتُ وَبِكَ آمَنْتُ، وَلَكَ أَسْلَمْتُ، سَجَدَ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي خَلَقَهُ، وَصَوَّرَهُ، وَشَقَّ سَمْعَهُ وَبَصَرَهُ، تَبَارَكَ اللَّهُ أَحْسنُ الْخَالِقينَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, unto You I have prostrated and in You I have believed, and unto You I have submitted. My face has prostrated before He Who created it and fashioned it, and brought forth its faculties of hearing and seeing. Blessed is Allah, the Best of creators.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma laka sajadt, wabika amant, walaka aslamt, sajada wajhee lillathee khalaqahu wasawwarahu washaqqa samAAahu wabasarahu, tabarakal-lahu ahsanul-khaliqeen.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, devant Toi je me suis prosterné et en Toi j'ai cru, et à Toi je me suis soumis. Mon visage s'est prosterné devant Celui qui l'a créé et façonné, et qui a fait naître ses facultés d'ouïe et de vue. Béni soit Allah, le Meilleur des créateurs.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma laka sajadt, wabika amant, walaka aslamt, sajada wajhee lillathee khalaqahu wasawwarahu washaqqa samAAahu wabasarahu, tabarakal-lahu ahsanul-khaliqeen.

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَ ذِي الْجَبَرُوتِ، وَالْمَلَكُوتِ، وَالْكِبْرِيَاءِ، وَالْعَظَمَةِ)).
duas.translation_en: (How perfect He is, The Possessor of total power, sovereignty, magnificence and grandeur.)
duas.reference: (Subhana thil-jabaroot, walmalakoot, walkibriya/, walAAathamah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Comme il est parfait, le détenteur du pouvoir total, de la souveraineté, de la magnificence et de la grandeur.)
duas.phonetic: Subhana thil-jabaroot, walmalakoot, walkibriya/, walAAathamah.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي كُلَّهُ: دِقَّهُ وَجِلَّهُ، وَأَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ، وَعَلاَنِيَّتَهُ وَسِرَّهُ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, forgive me all of my sins, the small and great of them, the first and last of them, and the seen and hidden of them.)
duas.reference: (Allahummagh-fir lee thanbee kullah, diqqahu wajillah, wa-awwalahu wa-akhirah, wa- AAalaniyyatahu wa-sirrah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, pardonne-moi tous mes péchés, les petits et les grands, les premiers et les derniers, les visibles et les cachés.)
duas.phonetic: Allahummagh-fir lee thanbee kullah, diqqahu wajillah, wa-awwalahu wa-akhirah, wa- AAalaniyyatahu wa-sirrah.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ، وَبِمُعَافَاتِكَ مِنْ عُقوبَتِكَ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْكَ، لاَ أُحْصِي ثَنَاءً عَلَيْكَ، أَنْتَ كَمَا أَثْنَيْتَ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I take refuge within Your pleasure from Your displeasure and within Your pardon from Your punishment, and I take refuge in You from You. I cannot enumerate Your praise, You are as You have praised Yourself.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu biridaka min sakhatik, wa-bimuAAafatika min AAuqoobatik, wa-aAAoothu bika mink, la ohsee thana-an AAalayk, anta kama athnayta AAala nafsik.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je me réfugie auprès de Ton plaisir contre Ton mécontentement et auprès de Ton pardon contre Ton châtiment, et je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre Toi. Je ne peux pas énumérer Tes louanges, Tu es tel que Tu t'es loué.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee aAAoothu biridaka min sakhatik, wa-bimuAAafatika min AAuqoobatik, wa-aAAoothu bika mink, la ohsee thana-an AAalayk, anta kama athnayta AAala nafsik.

title_en: Invocations for sitting between two prostrations

duas.arabic: ((رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي، رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي)).
duas.translation_en: (My Lord forgive me, My Lord forgive me.)
duas.reference: (Rabbigh-fir lee, rabbigh-fir lee.)
duas.translation_fr: (Mon Seigneur pardonne-moi, Mon Seigneur pardonne-moi.)
duas.phonetic: Rabbigh-fir lee, rabbigh-fir lee.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي، وَارْحَمْنِي، وَاهْدِنِي، وَاجْبُرْنِي، وَعَافِنِي، وَارْزُقْنِي، وَارْفَعْنِي)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, forgive me, have mercy upon me, guide me, enrich me, give me health, grant me sustenance and raise my rank.)
duas.reference: (Allahummagh-fir lee, warhamnee, wahdinee, wajburnee, waAAafinee, warzuqnee warfaAAnee.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, pardonne-moi, aie pitié de moi, guide-moi, enrichis-moi, donne-moi la santé, accorde-moi de la subsistance et élève mon rang.)
duas.phonetic: Allahummagh-fir lee, warhamnee, wahdinee, wajburnee, waAAafinee, warzuqnee warfaAAnee.

title_en: Supplications for prostrating due to recitation of the Qur'an
title_ar: الصلاة على النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم بعد التشهد

duas.arabic: ((سَجَدَ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي خَلَقَهُ، وَشَقَّ سَمْعَهُ وَبَصَرَهُ بِحَوْلِهِ وَقُوَّتِهِ، ﴿فَتَبارَكَ اللَّهُ أَحْسَنُ الْخَالِقِينَ)).
duas.translation_en: (My face fell prostrate before He who created it and brought forth its faculties of hearing and seeing by His might and power.<< So Blessed is Allah, the best of creators.)
duas.reference: (Sajada wajhee lillathee khalaqahu washaqqa samAAahu wabasarahu bihawlihi waquwwatih  { tabaraka Allahu ahsanu alkhaliqeen}.)
duas.translation_fr: (Mon visage s'est prosterné devant Celui qui l'a créé et qui a fait naître ses facultés d'ouïe et de vue par Sa puissance et Sa puissance.<< Ainsi Béni soit Allah, le meilleur des créateurs.)
duas.phonetic: Sajada wajhee lillathee khalaqahu washaqqa samAAahu wabasarahu bihawlihi waquwwatih  { tabaraka Allahu ahsanu alkhaliqeen}.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اكْتُبْ لِي بِهَا عِنْدَكَ أَجْراً، وَضَعْ عَنِّي بِهَا وِزْراً، وَاجْعَلْهَا لِي عِنْدَكَ ذُخْراً، وَتَقَبَّلْهَا مِنِّي كَمَا تَقَبَّلْتَهَا مِنْ عَبْدِكَ دَاوُدَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, record for me a reward for this (prostration), and remove from me a sin.  Save it for me and accept it from me just as You had accepted it from Your servant Dawood.)
duas.reference: (Allahummak-tub lee biha  AAindaka ajra, wadaAA  AAannee biha wizra, wajAAalha lee AAindaka thukhra, wataqabbalha minnee kama taqabbaltaha min AAabdika Dawood.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, inscris-moi une récompense pour cette (prosternation) et éloigne-moi d'un péché. Garde-le-moi et accepte-le de moi tout comme Tu l'avais accepté de Ton serviteur Dawood.)
duas.phonetic: Allahummak-tub lee biha  AAindaka ajra, wadaAA  AAannee biha wizra, wajAAalha lee AAindaka thukhra, wataqabbalha minnee kama taqabbaltaha min AAabdika Dawood.

title_fr: Invocation de la prosternation de recitation du Coran

title_en: Invocation for At-Tashahhud (sitting in prayer)
title_ar: الدعاء بعد التشهد الأخير وقبل السلام

duas.arabic: ((التَّحِيَّاتُ لِلَّهِ، وَالصَّلَواتُ، وَالطَّيِّباتُ، السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ وَرَحْمَةُ اللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ، السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَى عِبَادِ اللَّهِ الصَّالِحِينَ. أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدُهُ وَرَسولُهُ)).
duas.translation_en: (At-tahiyyat is for Allah. All acts of worship and good deeds are for Him.  Peace and the mercy and blessings of Allah be upon you O Prophet.  Peace be upon us and all of Allah’s righteous servants. I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except Allah and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and Messenger.)(At-tahiyyat: all words which indicate the glorification of Allah.  His eternal existence, His perfection and His sovereignty.)
duas.reference: (Attahiyyatu lillahi wassalawatu wattayyibat, assalamu AAalayka ayyuhan-nabiyyu warahmatul-lahi wabarakatuh, assalamu AAalayna waAAala AAibadil-lahis-saliheen. Ash-hadu an la ilaha illal-lah, wa-ashhadu anna Muhammadan AAabduhu warasooluh.)
duas.translation_fr: (At-tahiyyat est pour Allah. Tous les actes d'adoration et les bonnes actions sont pour Lui. La paix, la miséricorde et les bénédictions d'Allah soient sur toi, ô Prophète. La paix soit sur nous et sur tous les serviteurs pieux d'Allah. J'atteste que nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Allah et je témoigne que Muhammad est Son esclave et Messager.)(At-tahiyyat : tous les mots qui indiquent la glorification d'Allah. Son existence éternelle, Sa perfection et Sa souveraineté.)
duas.phonetic: Attahiyyatu lillahi wassalawatu wattayyibat, assalamu AAalayka ayyuhan-nabiyyu warahmatul-lahi wabarakatuh, assalamu AAalayna waAAala AAibadil-lahis-saliheen. Ash-hadu an la ilaha illal-lah, wa-ashhadu anna Muhammadan AAabduhu warasooluh.

title_en: How to recite blessings on the Prophet after the Tashahhud

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ، وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا صَلَّيتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ، وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ، اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and the followers of Muhammad, just as You sent prayers upon Ibraheem and upon the followers of Ibraheem.  Verily, You are full of praise and majesty. O Allah, send blessings upon Mohammad and upon the family of Muhammad, just as You sent blessings upon Ibraheem and upon the family of Ibraheem.  Verily, You are full of praise and majesty.)(send prayers: praise and exalt him in the highest and superior of gatherings: that of the closest angels to Allah)((al) has been translated in it’s broadest sense: some scholars are of the view that the meaning here is more specific and that it means: his  followers from among his family.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma salli AAala Muhammad, wa-AAala ali Muhammad, kama sallayta AAala Ibraheema wa-AAala ali Ibraheem, innaka Hameedun Majeed, allahumma barik AAala  Muhammad, wa-AAala ali Muhammad, kama barakta AAala Ibraheema wa-AAala ali Ibraheem, innaka Hameedun Majeed.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, envoie des prières sur Mohammed et sur les disciples de Mohammed, tout comme Tu as envoyé des prières sur Ibrahim et sur les disciples d'Ibrahim. En vérité, Tu es plein de louange et de majesté. Ô Allah, envoie des bénédictions sur Mohammed et sur la famille de Muhammad, tout comme Tu as envoyé des bénédictions sur Ibrahim et sur la famille d'Ibrahim. En vérité, Tu es plein de louange et de majesté.)(Envoye des prières : Loue-le et exalte-le au plus haut des cieux. et supérieur des rassemblements : celui des anges les plus proches d'Allah)((al) a été traduit dans son sens le plus large : certains savants sont d'avis que le sens ici est plus spécifique et qu'il signifie : ses disciples parmi sa famille.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma salli AAala Muhammad, wa-AAala ali Muhammad, kama sallayta AAala Ibraheema wa-AAala ali Ibraheem, innaka Hameedun Majeed, allahumma barik AAala  Muhammad, wa-AAala ali Muhammad, kama barakta AAala Ibraheema wa-AAala ali Ibraheem, innaka Hameedun Majeed.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى أَزْوَاجِهِ وَذُرِّيَّتِهِ، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ. وَبَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى أَزْواجِهِ وَذُرِّيَّتِهِ، كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ. إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and upon the wives and descendants of Muhammad, just as You sent prayers upon the family of Ibraheem, and send blessings upon Muhammad and upon the wives and descendants of Muhammad, just as You sent blessings upon the family of Ibraheem. Verily, You are full of praise and majesty.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma salli AAala Muhammad wa-AAala azwajihi wathurriyyatihi kama sallayta AAala ali Ibraheem, wabarik AAala Muhammad, wa-AAala azwajihi wathurriyyatih, kama barakta AAala ali Ibraheem. innaka Hameedun Majeed.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, envoie des prières sur Muhammad et sur les épouses et descendants de Muhammad, tout comme Tu as envoyé des prières sur la famille d'Ibrahim, et envoie des bénédictions sur Muhammad et sur les épouses et descendants de Muhammad, tout comme Tu as envoyé des bénédictions sur la famille d'Ibrahim. En vérité, Tu es plein de louange et de majesté.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma salli AAala Muhammad wa-AAala azwajihi wathurriyyatihi kama sallayta AAala ali Ibraheem, wabarik AAala Muhammad, wa-AAala azwajihi wathurriyyatih, kama barakta AAala ali Ibraheem. innaka Hameedun Majeed.

title_en: Invocations after the final Tash-ahhud and before ending the prayer

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُــمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَمِنْ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I take refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, from the torment of the Fire, from the trials and tribulations of life and death and from the evil affliction of Al-Maseeh Ad-Dajjal.)(Al-Maseeh Ad-Dajjal: among the great signs of the last hour and the greatest trials to befall mankind, which every Prophet has warned about.  Most of mankind will follow him. He will appear from Asbahan, Iran at the time when the Muslims will conquer Constantinople.  He will be given special powers and will make the truth seem false and vice versa.  He will claim to be righteous and then he will claim prophethood and finally, divinity.  From his features is that he will be blind in his right eye which is a definite proof that contradicts his claim to be Allah as it is a sign of imperfection.  The word Kafir will be written between his eyes which every believer, literate or illiterate will recognise.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika min AAathabil-qabr, wamin AAathabi jahannam, wamin fitnatil-mahya walmamat, wamin shari fitnatil-maseehid-dajjal.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre le châtiment de la tombe, contre les tourments du Feu, contre les épreuves et les tribulations de la vie et de la mort et contre les mauvaises afflictions d'Al-Maseeh Ad-Dajjal.)(Al-Maseeh Ad-Dajjal : parmi les grands signes de la dernière heure et les plus grandes épreuves à venir pour l'humanité, contre lesquelles chaque Prophète a mis en garde. La plupart de l'humanité le suivra. Il apparaîtra d'Asbahan, en Iran, au moment où les musulmans conquérir Constantinople. Il recevra des pouvoirs spéciaux et fera paraître la vérité fausse et vice versa. Il prétendra être juste et ensuite il revendiquera le statut de prophète et finalement, d'après ses traits, il sera aveugle de son œil droit, ce qui est une preuve définitive qui contredit sa prétention d'être Allah car c'est un signe d'imperfection qui sera écrit entre ses yeux et que tout croyant, lettré ou analphabète, reconnaîtra.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika min AAathabil-qabr, wamin AAathabi jahannam, wamin fitnatil-mahya walmamat, wamin shari fitnatil-maseehid-dajjal.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَأَعوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ، وَأَعوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْمَأْثَمِ وَالْمَغْرَمِ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I take refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, and I take refuge in You from the temptation and trial of Al-Maseeh Ad-Dajjal, and I take refuge in You from the trials and tribulations of life and death.  O Allah, I take refuge in You from sin and debt.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika min AAathabil-qabr, wa-aAAoothu bika min fitnatil-maseehid-dajjal, wa-aAAoothu bika min fitnatil-mahya walmamat. Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-ma/thami walmaghram.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre le châtiment de la tombe, et je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre la tentation et l'épreuve d'Al-Maseeh Ad-Dajjal, et je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre les épreuves et les tribulations de la vie et de la mort. Ô Allah, je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre le péché et la dette.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika min AAathabil-qabr, wa-aAAoothu bika min fitnatil-maseehid-dajjal, wa-aAAoothu bika min fitnatil-mahya walmamat. Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-ma/thami walmaghram.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي ظُلْماً كَثِيراً، وَلاَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنوبَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، فَاغْفِرْ لِي مَغْفِرَةً مِنْ عِنْدِكَ وَارْحَمْنِي، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الغَفورُ الرَّحيمُ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I have indeed oppressed my soul excessively and none can forgive sin except You, so forgive me a forgiveness from Yourself and have mercy upon me.  Surely, You are The Most-Forgiving, The Most-Merciful.)(From Yourself: i.e. from Your innermost grace without deserving it and a forgiveness which is befitting to your tremendous generosity.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee thalamtu nafsee thulman katheeran wala yaghfiruth-thunooba illa ant, faghfir lee maghfiratan min AAindik warhamnee, innaka antal-Ghafoorur-Raheem.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, j'ai vraiment opprimé mon âme excessivement et personne ne peut pardonner le péché sauf Toi, alors pardonne-moi un pardon de ta part et aie pitié de moi. Assurément, tu es le plus Pardonneur, le plus Miséricordieux.)(De Toi : c'est-à-dire de ta grâce la plus intérieure sans la mériter et un pardon qui convient à ta formidable générosité.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee thalamtu nafsee thulman katheeran wala yaghfiruth-thunooba illa ant, faghfir lee maghfiratan min AAindik warhamnee, innaka antal-Ghafoorur-Raheem.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي مَا قَدَّمْتُ، وَمَا أَخَّرْتُ، وَمَا أَسْرَرْتُ، وَمَا أَعْلَنْتُ، وَمَا أَسْرَفْتُ، وَمَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي. أَنْتَ الْمُقَدِّمُ، وَأَنْتَ الْمُؤَخِّرُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, forgive me for those sins which have come to pass as well as those which shall come to pass, and those I have committed in secret as well as those I have made public, and where I have exceeded all bounds as well as those things about which You are more knowledgeable. You are Al-Muqaddim and Al-Mu-akhkhir.  None has the right to be worshipped except You.)(Meaning of Al-Muqaddim and Al-Mu-akhkhir: Allah puts forward and favours whom He wills from amongst His creation just as He defers and holds back whom He wills in accordance to His wisdom.  E.g.  Favouring man over the rest of creation, favouring the Prophets over the rest of mankind, favouring Muhammad  over all the Prophets and Messengers…etc.)
duas.reference: (Allahummagh-fir lee ma qaddamtu,  wama akhkhart, wama asrartu wama aAAlant, wama asraftt, wama anta aAAlamu bihi minnee, antal-muqaddimu wa-antal-mu-akhkhiru la ilaha illa ant.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, pardonne-moi pour les péchés qui se sont produits ainsi que ceux qui arriveront, et ceux que j'ai commis en secret ainsi que ceux que j'ai rendus publics et où j'ai dépassé toutes les limites ainsi que les choses que Tu connais mieux. Tu es Al-Muqaddim et Al-Mu-akhkhir. Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Toi.) (Signification d'Al-Muqaddim et Al-Mu-akhkhir.) Al-Mu-akhkhir : Allah met en avant et favorise qui Il veut parmi Sa création, tout comme Il diffère et retient qui Il veut conformément à Sa sagesse.
duas.phonetic: Allahummagh-fir lee ma qaddamtu,  wama akhkhart, wama asrartu wama aAAlant, wama asraftt, wama anta aAAlamu bihi minnee, antal-muqaddimu wa-antal-mu-akhkhiru la ilaha illa ant.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ، وَشُكْرِكَ، وَحُسْنِ عِبادَتِكَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, help me to remember You, to thank You, and to worship You in the best of manners.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma aAAinnee AAala thikrik, washukrik, wahusni AAibadatik.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, aide-moi à me souvenir de Toi, à Te remercier et à T'adorer de la meilleure des manières.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma aAAinnee AAala thikrik, washukrik, wahusni AAibadatik.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْبُخْلِ، وَأَعوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُبْنِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ أَنْ أُرَدَّ إِلَى أَرْذَلِ الْعُمُرِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الدُّنْيَا وَعَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I take refuge in You from miserliness and cowardice, I take refuge in You lest I be returned to the worst of lives “i.e. old age, being weak, incapable and in a state of fear”, and I take refuge in You from the trials and tribulations of this life and the punishment of the grave.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-bukhl, wa-aAAoothu bika minal-jubn, wa-aAAoothu bika min an oradda ila arthalil- AAumur, wa-aAAoothu bika min fitnatid-dunya waAAathabil-qabr.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre l'avarice et la lâcheté, je me réfugie auprès de Toi de peur de revenir à la pire des vies "c'est-à-dire la vieillesse, étant faible, incapable et dans un état de peur", et je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre les épreuves et les tribulations de cette vie et le châtiment de la tombe.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-bukhl, wa-aAAoothu bika minal-jubn, wa-aAAoothu bika min an oradda ila arthalil- AAumur, wa-aAAoothu bika min fitnatid-dunya waAAathabil-qabr.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I ask You to grant me Paradise and I take refuge in You from the Fire.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee as-alukal-jannah, wa-aAAoothu bika minan-nar.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je Te demande de m'accorder le Paradis et je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre le Feu.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee as-alukal-jannah, wa-aAAoothu bika minan-nar.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ بِعِلْمِكَ الغَيْبَ وَقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَى الْخَلقِ أَحْيِنِي مَا عَلِمْتَ الْحَيَاةَ خَيْراً لِي، وَتَوَفَّنِي إِذَا عَلِمْتَ الْوَفَاةَ خَيْراً لِي، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَشْيَتَكَ فِي الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ كَلِمَةَ الْحَقِّ فِي الرِّضَا وَالْغَضَبِ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ الْقَصْدَ فِي الْغِنَى وَالْفَقْرِ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ نَعِيماً لاَ يَنْفَدُ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ قُرَّةَ عَيْنٍ لاَ تَنْقَطِعُ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ الرِّضَا بَعْدَ الْقَضَاءِ، وَأَسْــــأَلُكَ بَرْدَ الْعَيْشِ بَعْدَ الْمَوْتِ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ لَذَّةَ النَّظَرِ إِلَى وَجْهِكَ، وَالشَّوْقَ إِلَى لِقائِكَ فِي غَيرِ ضَرَّاءَ مُضِرَّةٍ، وَلاَ فِتْنَةٍ مُضِلَّةٍ، اللَّهُمَّ زَيِّنَا بِزِينَةِ الإِيمَانِ، وَاجْعَلْنَا هُدَاةً مُهْتَدِينَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, by Your knowledge of the unseen and Your power over creation, keep me alive so long as You know such life to be good for me and take me if You know death to be better for me.  O Allah, make me fearful of You whether in secret or in public and I ask You to make me true in speech, in times of pleasure and anger.I ask you to make me moderate in times of wealth and poverty and I ask You for everlasting bliss and joy which will never cease.I ask You to make me pleased with what You have decreed and for an easy life after death.I ask You for the sweetness of looking upon Your Face and a longing to encounter You in a manner which does not entail a calamity which will bring about harm nor a trial which will cause deviation. O Allah, beautify us with the adornment of faith and make us of those who guide and are rightly guided.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma biAAilmikal-ghayb, waqudratika AAalal-khalq, ahyinee ma AAalimtal-hayata khayran lee watawaffanee itha AAalimtal-wafata khayran lee, allahumma innee as-aluka khashyataka fil-ghaybi washshahadah, wa-as-aluka kalimatal-haqqi fir-rida walghadab, wa-as-alukal-qasda fil-ghina walfaqr, wa-as-aluka naAAeeman la yanfad, wa-as-aluka qurrata AAaynin la tanqatiAA, wa-as-alukar-rida baAAdal-qada/, wa-as-aluka bardal-AAayshi baAAdal-mawt, wa-as-aluka laththatan-nathari ila wajhik, washshawqa ila liqa-ik fee ghayri darraa mudirrah, wala fitnatin mudillah, allahumma zayyinna bizeenatil-eeman wajAAalna hudatan muhtadeen.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, par Ta connaissance de l'invisible et Ton pouvoir sur la création, garde-moi en vie aussi longtemps que Tu sais qu'une telle vie est bonne pour moi et prends-moi si Tu sais que la mort est meilleure pour moi. Ô Allah, fais-moi craindre que ce soit en secret ou en public et je Te demande de me rendre vrai dans la parole, dans les moments de plaisir et de colère. Je Te demande de me rendre modéré dans les moments de richesse et de pauvreté et je Te demande un bonheur et une joie éternelles qui ne cesseront jamais. Je Te demande de me rendre satisfait de ce que Tu as décrété et une vie facile après la mort. Je Te demande la douceur de regarder Ton Visage et le désir de Te rencontrer d'une manière qui n'entraîne pas une calamité qui entraînerait du mal ni une épreuve qui provoquerait la déviation. Ô Allah, embellis-nous avec l'ornement de la foi et fais de nous ceux qui guident et sont bien guidés.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma biAAilmikal-ghayb, waqudratika AAalal-khalq, ahyinee ma AAalimtal-hayata khayran lee watawaffanee itha AAalimtal-wafata khayran lee, allahumma innee as-aluka khashyataka fil-ghaybi washshahadah, wa-as-aluka kalimatal-haqqi fir-rida walghadab, wa-as-alukal-qasda fil-ghina walfaqr, wa-as-aluka naAAeeman la yanfad, wa-as-aluka qurrata AAaynin la tanqatiAA, wa-as-alukar-rida baAAdal-qada/, wa-as-aluka bardal-AAayshi baAAdal-mawt, wa-as-aluka laththatan-nathari ila wajhik, washshawqa ila liqa-ik fee ghayri darraa mudirrah, wala fitnatin mudillah, allahumma zayyinna bizeenatil-eeman wajAAalna hudatan muhtadeen.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ يَا أَللَّهُ بِأَنَّكَ الْوَاحِدُ الْأَحَدُ الصَّمَدُ الَّذِي لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يولَدْ، وَلَمْ يَكنْ لَهُ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ، أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي ذُنُوبِي إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِّيمُ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I ask You O Allah, as You are The One, The Only, AS-Samad, The One who begets not, nor was He begotten and there is none like unto Him that You forgive me my sins for verily You are The Oft-Forgiving, Most-Merciful.)(AS-Samad: The Self-Sufficient Master, Possessor of perfect attributes whom all of creation turn to in all their needs.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee as-aluka ya Allah bi-annakal-wahidul-ahadus-samad, allathee lam yalid walam yoolad, walam yakun lahu kufuwan ahad, an taghfira lee thunoobee innaka antal-Ghafoorur-Raheem.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je Te demande, Ô Allah, car Tu es Le Seul, AS-Samad, Celui qui n'a pas engendré, ni n'a été engendré et il n'y a personne comme Lui, que Tu me pardonnes mes péchés car en vérité Tu es Le Pardonneur et le Plus Miséricordieux.)(AS-Samad : Le Maître Autosuffisant, Détenteur d'attributs parfaits vers qui toute la création se tourne dans tous ses besoins.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee as-aluka ya Allah bi-annakal-wahidul-ahadus-samad, allathee lam yalid walam yoolad, walam yakun lahu kufuwan ahad, an taghfira lee thunoobee innaka antal-Ghafoorur-Raheem.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِأَنَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَكَ، الْمَنَّانُ، يَا بَدِيعَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ يَا ذَا الْجَلاَلِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ، يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I ask You as unto You is all praise, none has the right to be worshipped except You, alone, without partner. You are the Benefactor. O Originator of the heavens and the Earth, O Possessor of majesty and honour, O Ever Living, O Self-Subsisting and Supporter of all, verily I ask You for Paradise and I take refuge with You from the Fire.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee as-aluka bianna lakal-hamd, la ilaha illa ant wahdaka la shareeka lak, almannan, ya badeeAAas-samawati wal-ard, ya thal-jalali wal-ikram, ya hayyu ya qayyoom, innee as-alukal-jannah, wa-aAAoothu bika minan-nar.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je Te le demande car c'est Toi qui est toute louange, nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Toi, seul, sans partenaire. Tu es le Bienfaiteur. Ô Créateur des cieux et de la terre, ô Détenteur de la majesté et de l'honneur, ô Vivant éternel, ô Auto-subsistant et Supporteur de tous, en vérité je Te demande le Paradis et je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre le Feu.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee as-aluka bianna lakal-hamd, la ilaha illa ant wahdaka la shareeka lak, almannan, ya badeeAAas-samawati wal-ard, ya thal-jalali wal-ikram, ya hayyu ya qayyoom, innee as-alukal-jannah, wa-aAAoothu bika minan-nar.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِأَنَّي أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ الْأَحَدُ الصَّمَدُ الَّذِي لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ)) .
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I ask You, as I bear witness that You are Allah, none has the right to be worshipped except You, The One, AS-Samad Who begets not nor was He begotten and there is none like unto Him.)(AS-Samad: The Self-Sufficient Master, Possessor of perfect attributes whom all of creation turn to in all their needs.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma inne as-aluka biannee ashhadu annaka antal-lah, la ilaha illa ant, al-ahadus-samad, allathee lam yalid walam yoolad walam yakun lahu kufuwan ahad.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je Te le demande, comme je témoigne que Tu es Allah, nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Toi, Celui, AS-Samad qui n'a pas engendré ni n'a été engendré et il n'y a personne comme Lui.)(AS-Samad : Le Maître Autosuffisant, Possesseur d'attributs parfaits vers qui toute la création se tourne dans tous ses besoins.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma inne as-aluka biannee ashhadu annaka antal-lah, la ilaha illa ant, al-ahadus-samad, allathee lam yalid walam yoolad walam yakun lahu kufuwan ahad.

title_en: What to say after completing the prayer

duas.arabic: ((أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ (ثَلاَثَاً) اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلاَمُ، وَمِنْكَ السَّلاَمُ، تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلاَلِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ)).
duas.translation_en: (I ask Allah for forgiveness.(three times) (O Allah, You are As-Salam and from You is all peace, blessed are You, O Possessor of majesty and honour.) (AS-Salam: The One Who is free from all defects and deficiencies.))
duas.reference: (Astaghfirul-lah (three times) (Allahumma antas-salam waminkas-salam, tabarakta ya thal-jalali wal-ikram.))
duas.translation_fr: (Je demande pardon à Allah. (trois fois) (Ô Allah, Tu es As-Salam et de Toi vient toute paix, tu es béni, ô Possesseur de la majesté et de l'honneur.) (AS-Salam : Celui qui est libre de tous défauts et déficiences.))
duas.phonetic: Astaghfirul-lah (three times) (Allahumma antas-salam waminkas-salam, tabarakta ya thal-jalali wal-ikram.

duas.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ [ثلاثاً]، اللَّهُمَّ لاَ مَانِعَ لِمَا أَعْطَيْتَ، وَلاَ مُعْطِيَ لِمَا مَنَعْتَ، وَلاَ يَنْفَعُ ذَا الْجَدِّ مِنْكَ الجَدُّ)).
duas.translation_en: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent.O Allah, none can prevent what You have willed to bestow and none can bestow what You have willed to prevent, and no wealth or majesty can benefit anyone, as from You is all wealth and majesty.)
duas.reference: (La ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeer, allahumma la maniAAa lima aAAtayt, wala muAAtiya lima manaAAt, wala yanfaAAu thal-jaddi minkal-jad.)
duas.translation_fr: (Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Allah, seul, sans associé, à Lui appartiennent toute la souveraineté et la louange et Il est sur toutes choses tout-puissant. Ô Allah, personne ne peut empêcher ce que Tu as voulu accorder et personne ne peut accorder ce que Tu as voulu empêcher, et aucune richesse ni majesté ne peut profiter à quiconque, car de Toi viennent toute richesse et toute majesté.)
duas.phonetic: La ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeer, allahumma la maniAAa lima aAAtayt, wala muAAtiya lima manaAAt, wala yanfaAAu thal-jaddi minkal-jad.

duas.arabic: ((لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ، وَلَهُ الْحَمدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ. لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ، وَلاَ نَعْبُدُ إِلاَّ إِيَّاهُ, لَهُ النِّعْمَةُ وَلَهُ الْفَضْلُ وَلَهُ الثَّنَاءُ الْحَسَنُ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ الدِّينَ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ الكَافِرُونَ)).
duas.translation_en: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent.  There is no might nor power except with Allah, none has the right to be worshipped except Allah and we worship none except Him.  For Him is all favour, grace, and glorious praise.  None has the right to be worshipped except Allah and we are sincere in faith and devotion to Him although the disbelievers detest it.)
duas.reference: (La ilaha illal-lah, wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeer. la hawla wala quwwata illa billah, la ilaha illal-lah, wala naAAbudu illa iyyah, lahun-niAAmatu walahul-fadl walahuth-thana-ol- hasan, la ilaha illal-lah mukhliseena lahud-deen walaw karihal-kafiroon.)
duas.translation_fr: (Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré en dehors d'Allah, seul, sans associé, à Lui appartiennent toute souveraineté et louange et Il est sur toutes choses tout-puissant. Il n'y a de force ni de pouvoir qu'en Allah, nul n'a le droit d'être adoré en dehors d'Allah et nous n'adorons que Lui. Pour Lui est toute faveur, grâce et louange glorieuse. Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré en dehors d'Allah et nous sommes sincères dans la foi et le dévouement à Lui bien que les mécréants le détestent.)
duas.phonetic: La ilaha illal-lah, wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeer. la hawla wala quwwata illa billah, la ilaha illal-lah, wala naAAbudu illa iyyah, lahun-niAAmatu walahul-fadl walahuth-thana-ol- hasan, la ilaha illal-lah mukhliseena lahud-deen walaw karihal-kafiroon.

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ (ثلاثاً وثلاثين) لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ)).
duas.translation_en: (How perfect Allah is, all praise is for Allah, and Allah is the greatest.(thirty-three times) (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent.))
duas.reference: (Subhanal-lah walhamdu lillah, wallahu akbar (thirty-three times). (La ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeer.))
duas.translation_fr: (Comme Allah est parfait, toute louange est à Allah, et Allah est le plus grand. (trente-trois fois) (Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Allah, seul, sans associé, à Lui appartiennent toute souveraineté et louange et Il est sur toutes choses tout-puissant.))
duas.phonetic: Subhanal-lah walhamdu lillah, wallahu akbar (thirty-three times). (La ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeer.

duas.arabic: بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ﴿قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ* اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ* لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ* وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ﴾، بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ﴿قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ* مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ* وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ* وَمِن شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ* وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ﴾،بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ﴿قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ* مَلِكِ النَّاسِ* إِلَهِ النَّاسِ* مِن شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ* الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ* مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَ النَّاسِ﴾ بَعْدَ كُلِّ صَلاَةٍ.
duas.translation_en: The following three Soorahs should be recited once after Zuhr, 'Asr and 'Ishaa prayers and thrice after the Fajr and Maghrib prayers.[Soorah al-Ikhlaas (112)] [Soorah al-Falaq (113)] [Soorah an-Naas (114)]
duas.translation_fr: Les trois sourates suivantes doivent être récitées une fois après les prières de Zuhr, 'Asr et 'Ishaa et trois fois après les prières du Fajr et du Maghrib. [Sourate al-Ikhlaas (112)] [Sourate al-Falaq (113)] [Sourate an-Naas (114)]
duas.phonetic: bsm allh alrhmn alrhym ﴿qul huwa allahu aahadun* allahu alsamadu* lam yalid walam yuwlad* walam yakun lahu kufuwaan aahadun﴾ bsm allh alrhmn alrhym ﴿qul aa'uwdhu birabi alfalaqi* min shari maa khalaqa* wamin shari ghaasiqin iidhaa waqaba* wamin shari alnafaathaati fiy al'uqadi* wamin shari haasidin iidhaa hasada﴾bsm allh alrhmn alrhym ﴿qul aa'uwdhu birabi alnaasi* maliki alnaasi* iilahi alnaasi* min shari alwaswaasi alkhanaasi* aladhiy yuwaswisu fiy suduwri alnaasi* mina aljinahi wa alnaasi﴾ ba'da kuli salaahin.

duas.arabic: ﴿اللَّهُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ لاَ تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلاَ نَوْمٌ لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الأَرْضِ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلاَ يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلاَّ بِمَا شَاءَ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضَ وَلاَ يَؤُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ﴾ عَقِبَ كلِّ صَلاَةٍ.
duas.translation_en: It is also from the Sunnah to recite Aayat ul-Kursee after each prayer:[Soorah al-Baqarah, Aayah 255]
duas.translation_fr: Il est également de la Sunna de réciter le Aayat ul-Kursee après chaque prière : [Sourate al-Baqarah, Aayah 255]
duas.phonetic: ﴿allahu laa iilaha iilaa huwa alhayu alqayuwmu laa taakhudhuhu sinahun walaa nawmun lahu maa fiy alsamawaati wamaa fiy alaardi man dhaa aladhiy yashfa'u 'indahu iilaa biiidhnihi ya'lamu maa bayna aaydiyhim wamaa khalfahum walaa yuhiytuwna bishay'in min 'ilmihi iilaa bimaa shaa'a wasi'a kursiyuhu alsamawaati waalaarda walaa yauwduhu hifdhuhumaa wahuwa al'aliyu al'adhiymu﴾ 'aqiba kli salaahin.

duas.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ)) عَشْرَ مَرّاتٍ بَعْدَ صَلاةِ الْمَغْرِبِ وَالصُّبْحِ.
duas.translation_en: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, He gives life and causes death and He is over all things omnipotent.(ten times after the maghrib and fajr prayers))
duas.reference: (La ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, yuhyee wayumeet, wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeer.(ten times after the maghrib & fajr prayers))
duas.translation_fr: (Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Allah, seul, sans associé, à Lui appartiennent toute souveraineté et louange, Il donne la vie et provoque la mort et Il est sur toutes choses tout-puissant. (dix fois après les prières du maghrib et du fajr))
duas.phonetic: La ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, yuhyee wayumeet, wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeer.(ten times after the maghrib & fajr prayers

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْماً نافِعاً، وَرِزْقاً طَيِّباً، وَعَمَلاً مُتَقَبَّلاً)) بَعْدَ السّلامِ مِنْ صَلاَةِ الفَجْرِ.
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I ask You for knowledge which is beneficial and sustenance which is good, and deeds which are acceptable.)(To be said after giving salam for the fajr prayer)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee as-aluka AAilman nafiAAan, warizqan tayyiban, waAAamalan mutaqabbalan.(after salam from fajr prayer))
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je Te demande une connaissance bénéfique, une subsistance bonne et des actions acceptables.) (À dire après avoir fait le salam pour la prière du fajr)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee as-aluka AAilman nafiAAan, warizqan tayyiban, waAAamalan mutaqabbalan.(after salam from fajr prayer

title_en: Istikharah (seeking Allah's Counsel)

duas.arabic: قَالَ جَابرُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا: كَانَ رسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم يُعَلِّمُنَا الْاسْتِخَارَةَ فِي الْأُمُورِ كُلِّهَا كَمَا يُعَلِّمُنَا السُّورَةَ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ، يَقُولُ: ((إِذَا هَمَّ أَحَدُكُمْ بِالْأَمْرِ فَلْيَرْكَعْ رَكْعَتَيْنِ مِنْ غَيْرِ الْفَرِيضَةِ، ثُمَّ لْيَقُلْ: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ، وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ العَظِيمِ؛ فَإِنَّكَ تَقْدِرُ وَلاَ أَقْدِرُ، وَتَعْلَمُ وَلاَ أَعْلَمُ، وَأَنْتَ عَلاَّمُ الغُيُوبِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الأمْرَ - وَيُسَمِّي حَاجَتَهُ - خَيْرٌ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي – أَوْ قَالَ: عَاجِلِهِ وَآجِلِهِ - فَاقْدُرْهُ لِي وَيَسِّرْهُ لِي ثمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِيهِ، وَإِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ شَرٌّ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي – أَوْ قَالَ: عَاجِلِهِ وَآجِلِهِ – فَاصْرِفْهُ عَنِّي وَاصْرِفْنِي عَنْهُ وَاقْدُرْ لِيَ الْخَيْرَ حَيْثُ كَانَ، ثُمَّ أَرْضِنِي بِهِ)).وَمَا نَدِمَ مَنِ اسْتَخَارَ الْخَالِقَ، وَشَاوَرَ الْمَخْلُوقِينَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَتَثَبَّتَ فِي أَمْرِهِ، فَقَدْ قَالَ اللَّه تعالى: ﴿وَشاوِرْهُمْ فِي الْأَمْرِ فَإِذَا عَزَمْتَ فَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ﴾ .
duas.translation_en: (On the authority of Jabir Ibn AAabdullah , he said: ’The Prophet  would instruct us to pray for guidance in all of our concerns, just as he would teach us a chapter from the Quran.  He  would say ’ If any of you intends to undertake a matter then let him pray two supererogatory units (two rakAAah nafilah) of prayer and after which he should supplicate:‘O Allah, I seek Your counsel by Your knowledge and by Your power I seek strength and I ask You from Your immense favour, for verily You are able while I am not and verily You know while I do not and You are the Knower of the unseen.  O Allah, if You know this affair -and here he mentions his need- to be good for me in relation to my religion, my life, and end, then decree and facilitate it for me, and bless me with it, and if You know this affair to be ill for me towards my religion, my life, and end, then remove it from me and remove me from it, and decree for me what is good wherever it be and make me satisfied with such.)(One who seeks guidance from his Creator and consults his fellow believers and then remains firm in his resolve does not regret, for Allah has said:…and consult them in the affair. Then when you have taken a decision, put your trust in Allah…)
duas.reference: (On the authority of Jabir Ibn AAabdullah , he said: ’The Prophet  would instruct us to pray for guidance in all of our concerns, just as he would teach us a chapter from the Quran.  He  would say ’ If any of you intends to undertake a matter then let him pray two supererogatory units (two rakAAah nafilah) of prayer and after which he should supplicate:Allahumma innee astakheeruka biAAilmik, wa-astaqdiruka biqudratik, wa-as-aluka min fadlikal-AAatheem, fa-innaka taqdiru wala aqdir, wataAAlamu wala aAAlam ,wa-anta AAallamul ghuyoob, allahumma in kunta taAAlamu anna hathal-amr (say your need) khayrun lee fee deenee wamaAAashee waAAaqibati amree faqdurhu lee, wayassirhu lee, thumma barik lee feeh, wa-in kunta taAAlamu anna hathal-amr sharrun lee fee deenee wamaAAashee waAAaqibati amree fasrifhu AAannee wasrifnee AAanh, waqdur liyal-khayra haythu kan, thumma ardinee bih.)(One who seeks guidance from his Creator and consults his fellow believers and then remains firm in his resolve does not regret, for Allah has said:washawirhum fee al-amri fa-itha AAazamta fatawakkal AAala Allah)(chapter 3 verse 159)
duas.translation_fr: (Sous l'autorité de Jabir Ibn AAabdullah, il a dit : « Le Prophète nous demanderait de prier pour nous guider dans toutes nos préoccupations, tout comme il nous enseignerait un chapitre du Coran. Il dirait : « Si l'un d'entre vous a l'intention d'entreprendre une affaire, qu'il prie deux unités surérogatoires (deux rakAAah nafilah) de prière et après quoi il devra invoquer : « Ô Allah, je cherche Ton conseil par Ta connaissance et par Ta puissance, je cherche la force et je demande Toi de Ton immense faveur, car en vérité Tu peux alors que je ne le suis pas et en vérité Tu le sais alors que je ne le fais pas et Tu es le Connaisseur de l'invisible. Ô Allah, si Tu sais que cette affaire - et ici il mentionne son besoin - d'être bonne pour moi par rapport à ma religion, ma vie et ma fin, alors décrète et facilite-la pour moi, et bénis-moi, et si Tu sais que cette affaire est mauvaise pour moi pour ma religion, ma vie et sa fin, alors éloigne-la de moi et éloigne-moi d'elle. et ordonne pour moi ce qui est bon partout où il se trouve et fais-moi en être satisfait. (Celui qui cherche la direction de son Créateur et consulte ses frères croyants et reste ensuite ferme dans sa résolution ne regrette pas, car Allah a dit :… et consulte-les dans cette affaire. Puis, quand tu as pris une décision, place ta confiance en Allah…)
duas.phonetic: On the authority of Jabir Ibn AAabdullah , he said: ’The Prophet  would instruct us to pray for guidance in all of our concerns, just as he would teach us a chapter from the Quran.  He  would say ’ If any of you intends to undertake a matter then let him pray two supererogatory units (two rakAAah nafilah) of prayer and after which he should supplicate:Allahumma innee astakheeruka biAAilmik, wa-astaqdiruka biqudratik, wa-as-aluka min fadlikal-AAatheem, fa-innaka taqdiru wala aqdir, wataAAlamu wala aAAlam ,wa-anta AAallamul ghuyoob, allahumma in kunta taAAlamu anna hathal-amr (say your need) khayrun lee fee deenee wamaAAashee waAAaqibati amree faqdurhu lee, wayassirhu lee, thumma barik lee feeh, wa-in kunta taAAlamu anna hathal-amr sharrun lee fee deenee wamaAAashee waAAaqibati amree fasrifhu AAannee wasrifnee AAanh, waqdur liyal-khayra haythu kan, thumma ardinee bih.)(One who seeks guidance from his Creator and consults his fellow believers and then remains firm in his resolve does not regret, for Allah has said:washawirhum fee al-amri fa-itha AAazamta fatawakkal AAala Allah)(chapter 3 verse 159

title_en: Invocation to say if you stir in the night

duas.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ الْوَاحِدُ الْقَهّارُ، رَبُّ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا الْعَزيزُ الْغَفَّارُ)).
duas.translation_en: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, The One, AL-Qahhar.Lord of the heavens and the Earth and all between them, The Exalted in Might, The Oft-Forgiving.)(AL-Qahhar:The One Who has subdued all of creation and Whom all of creation are subservient to.  All movements occur by His will.)
duas.reference: (La ilaha illal-lahul-wahidul-qahhar, rabbus-samawati wama baynahuma, alAAazeezul-ghaffar.)
duas.translation_fr: (Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Allah, L'Unique, AL-Qahhar. Seigneur des cieux et de la terre et de tous entre eux, Le Puissant, Le Pardonneur.)(AL-Qahhar : Celui qui a soumis toute la création et à qui toute la création est soumise. Tous les mouvements se produisent par Sa volonté.)
duas.phonetic: La ilaha illal-lahul-wahidul-qahhar, rabbus-samawati wama baynahuma, alAAazeezul-ghaffar.

title_fr: Invocation si on se retourne la nuit

title_en: What to say if you are afraid to go to sleep or feel lonely and depressed
title_ar: دعاء القلق والفزع في النوم ومن بلي بالوحشة

duas.arabic: ((أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ غَضَبِهِ وَعِقَابِهِ، وَشَرِّ عِبَادِهِ، وَمِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّياطِينِ وَأَنْ يَحْضُرُونِ)).
duas.translation_en: (I take refuge in the perfect words of Allah from His anger and punishment, and from the evil of His servants, and from the madness and appearance of devils.)
duas.reference: (aAAoothu bikalimatil-lahit-tammat min ghadabih,waAAiqabih, washarri AAibadih, wamin hamazatish-shayateen, wa-an yahduroon.)
duas.translation_fr: (Je me réfugie dans les paroles parfaites d'Allah contre Sa colère et son châtiment, contre la méchanceté de Ses serviteurs, contre la folie et l'apparence des démons.)
duas.phonetic: aAAoothu bikalimatil-lahit-tammat min ghadabih,waAAiqabih, washarri AAibadih, wamin hamazatish-shayateen, wa-an yahduroon.

title_fr: Invocation en cas de peur ou d'insomnie

title_en: What to do if you have a bad dream or nightmare
title_ar: ما يفعل من رأى الرؤيا أو الحلم

duas.arabic: ((يَنْفُثُ عَنْ يَسَارِهِ)) (ثلاثاً).
duas.translation_en: [((Spit on your left three times)(Spit: A form of spitting comprising mainly of air with little spittle)) - (Seek refuge in Allah from shaytan and the evil of what you saw (Three Times)) - (Do not relate it to anyone) - (Turn and sleep on the opposite side to which you were sleeping on previously.) - (Get up and pray if you so desire.) ]
duas.translation_fr: [((Crachez sur votre gauche trois fois)(Crachement : une forme de crachat comprenant principalement de l'air avec peu de crachats)) - (Cherchez refuge auprès d'Allah contre le shaytan et le mal de ce que vous avez vu (trois fois)) - (Ne le racontez à personne) - (Tournez-vous et dormez du côté opposé sur lequel vous dormiez auparavant.) - (Levez-vous et priez si vous le désirez.) ]
duas.phonetic: ((yanfuthu 'an yasaarihi)) (thlathaan).

duas.arabic: ((ويَقُومُ يُصَلِّي إِنْ أَرَادَ ذَلِكَ)).
duas.translation_en: (Get up and pray if you so desire.)
duas.translation_fr: (Levez-vous et priez si vous le désirez.)
duas.phonetic: ((wyaquwmu yusaliy iin aaraada dhalika)).

title_en: Invocations for Qunut in the Witr prayer

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِيمَنْ هَدَيْتَ، وَعَافِنِي فِيمَنْ عَافَيْتَ، وَتَوَلَّنِي فِيمَنْ تَوَلَّيْتَ، وَبَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا أَعْطَيْتَ، وَقِنِي شَرَّ مَا قَضَيْتَ؛ فَإِنَّكَ تَقْضِي وَلاَ يُقْضَى عَلَيْكَ، إِنَّهُ لاَ يَذِلُّ مَنْ وَالَيْتَ، [وَلاَ يَعِزُّ مَنْ عَادَيْتَ]، تَبارَكْتَ رَبَّنا وَتَعَالَيْتَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, guide me along with those whom You have guided, pardon me along with those whom You have pardoned, be an ally to me along with those whom You are an ally to and bless for me that which You have bestowed.  Protect me from the evil You have decreed for verily You decree and none can decree over You.For surety, he whom you show allegiance to is never abased and he whom You take as an enemy is never honoured and mighty. O our Lord, Blessed and Exalted are You.)(Evil you have decreed: Allah does not create pure evil which does not have any good or contain any benefit, wisdom or mercy at all, nor does He punish anyone without having commited a sin. Something can be good in terms of its creation when viewed in a particular perspective and at the same time be evil when viewed in another way.Allah created the devil and by him, He tests His servants, so there are those who hate the devil, fight him and his way and they stand at enmity towards him and his followers and there are others who are at allegiance with the devil and follow his steps. So evil exists in His creatures by His will and wisdom, not in His actions or act of creating.)
duas.reference: (Allahummah-dinee feeman hadayt, waAAafinee feeman AAafayt, watawallanee feeman tawallayt, wabarik lee feema aAAtayt, waqinee sharra ma qadayt, fa-innaka taqdee wala yuqda AAalayk, innahu la yathillu man walayt, [wala yaAAizzu man AAadayt], tabarakta rabbana wataAAalayt.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, guide-moi avec ceux que Tu as guidés, pardonne-moi avec ceux à qui Tu as pardonné, sois mon allié avec ceux dont Tu es l'allié et bénis pour moi ce que Tu as accordé. Protège-moi du mal que Tu as décrété car en vérité Tu décrètes et personne ne peut décréter sur Toi. En vérité, celui à qui tu fais allégeance n'est jamais abaissé et celui que Tu prends pour ennemi n'est jamais honoré et puissant. Ô notre Seigneur, Béni et Exalté. es-Tu.)(Mal que tu as décrété : Allah ne crée pas un mal pur qui n'a aucun bien ou qui ne contient aucun bénéfice, sagesse ou miséricorde, et Il ne punit personne sans avoir commis un péché. Quelque chose peut être bon en termes de sa création vu dans une perspective particulière et en même temps être mal vu d'une autre manière. Allah a créé le diable et par lui, Il teste Ses serviteurs, donc il y a ceux qui détestent le diable, le combattent et combattent sa voie et ils sont en inimitié envers lui et ses disciples et là Il y en a d'autres qui sont fidèles au diable et suivent ses traces. Le mal existe donc dans ses créatures par sa volonté et sa sagesse, et non dans ses actions ou son acte de création.)
duas.phonetic: Allahummah-dinee feeman hadayt, waAAafinee feeman AAafayt, watawallanee feeman tawallayt, wabarik lee feema aAAtayt, waqinee sharra ma qadayt, fa-innaka taqdee wala yuqda AAalayk, innahu la yathillu man walayt, [wala yaAAizzu man AAadayt], tabarakta rabbana wataAAalayt.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ، وَبِمُعَافَاتِكَ مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ، وَأَعُــــوذُ بِكَ مِنْكَ، لاَ أُحْصِي ثَنَاءً عَلَيْكَ، أَنْتَ كَمَا أَثْنَيْتَ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I take refuge within Your pleasure from Your displeasure and within Your pardon from Your punishment, and I take refuge in You from You. I cannot enumerate Your praise. You are as You have praised Yourself.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu biridaka min sakhatik, wabimuAAafatika min AAuqoobatik, wa-aAAoothu bika mink, la ohsee thana-an AAalayk, anta kama athnayta AAala nafsik.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je me réfugie auprès de Ton plaisir contre Ton mécontentement et auprès de Ton pardon contre Ton châtiment, et je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre Toi. Je ne peux pas énumérer Tes louanges. Tu es tel que Tu t'es loué.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee aAAoothu biridaka min sakhatik, wabimuAAafatika min AAuqoobatik, wa-aAAoothu bika mink, la ohsee thana-an AAalayk, anta kama athnayta AAala nafsik.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِيَّاكَ نعْبُدُ، وَلَكَ نُصَلِّي وَنَسْجُدُ، وَإِلَيْكَ نَسْعَى وَنَحْفِدُ، نَرْجُو رَحْمَتَكَ، وَنَخْشَى عَذَابَكَ، إِنَّ عَذَابَكَ بِالكَافِرِينَ مُلْحَقٌ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْتَعينُكَ، وَنَسْتَغْفِرُكَ، وَنُثْنِي عَلَيْكَ الْخَيْرَ، وَلاَ نَكْفُرُكَ، وَنُؤْمِنُ بِكَ، وَنَخْضَعُ لَكَ، وَنَخْلَعُ مَنْ يَكْفرُكَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, it is You we worship, and unto You we pray and prostrate, and towards You we hasten and You we serve. We hope for Your mercy and fear Your punishment, verily Your punishment will fall upon the disbelievers.O Allah, we seek Your aid and ask Your pardon, we praise You with all good and do not disbelieve in You.We believe in You and submit unto You, and we disown and reject those who disbelieve in You.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma iyyaka naAAbud, walaka nusallee wanasjud, wa-ilayka nasAAa wanahfid, narjoo rahmatak, wanakhsha AAathabak, inna AAathabaka bilkafireena mulhaq. Allahumma inna nastaAAeenuk, wanastaghfiruk, wanuthnee AAalaykal- khayr, wala nakfuruk, wanu/minu bik, wanakhdaAAu lak wanakhlaAAu man yakfuruk.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, c'est Toi que nous adorons, et vers Toi nous prions et nous prosternons, et vers Toi nous nous hâtons et Toi nous servons.
