Nous espérons Ta miséricorde et craignons Ton châtiment, en vérité Ton châtiment tombera sur les mécréants. Ô Allah, nous implorons Ton aide et implorons Ton pardon, nous Te louons de tout bien et ne mécréons pas en Toi. Nous croyons en Toi et nous nous soumettons à Toi, et nous renions et rejetons ceux qui ne croient pas en Toi.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma iyyaka naAAbud, walaka nusallee wanasjud, wa-ilayka nasAAa wanahfid, narjoo rahmatak, wanakhsha AAathabak, inna AAathabaka bilkafireena mulhaq. Allahumma inna nastaAAeenuk, wanastaghfiruk, wanuthnee AAalaykal- khayr, wala nakfuruk, wanu/minu bik, wanakhdaAAu lak wanakhlaAAu man yakfuruk.

title_fr: Invocations du qunut dans le witr

title_en: What to say immediately following the Witr prayer

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَ المَلِكِ القُدُّوسِ)) ثلاثَ مرَّاتٍ والثَّالِثَةُ يَجْهَرُ بها ويَمُدُّ بها صَوتَهُ يقولُ: [رَبِّ الْمَلاَئِكَةِ وَالرُّوحِ])).
duas.translation_en: (How perfect The King, The Holy One is.(three times) on the third time he would raise his voice, elongate it and add: (Lord of the angles and the Rooh (i.e. Jibra-eel).))
duas.reference: (Subhanal-malikil-quddoos.(three times).on the third time he would raise his voice, elongate it and add: (Rabbil-mala-ikati warrooh.))
duas.translation_fr: (Comme le Roi, Le Saint est parfait. (trois fois) la troisième fois, il élevait la voix, l'allongeait et ajoutait : (Seigneur des angles et du Rooh (c'est-à-dire Jibra-anguille).))
duas.phonetic: Subhanal-malikil-quddoos.(three times).on the third time he would raise his voice, elongate it and add: (Rabbil-mala-ikati warrooh.

title_en: Invocations in times of worry and grief

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَبْدُكَ، ابْنُ عَبْدِكَ، ابْنُ أَمَتِكَ، نَاصِيَتِي بِيَدِكَ، مَاضٍ فِيَّ حُكْمُكَ، عَدْلٌ فِيَّ قَضَاؤُكَ، أَسْأَلُكَ بِكُــــلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ، سَمَّيْتَ بِهِ نَفْسَكَ، أَوْ أَنْزَلْتَهُ فِي كِتَابِكَ، أَوْ عَلَّمْتَهُ أَحَداً مِنْ خَلْقِكَ، أَوِ اسْتَأْثَرْتَ بِهِ فِي عِلْمِ الغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ، أَنْ تَجْعَلَ القُرْآنَ رَبِيعَ قَلْبِي، وَنُورَ صَدْرِي، وَجَلاَءَ حُزْنِي، وَذَهَابَ هَمِّي)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I am Your servant, son of Your servant, son of Your maidservant, my forelock is in Your hand (i.e. You have total mastery over), Your command over me is forever executed and Your decree over me is just. I ask You by every name belonging to You which You named Yourself with, or revealed in Your Book, or You taught to any of Your creation, or You have preserved in the knowledge of the unseen with You, that You make the Quran the life of my heart and the light of my breast, and a departure for my sorrow and a release for my anxiety.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee AAabduk, ibnu AAabdik, ibnu amatik, nasiyatee biyadik, madin fiyya hukmuk, AAadlun fiyya qada-ok, as-aluka bikulli ismin huwa lak, sammayta bihi nafsak, aw anzaltahu fee kitabik, aw AAallamtahu ahadan min khalqik awis-ta/tharta bihi fee AAilmil-ghaybi AAindak, an tajAAalal-Qurana rabeeAAa qalbee, wanoora sadree, wajalaa huznee wathahaba hammee.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je suis Ton serviteur, fils de Ton serviteur, fils de Ta servante, mon toupet est dans Ta main (c'est-à-dire que Tu as un contrôle total sur), Ton commandement sur moi est exécuté pour toujours et Ton décret sur moi est juste. Je Te demande, par tous les noms qui T'appartiennent et que Tu T'es nommés avec, ou révélés dans Ton Livre, ou que Tu as enseignés à l'une de Ta création, ou que Tu as préservés dans la connaissance de l'invisible avec Toi, que Tu fasses du Coran la vie de mon cœur et du lumière de mon sein, et un départ pour mon chagrin et une libération pour mon anxiété.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee AAabduk, ibnu AAabdik, ibnu amatik, nasiyatee biyadik, madin fiyya hukmuk, AAadlun fiyya qada-ok, as-aluka bikulli ismin huwa lak, sammayta bihi nafsak, aw anzaltahu fee kitabik, aw AAallamtahu ahadan min khalqik awis-ta/tharta bihi fee AAilmil-ghaybi AAindak, an tajAAalal-Qurana rabeeAAa qalbee, wanoora sadree, wajalaa huznee wathahaba hammee.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ، وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I take refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, weakness and laziness, miserliness and cowardice, the burden of debts and from being over powered by men.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-hammi walhuzn, walAAajzi walkasali walbukhli waljubn, wadalAAid-dayni waghalabatir-rijal.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre l'anxiété et le chagrin, la faiblesse et la paresse, l'avarice et la lâcheté, le fardeau des dettes et contre la domination des hommes.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-hammi walhuzn, walAAajzi walkasali walbukhli waljubn, wadalAAid-dayni waghalabatir-rijal.

title_en: Invocations for anguish

duas.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ رَبُّ السَّمَوَاتِ وَرَبُّ الْأَرْضِ وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ)).
duas.translation_en: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah Forbearing.  None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Lord of the magnificent throne.  None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Lord of the heavens, Lord of the Earth and Lord of the noble throne.)
duas.reference: (La ilaha illal-lahul-AAatheemul-haleem, la ilaha illal-lahu rabbul-AAarshil-AAatheem, la ilaha illal-lahu  rabbus-samawati warabbul-ardi warabbul-AAarshil-kareem.)
duas.translation_fr: (Nul n’a le droit d’être adoré sauf Allah Indulgent. Nul n’a le droit d’être adoré sauf Allah, Seigneur du trône magnifique. Nul n’a le droit d’être adoré sauf Allah, Seigneur des cieux, Seigneur de la terre et Seigneur du noble trône.)
duas.phonetic: La ilaha illal-lahul-AAatheemul-haleem, la ilaha illal-lahu rabbul-AAarshil-AAatheem, la ilaha illal-lahu  rabbus-samawati warabbul-ardi warabbul-AAarshil-kareem.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ رَحْمَتَكَ أَرْجُو، فَلاَ تَكِلْنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ، وَأَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, it is Your mercy that I hope for, so do not leave me in charge of my affairs even for a blink of an eye and rectify for me all of my affairs.None has the right to be worshipped except You.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma rahmataka arjoo fala takilnee ila nafsee tarfata AAayn, wa-aslih lee sha/nee kullah, la ilaha illa ant.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, c'est Ta miséricorde que j'espère, alors ne me laisse pas diriger mes affaires même pour un clin d'œil et rectifie pour moi toutes mes affaires. Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Toi.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma rahmataka arjoo fala takilnee ila nafsee tarfata AAayn, wa-aslih lee sha/nee kullah, la ilaha illa ant.

duas.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظّالِمِينَ)).
duas.translation_en: (None has the right to be worshipped except You.  How perfect You are, verily I was among the wrong-doers.)
duas.reference: (La ilaha illa anta subhanaka innee kuntu minath-thalimeen.)
duas.translation_fr: (Nul n’a le droit d’être adoré sauf toi. Comme tu es parfait, en vérité j’étais parmi les injustes.)
duas.phonetic: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka innee kuntu minath-thalimeen.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُ اللَّهُ رَبِّي لاَ أُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئاً)).
duas.translation_en: (Allah, Allah is my Lord, I do not associate anything with Him.)
duas.reference: (None has the right to be worshipped except You.  How perfect You are, verily I was among the wrong-doers.)
duas.translation_fr: (Allah, Allah est mon Seigneur, je ne lui associe rien.)
duas.phonetic: None has the right to be worshipped except You.  How perfect You are, verily I was among the wrong-doers.

title_en: Invocations for when you meet an adversary or a powerful ruler.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَجْعَلُكَ فِي نُحُورِهِم، وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شُرُورِهِمْ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, we place You before them and we take refuge in You from their evil.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma inna najAAaluka fee nuhoorihim wanaAAoothu bika min shuroorihim.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, nous Te plaçons devant eux et nous prenons refuge auprès de Toi contre leur mal.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma inna najAAaluka fee nuhoorihim wanaAAoothu bika min shuroorihim.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ عَضُدِي، وَأَنْتَ نَصِيرِي، بِكَ أَحُولُ وَبِكَ أَصُولُ، وَبِكَ أُقاتِلُ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, You are my supporter and You are my helper, by You I move and by You I attack and by You I battle.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma anta AAadudee, wa-anta naseeree, bika ajoolu wabika asoolu wabika oqatil)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, Tu es mon soutien et Tu es mon aide, par Toi je bouge et par Toi j'attaque et par Toi je combat.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma anta AAadudee, wa-anta naseeree, bika ajoolu wabika asoolu wabika oqatil

duas.arabic: ((حَسْبُنا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ)).
duas.translation_en: (Allah is sufficient for us, and how fine a trustee (He is).)
duas.reference: (Hasbunal-lahu waniAAmal-wakeel.)
duas.translation_fr: (Allah nous suffit, et quel excellent administrateur (Il est).)
duas.phonetic: Hasbunal-lahu waniAAmal-wakeel.

title_en: Invocations against the oppression of rulers

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ ربَّ السَّمَوَاتِ السَّبْعِ، وَرَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، كُنْ لِي جَاراً مِنْ فُلاَنِ بْنِ فُلاَنٍ، وَأَحْزَابِهِ مِنْ خَلاَئِقِكَ، أَنْ يَفْرُطَ عَلَيَّ أَحَدٌ مِنْهُمْ أَوْ يَطْغَى، عَزَّ جَارُكَ، وَجَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ، وَلاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ)).
duas.translation_en: O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens, Lord of the Magnificent Throne,  be for me a support against [such and such a person] and his helpers from among your creatures, lest any of them abuse me or do me wrong. Mighty is your patronage and glorious are your praises. There is none worthy of worship but you.
duas.reference: Allaahumma rabbas-samaawaatis-sab'i, wa Rabbal-'Arshil-'Adheem, Kun lee jaaran min (here you mention the person's name) wa 'ahzabihi min khalaa'iqika, 'an yafruta 'alayya 'ahadun minhum 'aw yatghaa,'Azza jaaruka, wa jalla thanaa'uka, wa laa 'ilaaha 'illaa 'Anta.
duas.translation_fr: Ô Allah, Seigneur des sept cieux, Seigneur du Trône Magnifique, sois pour moi un soutien contre [telle ou telle personne] et ses assistants parmi tes créatures, afin qu'aucun d'eux ne m'insulte ou ne me fasse du mal. Puissant est votre patronage et glorieux sont vos louanges. Il n’y a personne digne d’adoration à part toi.
duas.phonetic: ((allahuma rba alsamawaati alsab'i waraba al'arshi al'adhiymi kun liy jaaraan min fulaani bni fulaanin waaahzaabihi min khalaaiqika aan yafruta 'alaya aahadun minhum aaw yatghaa 'aza jaaruka wajala thanaauka walaa iilaha iilaa aanta)).

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَعَزُّ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ جَمِيعاً، اللَّهُ أَعَزُّ مِمَّا أَخَافُ وَأَحْذَرُ، أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ الَّذِي لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ، الْمُمْسِكِ السَّمَوَاتِ السَّبْعِ أَنْ يَقَعْنَ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ، مِنْ شَرِّ عَبْدِكَ فُلاَنٍ، وَجُنُودِهِ وَأَتْبَاعِهِ وَأَشْيَاعِهِ، مِنْ الْجِنِّ وَالإِنْسِ، اللَّهُمَّ كُنْ لِي جَاراً مِنْ شَرِّهِمْ، جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ وَعَزَّ جَارُكَ، وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ، وَلاَ إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ)) (ثلاثَ مرَّاتٍ).
duas.translation_en: Allah is the Most Great, Mightier than all His creation. He is Mightier than what fear and dread. I seek refuge in Allah, Who there is none worthy of worship but Him. He is the One Who holds the seven heavens from falling upon the earth except by His command. [I seek refuge in You Allah] from the evil of Your slave [name of the person], and his helpers, his followers and his supporters from among the jinn and mankind. O Allah, be my support against their evil. Glorious Your praises and mighty is Your patronage. Blessed is Your Name, there is no true God but You. (Recite three times in Arabic)
duas.reference: Allaahu Akbar, Allaahu 'a'azzu min khalqihi jamee'an, Allaahu 'a'azzu mimmaa 'akhaafu wa 'ahdharu, 'a'oothu billaahil-lathee laa ilaaha illaa huwa, almumsikis-samaawaatis-sab'i 'an yaqa'na 'alaal-'ardhi 'illaa bi'ithnihi, min sharri 'abdika (name of the person) wa junoodihi wa 'atbaa'ihi wa ashyaa'ihi minal-jinni wal'insi, Allaahumma kun lee jaaran min sharrihim, Jalla thanaa'uka wa 'azza aaruka, wa tabaarakasmuka, wa laa ilaaha ghayruka.
duas.translation_fr: Allah est le Plus Grand, Plus Puissant que toute Sa création. Il est plus puissant que la peur et l'effroi. Je cherche refuge auprès d'Allah, qui n'est digne d'être adoré que Lui. Il est Celui qui empêche les sept cieux de tomber sur la terre, sauf par Son ordre. [Je cherche refuge auprès de Toi Allah] contre le mal de Ton serviteur [nom de la personne], et de ses aides, ses partisans et ses partisans parmi les djinns et les humains. Ô Allah, sois mon soutien contre leur mal. Glorieux Tes louanges et puissant est Ton patronage. Béni soit Ton Nom, il n’y a pas de vrai Dieu à part Toi. (Récitez trois fois en arabe)
duas.phonetic: ((allahu aakbaru allahu aa'azu min khalqihi jamiy'aan allahu aa'azu mimaa aakhaafu waaahdharu aa'uwdhu biallahi aladhiy laa iilaha iilaa huwa almumsiki alsamawaati alsab'i aan yaqa'na 'alaa alaardi iilaa biiidhnihi min shari 'abdika fulaanin wajunuwdihi waaatbaa'ihi waaashyaa'ihi min aljini waaliinsi allahuma kun liy jaaraan min sharihim jala thanaauka wa'aza jaaruka watabaaraka asmuka walaa iilaha ghayruka)) (thlatha mraatin).

title_en: Invocation against an enemy

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ مُنْزِلَ الْكِتَابِ، سَرِيعَ الْحِسَابِ، اهْزِمِ الأَحْزَابَ، اللَّهُمَّ اهزِمْهُمْ وَزَلْزِلْهُمْ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, Revealer of the Book, Swift at reckoning, defeat the confederates. O Allah, defeat them and convulse them.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma munzilal-kitab, sareeAAal-hisab, ihzimil-ahzab, allahummah-zimhum wazalzilhum.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, Révélateur du Livre, Rapide à compter, bats les confédérés. Ô Allah, bats-les et convulse-les.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma munzilal-kitab, sareeAAal-hisab, ihzimil-ahzab, allahummah-zimhum wazalzilhum.

title_en: What to say if you fear people may harm you

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِيهِمْ بِمَا شِئْتَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, protect me from them with what You choose.)
duas.reference: (Allahummak-fineehim bima shi/.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, protège-moi d'eux avec ce que Tu choisis.)
duas.phonetic: Allahummak-fineehim bima shi/.

title_fr: Invocation quand on craint les gens

title_en: Invocations for if you are stricken by in your faith
title_ar: دعاء من أصابه شك في الإيمان

duas.arabic: ((يَسْتَعِيذُ بِاللَّهِ و يَنْتَهِي عَمَّا شك فِيهِ)).
duas.reference: (Say:) I seek refuge in Allah. (Then you should desist from doing what you are in doubt about.)
duas.phonetic: Say:) I seek refuge in Allah. (Then you should desist from doing what you are in doubt about.

duas.arabic: ((يَقُولُ: ((آمَنْتُ بِاللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِ)).
duas.translation_en: (He should say: (I have believed in Allah and His Messenger.))
duas.reference: (He should say: ( Amantu billahi warusulih.))
duas.translation_fr: (Il devrait dire : (J'ai cru en Allah et en Son Messager.))
duas.phonetic: He should say: ( Amantu billahi warusulih.

duas.arabic: ((يَقْرَأُ قَوْلَهُ تَعَالَى: ﴿هُوَ الْأوَّلُ وَالْآخِرُ وَالظّاهِرُ وَالْباطِنُ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عَلِيمٌ﴾)).
duas.translation_en: (He should also recite the following verse: (He is The First and The Last, Aththahir and Al-Batin and He knows well all things.)(ththahir: Indicates the greatness of His attributes and the insignificance of every single creation in respect to His greatness and Highness, for He is above all of His creation as regards His essence and attributes.)(Al-Batin: Indicates His awareness and knowledge of all secrets, of that which is in the hearts and the most intimate of things just as it indicates His closeness and nearness to all in a manner which befits His majesty.))
duas.reference: (He should also recite the following verse: ( Huwa al-awwalu, waal-akhiru, waalththahiru waalbatinu wahuwa bikulli shayin AAaleem))
duas.translation_fr: (Il doit également réciter le verset suivant : (Il est le Premier et le Dernier, Aththahir et Al-Batin et Il connaît bien toutes choses.)(ththahir : Indique la grandeur de Ses attributs et l'insignifiance de chaque création par rapport à Sa grandeur et Sa Majesté, car Il est au-dessus de toute Sa création en ce qui concerne Son essence et ses attributs.)(Al-Batin : Indique Sa conscience et sa connaissance de tous les secrets, de ce qui est dans les cœurs et le plus intime des les choses tout comme cela indique sa proximité et sa proximité avec tous d'une manière qui convient à sa majesté.))
duas.phonetic: He should also recite the following verse: ( Huwa al-awwalu, waal-akhiru, waalththahiru waalbatinu wahuwa bikulli shayin AAaleem

title_en: Invocations for the setting of a debt

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلاَلِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكِ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, make what is lawful enough for me, as opposed to what is unlawful, and spare me by Your grace, of need of others.)
duas.reference: (Allahummak-finee bihalalika AAan haramik, wa-aghninee bifadlika AAamman siwak.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, fais ce qui m'est assez licite, par opposition à ce qui est illicite, et épargne-moi, par Ta grâce, le besoin des autres.)
duas.phonetic: Allahummak-finee bihalalika AAan haramik, wa-aghninee bifadlika AAamman siwak.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ، وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I take refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, weakness and laziness, miserliness and cowardice, the burden of debts and from being over powered by men.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-hammi walhuzn, walAAajzi walkasal, walbukhl, waljubn, wadalAAid-dayni waghalabatir-rijal)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre l'anxiété et le chagrin, la faiblesse et la paresse, l'avarice et la lâcheté, le fardeau des dettes et contre la domination des hommes.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-hammi walhuzn, walAAajzi walkasal, walbukhl, waljubn, wadalAAid-dayni waghalabatir-rijal

title_en: Invocation against the distractions of Satan during the prayer and recitation of the Quran

duas.arabic: ((أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ، وَاتْفُلْ عَلَى يَسَارِكَ (ثلاثاً))).
duas.translation_en: (othman Ibn Al-AAas  narrated: I said ‘O Messenger of Allah, verily the devil comes between me and my prayer and recitation making me confused’ The Messenger of Allah  replied ‘That is a devil called Khanzab, so if you sense his presence then seek refuge in Allah from him and spit (A form of spitting comprising mainly of air with little spittle) on your left side three times.)
duas.translation_fr: (Othman Ibn Al-AAas a rapporté : J'ai dit : « Ô Messager d'Allah, en vérité, le diable s'interpose entre moi et ma prière et ma récitation, ce qui me rend confus. » Le Messager d'Allah a répondu : « C'est un diable appelé Khanzab, donc si vous sentez sa présence, cherchez refuge auprès de lui auprès d'Allah et crachez (une forme de crachat comprenant principalement de l'air avec peu de crachats) sur votre côté gauche trois fois.)
duas.phonetic: ((aa'uwdhu biallahi mina alshaytaani alrajiymi waatful 'alaa yasaarika (thlathaan))).

title_en: Invocation for when you find something becoming difficult for you

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ لاَ سَهْلَ إِلاَّ مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلاً، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلاً)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, there is no ease except in that which You have made easy, and You make the difficulty, if You wish, easy.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma la sahla illa ma jaAAaltahu sahla, wa-anta tajAAalul- hazana in shi'ta sahla.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, il n’y a de facilité que dans ce que Tu as rendu facile, et Tu rends la difficulté facile, si Tu le souhaites.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma la sahla illa ma jaAAaltahu sahla, wa-anta tajAAalul- hazana in shi'ta sahla.

title_en: What to say and do if you commit a sin
title_ar: ما يقول ويفعل من أذنب ذنباً

duas.arabic: ((مَا مِنْ عَبْدٍ يُذنِبُ ذَنْباً فَيُحْسِنُ الطُّهُورَ، ثُمَّ يَقُومُ فَيُصَلِّي رَكْعَتَيْنِ، ثُمَّ يَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ إِلاَّ غَفَرَ اللَّهُ لَهُ)).
duas.translation_en: (Any servant who commits a sin and as a result, performs ablution, prays two units of prayer (i.e. two rakAAas) and then seeks Allah’s forgiveness, Allah would forgive him.)
duas.translation_fr: (Tout serviteur qui commet un péché et qui, par conséquent, effectue ses ablutions, prie deux unités de prière (c'est-à-dire deux rakAAas) et demande ensuite le pardon d'Allah, Allah lui pardonnera.)
duas.phonetic: ((maa min 'abdin yudhnibu dhanbaan fayuhsinu altuhuwra thuma yaquwmu fayusaliy rak'atayni thuma yastaghfiru allaha iilaa ghafara allahu lahu)).

title_en: Invocations against the Devil and his promptings

duas.arabic: ((الْاسْتِعَاذَةُ بِاللَّهِ مِنْهُ)).
duas.translation_en: Seeking refuge from him.
duas.translation_fr: Cherchant refuge contre lui.
duas.phonetic: ((alasti'aadhahu biallahi minhu)).

duas.arabic: الْأَذَانُ
duas.translation_en: The Adhaan [call to prayer].
duas.translation_fr: L'Adhaan [appel à la prière].
duas.phonetic: alaadhaanu

duas.arabic: ((الْأَذْكَارُ وَقِرَاءَةُ الْقُرْآنِ)).
duas.translation_en: (Recitation of the Quran and the authentic texts of remembrance and supplications.)(e.g. ‘Do not make your homes like the graveyards, indeed the devils flee from the house in which soorat Al-Baqarah has been read’ related by Muslim 1/539, also supplication and remembrance for the morning & evening, before sleep, when getting up, entering and leaving the toilet, entering and leaving the mosque, the recitation of ayat Al-kursiyy and the last two verses of soorat Al-Baqarah before sleeping, the athan…etc.)
duas.translation_fr: (Récitation du Coran et des textes authentiques de souvenir et de supplications.) (par exemple « Ne faites pas de vos maisons comme des cimetières, en effet les diables fuient la maison dans laquelle la sourate Al-Baqarah a été lue » rapporté par Mouslim 1/539, également la supplication et le souvenir pour le matin et le soir, avant de dormir, en se levant, en entrant et en sortant des toilettes, en entrant et en sortant de la mosquée, la récitation de l'ayat Al-kursiyy et les deux derniers versets de la sourate Al-Baqarah avant de dormir, l'athan…etc.)
duas.phonetic: ((alaadhkaaru waqiraa'ahu alquraani)).

title_fr: Invocations contre le diable et ses suggestions

title_en: Invocation for when something you dislike happens, or for when you fail to achieve what you attempt to do
title_ar: الدعاء حينما يقع مالا يرضاه أو غلب على أمره

duas.arabic: ((قَدَرُ اللَّهُ وَمَا شَاءَ فَعَلَ)).
duas.translation_en: (Allah has decreed and what He wills, He does.)(for verily ‘If’ lets in the work of the devil.)
duas.reference: (Qaddaral-lah, wama shaa faAAal.)
duas.translation_fr: (Allah a décrété et ce qu’Il ​​veut, Il le fait.)(car en vérité « Si » laisse entrer l’œuvre du diable.)
duas.phonetic: Qaddaral-lah, wama shaa faAAal.

title_en: Congratulations for new parents and how they should respond

duas.arabic: ((بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فِي الْمَوْهُوبِ لَكَ، وَشَكَرْتَ الْوَاهِبَ، وَبَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُ، وَرُزِقْتَ بِرَّهُ)). وَيَرُدُّ عَلَيْهِ الْمُهَــــــنَّأُ فَيَقُولُ: ((بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ وَبَارَكَ عَلَيْكَ، وَجَزَاكَ اللَّهُ خَيْراً، وَرَزَقَكَ اللَّهُ مِثْلَهُ، وَأَجْزَلَ ثَوَابَكَ)).
duas.translation_en: May Allah bless you with His gift to you and may you (the new parent) give thanks, may the child reach the maturity of years, and may you be granted its righteousness. The reply of the person being congratulated is to say: May Allah bless you, and shower His blessings upon you, and may Allah reward you well and bestow upon you its like and reward you abundantly
duas.reference: Baarakallaahu laka fil-mawhoobi laka, wa shakartal-waahiba, wa balagha 'ashuddahu, wa ruzigta birrahu.  The reply of the person being congratulated is to say: Baarakallahu laka wa baaraka 'alayka, wa jazaakallaahu khayran, wa razaqakallaahu mithlahu, wa 'ajzala thawaabaka.
duas.translation_fr: Qu'Allah vous bénisse avec Son don et que vous (le nouveau parent) lui rendiez grâce, que l'enfant atteigne la maturité et que sa justice vous soit accordée. La réponse de la personne félicitée est de dire : Qu'Allah vous bénisse et vous comble de Ses bénédictions, et qu'Allah vous récompense bien et vous accorde son pareil et vous récompense abondamment.
duas.phonetic: ((baaraka allahu laka fiy almawhuwbi laka washakarta alwaahiba wabalagha aashudahu waruziqta birahu)). wayarudu 'alayhi almuhanaau fayaquwlu: ((baaraka allahu laka wabaaraka 'alayka wajazaaka allahu khayraan warazaqaka allahu mithlahu waaajzala thawaabaka)).

title_en: How to seek Allah's protection for children

duas.arabic: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم يُعَوِّذُ الحَسَنَ وَالحُسَينَ رضي الله عنهما ((أُعِيذُكُمَا بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ، وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لاَمَّةٍ)).
duas.translation_en: (Ibn AAabbas related that the Messenger of Allah  used to commend Al-Hasan and Al-Husayn to Allah’s protection, saying:(I commend you two to the protection of Allah’s perfect words from every devil, vermin, and every evil eye.))
duas.reference: (Ibn AAabbas related that the Messenger of Allah  used to commend Al-Hasan and Al-Husayn to Allah’s protection, saying:(OAAeethukuma bikalimatil-lahit-tammah, min kulli shaytanin wahammah, wamin kulli AAaynin lammah.))
duas.translation_fr: (Ibn AAabbas a rapporté que le Messager d'Allah avait l'habitude de recommander Al-Hasan et Al-Husayn à la protection d'Allah, en disant : (Je vous recommande tous deux à la protection des paroles parfaites d'Allah contre tout diable, vermine et tout mauvais œil.))
duas.phonetic: Ibn AAabbas related that the Messenger of Allah  used to commend Al-Hasan and Al-Husayn to Allah’s protection, saying:(OAAeethukuma bikalimatil-lahit-tammah, min kulli shaytanin wahammah, wamin kulli AAaynin lammah.

title_fr: Comment demander la protection d'Allah pour les enfants

title_en: Invocations for visiting the sick

duas.arabic: ((لاَ بأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ)).
duas.translation_en: (Never mind, may it (the sickness) be a purification, if Allah wills.)
duas.reference: (La ba'sa tahoorun in shaal-lah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Peu importe, que (la maladie) soit une purification, si Allah le veut.)
duas.phonetic: La ba'sa tahoorun in shaal-lah.

duas.arabic: ((أَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْعَظيمَ رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ أَنْ يَشْفيَكَ)) (سبع مرات).
duas.translation_en: (I ask Allah The Supreme, Lord of the magnificent throne to cure you’.(7times) (he (the sick person) will be cured.))
duas.reference: (Asalul-lahal-AAatheem rabbal-AAarshil-AAatheem an yashfeek (7times).)
duas.translation_fr: (Je demande à Allah Le Suprême, Seigneur du trône magnifique de vous guérir. (7 fois) (il (le malade) sera guéri.))
duas.phonetic: Asalul-lahal-AAatheem rabbal-AAarshil-AAatheem an yashfeek (7times).

title_en: The reward for visiting the sick

duas.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم: ((إِذَا عَادَ الرَّجُلُ أَخَاهُ الْمُسْلِمَ مَشَى فِي خِرَافَةِ الْجَنَّةِ حَتَّى يَجْلِسَ، فَإِذَا جَلَسَ غَمَرَتْهُ الرَّحْمَةُ، فَإِنْ كَانَ غُدْوَةً صَلَّى عَلَيْهِ سَبْعُونَ أَلْفَ مَلَكٍ حَتَّى يُمْسِيَ، وَإِنْ كَانَ مَسَاءً صَلَّى عَلَيْهِ سَبْعُونَ أَلْفَ مَلَكٍ حَتَّى يُصْبِحَ)).
duas.translation_en: (Ali Ibn Abee Talib  related that he heard the Messenger of Allah  say: ‘If a man calls on his sick Muslim brother, it is as if he walks reaping the fruits of Paradise until he sits, and when he sits he is showered in mercy, and if this was in the morning, seventy thousand angles send prayers upon him until the evening, and if this was in the evening, seventy thousand angles send prayers upon him until the morning.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ali Ibn Abee Talib a raconté qu'il a entendu le Messager d'Allah dire : « Si un homme appelle son frère musulman malade, c'est comme s'il marchait en récoltant les fruits du paradis jusqu'à ce qu'il s'assoie, et quand il s'assoit, il est comblé de miséricorde, et si c'était le matin, soixante-dix mille angles envoient des prières sur lui jusqu'au soir, et si c'était le soir, soixante-dix mille angles envoient des prières sur lui jusqu'au matin.)
duas.phonetic: qaala alnabiyu sla allh 'lyh wslm: ((iidhaa 'aada alrajulu aakhaahu almuslima mashaa fiy khiraafahi aljanahi hataa yajlisa faiidhaa jalasa ghamarathu alrahmahu faiin kaana ghudwahan salaa 'alayhi sab'uwna aalfa malakin hataa yumsiya waiin kaana masaa'an salaa 'alayhi sab'uwna aalfa malakin hataa yusbiha)).

title_en: Invocations of the terminal ill
title_ar: دعاء المريض الذي يئس من حياته

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي، وَارْحَمْنِي، وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالرَّفِيقِ الْأَعْلَى)).
duas.translation_en: ‘O Allaah, forgive me, have mercy upon me and unite me with the highest companions
duas.reference: (Allahummagh-fir lee, warhamnee wa-alhiqnee birrafeeqil-aAAla.)
duas.translation_fr: « Ô Allah, pardonne-moi, aie pitié de moi et unis-moi aux plus hauts compagnons
duas.phonetic: Allahummagh-fir lee, warhamnee wa-alhiqnee birrafeeqil-aAAla.

duas.arabic: ((جَعَلَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم عِنْدَ مَوْتِهِ يُدْخِلُ يَدَيْهِ فِي الْمَاءِ فَيَمْسَحُ بِهِمَا وَجْهَهُ، وَيَقُولُ: لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ إِنَّ لِلْمَوْتِ سَكَرَاتٍ)).
duas.translation_en: 'Aa.ishah (radhi-yAllaahu 'anhaa) related that The Prophet (sal-Allaahu 'alayhe wa sallam) [during his illness in which he passed away] would dip his hands in water and then he would wipe his face and say: ‘None has the right to be worshipped except Allaah, death does indeed contain agony.’
duas.reference: 'Aa.ishah (radhi-yAllaahu 'anhaa) related that The Prophet (sal-Allaahu 'alayhe wa sallam) [during his illness in which he passed away] would dip his hands in water and then he would wipe his face and say:[La ilaha illal-lah, inna lilmawti lasakarat.] ‘None has the right to be worshipped except Allaah, death does indeed contain agony.’
duas.translation_fr: 'Aishah (radhi-yAllaahu 'anhaa) a raconté que le Prophète (sal-Allaahu 'alayhe wa sallam) [pendant sa maladie dans laquelle il est décédé] trempait ses mains dans l'eau, puis il s'essuyait le visage et disait : « Nul n'a le droit d'être adoré sauf Allah, la mort contient en effet l'agonie. »
duas.phonetic: ((ja'ala alnabiyu sla allh 'lyh wslm 'inda mawtihi yudkhilu yadayhi fiy almaa'i fayamsahu bihimaa wajhahu wayaquwlu: laa iilaha iilaa allahu iina lilmawti sakaraatin)).

duas.arabic: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ لَهُ المُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ)).
duas.translation_en: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah and Allah is the greatest.None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone.None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner.None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise.  None has the right to be worshipped except Allah and there is no might and no power except with Allah.)
duas.reference: (La ilaha illal-lah, wallahu akbar, la ilaha illal-lahu wahdah, la shareeka lah, la ilaha illal-lahu lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, la ilaha illal-lah, wala hawla wala quwwata illa billah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Nul n’a le droit d’être adoré sauf Allah et Allah est le plus grand. Nul n’a le droit d’être adoré sauf Allah, seul. Nul n’a le droit d’être adoré sauf Allah, seul, sans associé. Nul n’a le droit d’être adoré sauf Allah, à Lui appartiennent toute souveraineté et louange. Nul n’a le droit d’être adoré sauf Allah, et il n’y a de force ni de pouvoir qu’avec Allah.)
duas.phonetic: La ilaha illal-lah, wallahu akbar, la ilaha illal-lahu wahdah, la shareeka lah, la ilaha illal-lahu lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, la ilaha illal-lah, wala hawla wala quwwata illa billah.

title_fr: Invocations du malade en phase terminale

title_en: What to encourage the dying person to say

duas.arabic: ((مَنْ كَانَ آخِرُ كَلاَمِهِ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ دَخَلَ الْجَنَّةَ)).
duas.translation_en: i.e. those around the sick should instruct and encourage him to say the shahadah. (He whose last words are: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah.) will enter Paradise.)
duas.reference: i.e. those around the sick should instruct and encourage him to say the shahadah. (He whose last words are: (La ilaha illal-lah.) will enter Paradise.)
duas.translation_fr: c'est-à-dire que ceux qui entourent le malade doivent l'instruire et l'encourager à dire la shahadah. (Celui dont les dernières paroles sont : (Nul n’a le droit d’être adoré sauf Allah.) entrera au Paradis.)
duas.phonetic: ((man kaana aakhiru kalaamihi laa iilaha iilaa allahu dakhala aljanaha)).

title_en: Invocation for when tragedy strikes

duas.arabic: ((إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ، اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي، وَأَخْلِفْ لِي خَيْرَاً مِنْهَا)).
duas.translation_en: (To Allah we belong and unto Him is our return.O Allah, recompense me for my affliction and replace it for me with something better.)
duas.reference: (Inna lillahi wa-inna ilayhi rajiAAoon, allahumma/- jurnee fee museebatee wakhluf lee khayran minha.)
duas.translation_fr: (A Allah nous appartenons et à Lui est notre retour. Ô Allah, récompense-moi de mon affliction et remplace-la pour moi par quelque chose de meilleur.)
duas.phonetic: Inna lillahi wa-inna ilayhi rajiAAoon, allahumma/- jurnee fee museebatee wakhluf lee khayran minha.

title_en: Invocation for closing the eyes of the dead

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِفُلاَنٍ (بِاسْمِهِ) وَارْفَعْ دَرَجَتَهُ فِي الْمَهْدِيِّينَ، وَاخْلُفْهُ فِي عَقِبِهِ فِي الْغَابِرِينَ، وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلَهُ  يَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ، وَافْسَحْ لَهُ فِي قَبْرِهِ، وَنَوِّرْ لَهُ فِيهِ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, forgive -here the name of the deceased is mentioned- and raise his rank among the rightly guided, and be a successor to whom he has left behind, and forgive us and him O Lord of the worlds.  Make spacious his grave and illuminate it for him.)(A successor: one who succeeds another due to the latter’s absence or death. This is the correct meaning of the word khaleefah; thus, it is incorrect to believe that Adam is the khaleefah (vicegerent, as is commonly translated) of Allah on earth because Allah is never absent, and will never die.  This supplication proves the correct understanding of this term and shows that Allah succeeds us and guards whom we leave behind when we die or are absent (also refer to supplication #198).)
duas.reference: (Allahummagh-fir li-name the dead- warfaAA darajatahu fil-mahdiyyeen, wakhlufhu fee AAaqibihi fil-ghabireen, waghfir lana walahu ya rabbal-AAalameen wafsah lahu fee qabrih, wanawwir lahu feeh.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, pardonne - ici le nom du défunt est mentionné - et élève son rang parmi les bien guidés, et sois le successeur de celui qu'il a laissé derrière lui, et pardonne à nous et à lui, ô Seigneur des mondes. Agrandis sa tombe et illumine-la pour lui.)(Un successeur : celui qui succède à un autre en raison de l'absence ou de la mort de ce dernier. C'est le sens correct du mot khaleefah ; il est donc incorrect de croire qu'Adam est le khaleefah (vice-gérant, comme on le traduit communément) de Allah sur terre parce qu'Allah n'est jamais absent et ne mourra jamais. Cette supplication prouve la compréhension correcte de ce terme et montre qu'Allah nous succède et garde ceux que nous laissons derrière nous lorsque nous mourons ou sommes absents (voir également la supplication #198).)
duas.phonetic: Allahummagh-fir li-name the dead- warfaAA darajatahu fil-mahdiyyeen, wakhlufhu fee AAaqibihi fil-ghabireen, waghfir lana walahu ya rabbal-AAalameen wafsah lahu fee qabrih, wanawwir lahu feeh.

title_fr: Invocation en fermant les yeux du defunt

title_en: Invocations for the dead in the Funeral prayer

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَهُ وَارْحَمْهُ، وَعَافِهِ، وَاعْفُ عَنْهُ، وَأَكْرِمْ نُزُلَهُ، وَوَسِّعْ مُدْخَلَهُ، وَاغْسِلْهُ بِالْمَاءِ وَالثَّلْجِ وَالْبَرَدِ، وَنَقِّهِ مِنَ الْخَطَايَا كَمَا نَقَّيْتَ الثَّوْبَ الأَبْيَضَ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ، وَأَبْدِلْهُ دَاراً خَيْراً مِنْ دَارِهِ، وَأَهْلاً خَيْراً مِنْ أَهْلِهِ، وَزَوْجَاً خَيْراً مِنْ زَوْجِهِ، وَأَدْخِلْهُ الْجَنَّةَ، وَأَعِذْهُ مِنْ عَذَابِ القَبْرِ [وَعَذَابِ النَّارِ])).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, forgive and have mercy upon him, excuse him and pardon him, and make honourable his reception. Expand his entry, and cleanse him with water, snow, and ice, and purify him of sin as a white robe is purified of filth.  Exchange his home for a better home, and his family for a better family, and his spouse for a better spouse. Admit him into the Garden, protect him from the punishment of the grave and the torment of the Fire.)
duas.reference: (Allahummagh-fir lahu warhamh, waAAafihi, waAAfu AAanh, wa-akrim nuzulah, wawassiAA mudkhalah, waghsilhu bilma-i waththalji walbarad, wanaqqihi minal-khataya kama naqqaytath-thawbal-abyada minad-danas, wa-abdilhu daran khayran min darih, wa-ahlan khayran min ahlih wazawjan khayran min zawjih, wa-adkhilhul-jannah, wa-aAAithhu min AAathabil-qabr, waAAathabin-nar)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, pardonne-lui et aie pitié de lui, excuse-lui et pardonne-lui, et rends son accueil honorable. Élargis son entrée, et purifie-le avec de l'eau, de la neige et de la glace, et purifie-le du péché comme une robe blanche est purifiée de la saleté. Échange sa maison contre une meilleure maison, et sa famille contre une meilleure famille, et son épouse contre une meilleure épouse. Admets-le dans le Jardin, protège-le du châtiment de la tombe et du tourment du Feu.)
duas.phonetic: Allahummagh-fir lahu warhamh, waAAafihi, waAAfu AAanh, wa-akrim nuzulah, wawassiAA mudkhalah, waghsilhu bilma-i waththalji walbarad, wanaqqihi minal-khataya kama naqqaytath-thawbal-abyada minad-danas, wa-abdilhu daran khayran min darih, wa-ahlan khayran min ahlih wazawjan khayran min zawjih, wa-adkhilhul-jannah, wa-aAAithhu min AAathabil-qabr, waAAathabin-nar

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِحَيِّنَا وَمَيِّتِنَا، وَشَاهِدِنَا وَغَائِبِنَا، وَصَغِيرِنَا وَكَبيرِنَا، وَذَكَرِنَا وَأُنْثَانَا. اللَّهُمَّ مَنْ أَحْيَيْتَهُ مِنَّا فَأَحْيِهِ عَلَى الْإِسْلاَمِ، وَمَنْ تَوَفَّيْتَهُ مِنَّا فَتَوَفَّهُ عَلَى الإِيمَانِ، اللَّهُمَّ لاَ تَحْرِمْنَا أَجْرَهُ، وَلاَ تُضِلَّنَا بَعْدَهُ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, forgive our living and our dead, those present and those absent, our young and our old, our males and our females.  O Allah, whom amongst us You keep alive, then let such a life be upon Islam, and whom amongst us You take unto Yourself, then let such a death be upon faith.  O Allah, do not deprive us of his reward and do not let us stray after him.)
duas.reference: (Allahummagh-fir lihayyina wamayyitina washahidina, wagha-ibina, wasagheerina wakabeerina, wathakarina wa-onthana. Allahumma man ahyaytahu minna fa-ahyihi AAalal-islam, waman tawaffaytahu minna fatawaffahu AAalal-eeman, allahumma la tahrimna ajrah, wala tudillana baAAdah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, pardonne nos vivants et nos morts, les présents et les absents, nos jeunes et nos vieux, nos mâles et nos femelles. Ô Allah, que Tu maintiens en vie parmi nous, alors qu'une telle vie repose sur l'Islam, et que Tu prends pour Toi parmi nous, qu'une telle mort soit sur la foi. Ô Allah, ne nous prive pas de sa récompense et ne nous laisse pas égarer après lui.)
duas.phonetic: Allahummagh-fir lihayyina wamayyitina washahidina, wagha-ibina, wasagheerina wakabeerina, wathakarina wa-onthana. Allahumma man ahyaytahu minna fa-ahyihi AAalal-islam, waman tawaffaytahu minna fatawaffahu AAalal-eeman, allahumma la tahrimna ajrah, wala tudillana baAAdah.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ فُلاَنَ بْنَ فُلاَنٍ فِي ذِمَّتِكَ، وَحَبْلِ جِوَارِكَ، فَقِهِ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْقَبْرِ، وَعَذَابِ النَّارِ، وَأَنْتَ أَهْلُ الْوَفَاءِ وَالْحَقِّ، فَاغْفِرْ لَهُ وَارْحَمْهُ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الغَفُورُ الرَّحيمُ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, so-and-so is under Your care and protection so protect him from the trial of the grave and torment of the Fire.  Indeed You are faithful and truthful. Forgive and have mercy upon him, surely You are The Oft-Forgiving, The Most-Merciful.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma inna -name the dead- fee thimmatik, wahabli jiwarik, faqihi min fitnatil-qabr waAAathabin-nar, wa-anta ahlul-wafa/, walhaq, faghfir lahu warhamh, innaka antal-ghafoorur-raheem.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, un tel est sous Tes soins et ta protection, alors protège-le de l'épreuve de la tombe et des tourments du Feu. En effet, Tu es fidèle et véridique. Pardonne-lui et aie pitié de lui, tu es sûrement Le Pardonneur et le Miséricordieux.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma inna -name the dead- fee thimmatik, wahabli jiwarik, faqihi min fitnatil-qabr waAAathabin-nar, wa-anta ahlul-wafa/, walhaq, faghfir lahu warhamh, innaka antal-ghafoorur-raheem.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ عَبْدُكَ وَابْنُ أَمَتِكَ احْتَاجَ إِلَى رَحْمَتِكَ، وَأَنْتَ غَنِيٌّ عَنْ عَذَابِهِ، إِنْ كَانَ مُحْسِناً فَزِدْ فِي حَسَنَاتِهِ، وَإِنْ كَانَ مُسِيئاً فَتَجَاوَزْ عَنْهُ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, Your servant and the son of Your maidservant is in need of Your mercy and You are without need of his punishment. If he was righteous then increase his reward and if he was wicked then look over his sins.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma AAabduka wabnu amatik, ihtaja ila rahmatik, wa-anta ghaniyyun AAan AAathabih, in kana muhsinan fazid fee hasanatih, wa-in kana museean fatajawaz AAanh.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, ton serviteur et le fils de ta servante ont besoin de ta miséricorde et tu n'as pas besoin de son châtiment. S'il était juste, augmente sa récompense et s'il était méchant, regarde ses péchés.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma AAabduka wabnu amatik, ihtaja ila rahmatik, wa-anta ghaniyyun AAan AAathabih, in kana muhsinan fazid fee hasanatih, wa-in kana museean fatajawaz AAanh.

title_en: Invocations for a child in the Funeral prayer

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَعِذْهُ مِنْ عَذَابِ القَبْرِ)) وإن قال: ((اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْهُ فَرَطاً وَذُخْراً لِوَالِدَيْهِ، وَشَفِيعاً مُجَاباً، اللَّهُمَّ ثَقِّلْ بِهِ مَوَازِينَهُمَا، وَأَعْظِمْ بِهِ أُجورَهُمَا، وَأَلْحِقْهُ بِصَالِحِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ، وَاجْعَلْهُ فِي كَفَالَةِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، وَقِهِ بِرَحْمَتِكَ عَذَابَ الْجَحِيمِ، وَأَبْدِلْهُ دَاراً خَيْراً مِنْ دَارِهِ، وَأَهْلاً خَيْراً مِنْ أَهْلِهِ، اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِأَسْلاَفِنَا، وَأَفْرَاطِنَا، وَمَنْ سَبَقَنَا بِالْإِيمَانِ)) إن قال ذلك فَحَسَنٌ.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, protect him from the torment of the grave . [it is also good to say] O Allah, make him a precursor, a forerunner and a treasure for his parents and an answered intercessor. O Allah, make him weigh heavily in their scales (of good)  and magnify their reward. Make him join the righteous of the believers. Place him in the care of Ibrahim. Save him by Your mercy from the torment of Hell. Give him a home better than his home and a family better than his family. O Allah, forgive those who have gone (i.e. passed away) before us, our children lost (by death), and those who have preceded us in Faith.
duas.reference: (Allaahumma 'a'ith-hu min 'athaabil-qabri.) [or say:](Allahummaj-AAalhu faratan, wathukhran liwalidayh, washafeeAAan mujaban. Allahumma thaqqil bihi mawazeenahuma wa-aAAthim bihi ojoorahuma, wa-alhiqhu bisalihil-mu'mineen, wajAAalhu fee kafalati Ibraheem, waqihi birahmatika AAathabal-jaheem, wa 'abdilhu daaran khayran min daarihi, wa 'ahlan khayran min 'ahlihi, Allaahum-maghfir li'aslaafinaa, wa afraatinaa wa man sabaqanaa bil'eemaan)
duas.translation_fr: Ô Allah, protège-le des tourments de la tombe. [il est également bon de dire] Ô Allah, fais de lui un précurseur, un précurseur et un trésor pour ses parents et un intercesseur exaucé. Ô Allah, fais-le peser lourdement dans leur balance (du bien) et magnifie leur récompense. Faites-le rejoindre les justes des croyants. Confiez-le aux soins d'Ibrahim. Sauve-le par Ta miséricorde des tourments de l'Enfer. Donnez-lui un foyer meilleur que son foyer et une famille meilleure que sa famille. Ô Allah, pardonne à ceux qui sont partis (c'est-à-dire décédés) avant nous, à nos enfants perdus (par la mort) et à ceux qui nous ont précédés dans la foi.
duas.phonetic: Allaahumma 'a'ith-hu min 'athaabil-qabri.) [or say:](Allahummaj-AAalhu faratan, wathukhran liwalidayh, washafeeAAan mujaban. Allahumma thaqqil bihi mawazeenahuma wa-aAAthim bihi ojoorahuma, wa-alhiqhu bisalihil-mu'mineen, wajAAalhu fee kafalati Ibraheem, waqihi birahmatika AAathabal-jaheem, wa 'abdilhu daaran khayran min daarihi, wa 'ahlan khayran min 'ahlihi, Allaahum-maghfir li'aslaafinaa, wa afraatinaa wa man sabaqanaa bil'eemaan

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْهُ لَنَا فَرَطاً، وَسَلَفاً، وَأَجْراً)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, make him for us a precursor,a forerunner and a cause of reward)
duas.reference: (Allahummaj-AAalhu lana farata, wasalafan wa-ajra.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, fais-en pour nous un précurseur, un précurseur et une cause de récompense)
duas.phonetic: Allahummaj-AAalhu lana farata, wasalafan wa-ajra.

title_en: Invocation for the bereaved

duas.arabic: ((إِنَّ للَّهِ مَا أَخَذَ، وَلَهُ مَا أَعْطَى، وَكُلُّ شَيْءٍ عِنْدَهُ بِأَجَلٍ مُسَمَّى... فَلْتَصْبِرْ وَلْتَحْتَسِبْ)). وَإِنْ قَالَ: ((أَعْظَمَ اللَّهُ أَجْرَكَ، وَأَحْسَنَ عَزَاءَكَ، وَغَفَرَ لِمَيِّتِكَ)) فَحَسَنٌ.
duas.translation_en: (Verily to Allah, belongs what He took and to Him belongs what He gave, and everything with Him has an appointed time…and then he  ordered for her to be patient and hope for Allah’s reward.)(The words (faltasbir waltahtasib) are commands in the feminine 3rd person form, so they will need to be changed in respect to whom is being addressed.)
duas.reference: (Inna lillahi ma akhath, walahu ma aAAta, wakullu shayin AAindahu bi-ajalin musamma…faltasbir waltahtasib.)
duas.translation_fr: (En vérité, à Allah appartient ce qu’Il ​​a pris et à Lui appartient ce qu’Il ​​a donné, et tout avec Lui a un temps fixé… puis il lui a ordonné d’être patiente et d’espérer la récompense d’Allah.)(Les mots (faltasbir waltahtasib) sont des commandements à la 3ème personne du féminin, ils devront donc être modifiés en fonction de la personne à qui ils s’adressent.)
duas.phonetic: Inna lillahi ma akhath, walahu ma aAAta, wakullu shayin AAindahu bi-ajalin musamma…faltasbir waltahtasib.

title_en: Invocation to be recited when placing the dead in his grave

duas.arabic: ((بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَعَلَى سُنَّةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ)).
duas.translation_en: (In the name of Allah and upon the sunnah of the Messenger of Allah.)
duas.reference: (Bismil-lahi waAAala sunnati rasoolil-lah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Au nom d'Allah et selon la sunna du Messager d'Allah.)
duas.phonetic: Bismil-lahi waAAala sunnati rasoolil-lah.

title_fr: Invocation en placant le defunt dans la tombe

title_en: Invocation to be recited after burying the dead

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَهُ، اللَّهُمَّ ثَبِّتْهُ)).
duas.translation_en: O Allah, forgive him. O Allah, strengthen him
duas.reference: Allaahum-maghfir lahu Allaahumma thabbithu
duas.translation_fr: Ô Allah, pardonne-lui. Ô Allah, fortifie-le
duas.phonetic: ((allahuma aghfir lahu allahuma thabithu)).

title_en: Invocation for visiting the graves

duas.arabic: ((السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ أَهْلَ الدِّيَارِ، مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُسْلِمِينَ، وَإِنَّا إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ بِكُمْ لاَحِقُونَ، [وَيَرْحَمُ اللَّهُ الْمُسْتَقدِمِينَ مِنَّا وَالْمُسْتأْخِرِينَ] أَسْاَلُ اللَّهَ لَنَا وَلَكُمُ الْعَافِيَةَ)).
duas.translation_en: (Peace be upon you all, O inhabitants of the graves, amongst the believers and the Muslims. Verily we will, Allah willing, be united with you, we ask Allah for well-being for us and you.)
duas.reference: (Assalamu AAalaykum ahlad-diyari minal-mu/mineena walmuslimeen, wa-inna in shaal-lahu bikum lahiqoon, nas-alul-laha lana walakumul-AAafiyah.)
duas.translation_fr: (La paix soit sur vous tous, ô habitants des tombes, parmi les croyants et les musulmans. En vérité, si Allah le veut, nous serons unis à vous, nous demandons à Allah le bien-être pour nous et pour vous.)
duas.phonetic: Assalamu AAalaykum ahlad-diyari minal-mu/mineena walmuslimeen, wa-inna in shaal-lahu bikum lahiqoon, nas-alul-laha lana walakumul-AAafiyah.

title_en: Invocations for when the wind blows

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْــــــأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I ask You for it’s goodness and I take refuge with You from it’s evil.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee as-aluka khayraha wa-aAAoothu bika min sharriha.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je Te demande sa bonté et je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre son mal.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee as-aluka khayraha wa-aAAoothu bika min sharriha.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا، وَخَيْرَ مَا فِيهَا، وَخَيْرَ مَا أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا، وَشَرِّ مَا فِيهَا، وَشَرِّ مَا أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I ask You for it’s goodness, the good within it, and the good it was sent with, and I take refuge with You from it’s evil, the evil within it, and from the evil it was sent with.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma innee as-aluka khayraha wakhayra ma feeha, wakhayra ma orsilat bih, wa-aAAoothu bika min sharriha, washarri ma feeha washarri ma orsilat bih.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je Te demande sa bonté, le bien qu’il contient et le bien avec lequel il a été envoyé, et je me réfugie auprès de Toi contre son mal, le mal qu’il contient et le mal avec lequel il a été envoyé.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma innee as-aluka khayraha wakhayra ma feeha, wakhayra ma orsilat bih, wa-aAAoothu bika min sharriha, washarri ma feeha washarri ma orsilat bih.

title_en: Invocation for when it thunder

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي يُسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَالْمَلاَئِكةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ)).
duas.translation_en: (How perfect He is, (The One) Whom the thunder declares His perfection with His praise, as do the angles out of fear of Him.)
duas.reference: (Subhanal-lathee yusabbihur-raAAdu bihamdih, walmala-ikatu min kheefatih.)
duas.translation_fr: (Comme il est parfait, (Celui) dont le tonnerre déclare sa perfection avec sa louange, tout comme les angles par crainte de lui.)
duas.phonetic: Subhanal-lathee yusabbihur-raAAdu bihamdih, walmala-ikatu min kheefatih.

title_en: Some invocations for rain

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اسْقِنَا غَيْثاً مُغِيثاً مَرِيئاً مَرِيعاً، نَافِعاً غَيْرَ ضَارٍّ، عَاجِلاً غَيْرَ آجِلٍ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, send upon us helpful, wholesome and healthy rain, beneficial not harmful rain, now, not later.)
duas.reference: (Allahummas-qina ghaythan mugheethan maree-an mureeAAan, nafiAAan, ghayra dar, AAajilan ghayra ajil.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, envoie-nous une pluie utile, saine et saine, une pluie bénéfique et non nuisible, maintenant, pas plus tard.)
duas.phonetic: Allahummas-qina ghaythan mugheethan maree-an mureeAAan, nafiAAan, ghayra dar, AAajilan ghayra ajil.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَغِثْنَا، اللَّهُمَّ أَغِثْنَا، اللَّهُمَّ أَغِثْنَا)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, relieve us, O Allah, relieve us, O Allah, relieve us.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma aghithna, allahumma aghithna, allahumma aghithna.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, soulage-nous, Ô Allah, soulage-nous, Ô Allah, soulage-nous.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma aghithna, allahumma aghithna, allahumma aghithna.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ اسْقِ عِبَادَكَ، وَبَهَائِمَكَ، وَانْشُرْ رَحْمَتَكَ، وَأَحْيِي بَلَدَكَ الْمَيِّتَ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, provide water for Your servants and Your cattle, spread out Your mercy and resurrect Your dead land.)
duas.reference: (Allahummas-qi AAibadak, wabaha-imak, wanshur rahmatak, wa-ahyi baladakal-mayyit.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, donne de l'eau à tes serviteurs et à ton bétail, répands ta miséricorde et ressuscite ta terre morte.)
duas.phonetic: Allahummas-qi AAibadak, wabaha-imak, wanshur rahmatak, wa-ahyi baladakal-mayyit.

title_en: Invocation for when it rains

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّباً نَافِعاً)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, may it be a beneficial rain cloud.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma sayyiban nafiAAa.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, que ce soit un nuage de pluie bénéfique.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma sayyiban nafiAAa.

title_en: Supplication after it rains

duas.arabic: ((مُطِرْنَا بِفَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ)).
duas.translation_en: (We have been given rain by the grace and mercy of Allah.)
duas.reference: (Mutirna bifadlil-lahi warahmatih.)
duas.translation_fr: (Nous avons reçu de la pluie par la grâce et la miséricorde d'Allah.)
duas.phonetic: Mutirna bifadlil-lahi warahmatih.

title_en: Invocation for the withholding of the rain

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ حَوَالَيْنَا وَلاَ عَلَيْنَا، اللَّهُمَّ عَلَى الآكَامِ وَالظِّرَابِ، وَبُطُونِ الْأَوْدِيَةِ، وَمَنَابِتِ الشَّجَرِ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, let the rain fall around us and not upon us, O Allah, (let it fall) on the pastures, hills, valleys and the roots of trees.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma hawalayna wala AAalayna, allahumma AAalal-akami waththirab, wabutoonil-awdiyah, wamanabitish-shajar.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, que la pluie tombe autour de nous et non sur nous, Ô Allah, (qu'elle tombe) sur les pâturages, les collines, les vallées et les racines des arbres.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma hawalayna wala AAalayna, allahumma AAalal-akami waththirab, wabutoonil-awdiyah, wamanabitish-shajar.

title_en: Invocation for sighting the new moon

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُمَّ أَهِلَّهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالْأَمْنِ وَالْإِيمَانِ، وَالسَّلاَمَةِ وَالْإِسْلاَمِ، وَالتَّوْفِيقِ لِمَا تُحِبُّ رَبَّنَا وَتَرْضَى، رَبُّنَا وَرَبُّكَ اللَّهُ)).
duas.translation_en: (Allah is the greatest. O Allah, let the crescent loom above us in safety, faith, peace, and Islam, and in agreement with all that You love and pleases You. Our Lord and your Lord is Allah.)
duas.reference: (Allahu akbar, allahumma ahillahu AAalayna bil-amni wal-eeman, wassalamati wal-islam, wattawfeeiqi lima tuhibbu watarda, rabbuna warabbukal-lah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Allah est le plus grand. Ô Allah, que le croissant se dresse au-dessus de nous dans la sécurité, la foi, la paix et l'Islam, et en accord avec tout ce que Tu aimes et Te plaît. Notre Seigneur et ton Seigneur est Allah.)
duas.phonetic: Allahu akbar, allahumma ahillahu AAalayna bil-amni wal-eeman, wassalamati wal-islam, wattawfeeiqi lima tuhibbu watarda, rabbuna warabbukal-lah.

title_fr: Invocation en voyant le croissant de lune

title_en: Invocations for breaking the fast

duas.arabic: ((ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ وَابْتَلَّتِ العُرُوقُ، وَثَبَتَ الْأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ)).
duas.translation_en: (The thirst has gone and the veins are quenched, and reward is confirmed, if Allah wills.)
duas.reference: (Thahabath-thama-o wabtallatil-AAurooq, wathabatal-ajru in shaal-lah.)
duas.translation_fr: (La soif est partie, les veines sont étanches et la récompense est confirmée, si Allah le veut.)
duas.phonetic: Thahabath-thama-o wabtallatil-AAurooq, wathabatal-ajru in shaal-lah.

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ الَّتِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, I ask You by Your mercy which envelopes all things, that You forgive me.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma inne as-aluka birahmatikal-latee wasiAAat kulla shay, an taghfira lee.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, je Te demande par Ta miséricorde qui enveloppe toutes choses, de me pardonner.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma inne as-aluka birahmatikal-latee wasiAAat kulla shay, an taghfira lee.

title_en: Invocations before eating

duas.arabic: ((إِذَا أَكَلَ أَحَدُكُمْ طَعَاماً فَلْيَقُلْ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، فَإِنْ نَسِيَ فِي أَوَّلِهِ فَلْيَقُلْ بسمِ اللَّهِ فِي أَوَّلِهِ وَآخِرِهِ)).
duas.translation_en: (When you are about to eat, you should say:(Bismil-lah.)and if you forget to say it before starting, then you should say (when you remember):In the name of Allah in it’s beginning and end.)
duas.reference: (When you are about to eat, you should say:(Bismil-lah.)and if you forget to say it before starting, then you should say (when you remember):Bismil-lahi fee awwalihi wa-akhirih.)
duas.translation_fr: (Quand vous êtes sur le point de manger, vous devriez dire : (Bismil-lah.) et si vous oubliez de le dire avant de commencer, alors vous devriez dire (quand vous vous en souvenez) : Au nom d'Allah, au début et à la fin.)
duas.phonetic: When you are about to eat, you should say:(Bismil-lah.)and if you forget to say it before starting, then you should say (when you remember):Bismil-lahi fee awwalihi wa-akhirih.

duas.arabic: ((مَنْ أَطْعَمَهُ اللَّهُ الطَّعَامَ فَلْيَقُلْ: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ وَأَطْعِمْنَا خَيْراً مِنْهُ، وَمَنْ سَقَاهُ اللَّهُ لَبَناً فَلْيَقُلْ اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ وَزِدْنَا مِنْهُ)).
duas.translation_en: (Whomever Allah feeds, should say:(O Allah, bless it for us and feed us better than it.) and whomever Allah gives milk to drink should say:(O Allah, bless it for usand give us more of it.))
duas.reference: (Whomever Allah feeds, should say:(Allahumma barik lana feehi wa-atAAimna khayran minh.) and whomever Allah gives milk to drink should say:(Allahumma barik lana feehi wazidna minh.))
duas.translation_fr: (Celui qu'Allah nourrit, qu'il dise : (Ô Allah, bénis-le pour nous et nourris-nous mieux que lui.) et celui qu'Allah donne du lait à boire devrait dire : (Ô Allah, bénis-le pour nous et donne-nous-en davantage.))
duas.phonetic: Whomever Allah feeds, should say:(Allahumma barik lana feehi wa-atAAimna khayran minh.) and whomever Allah gives milk to drink should say:(Allahumma barik lana feehi wazidna minh.

title_en: Invocations after eating

duas.arabic: ((الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا، وَرَزَقَنِيهِ، مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلاَ قُوَّةٍ)).
duas.translation_en: (All praise is for Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any might nor power from myself.)
duas.reference: (Alhamdu lillahil-lathee atAAamanee hatha warazaqaneehi min ghayri hawlin minnee wala quwwah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Toute louange est à Allah qui m'a nourri de cela et me l'a fourni sans aucune puissance ni puissance de ma part.)
duas.phonetic: Alhamdu lillahil-lathee atAAamanee hatha warazaqaneehi min ghayri hawlin minnee wala quwwah.

duas.arabic: ((الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْداً كَثِيراً طَيِّباً مُبَارَكاً فِيهِ، غَيْرَ [مَكْفِيٍّ وَلاَ ] مُوَدَّعٍ، وَلاَ مُسْتَغْنَىً عَنْهُ رَبَّنَا)).
duas.translation_en: (Allah be praised with an abundant beautiful blessed praise, a never-ending praise, a praise which we will never bid farewell to and an indispensable praise, He is our Lord.)(There are other views as regards to the understanding of this supplication, from them: Allah be praised with an abundant beautiful blessed praise. He is The One Who is sufficient, feeds and is not fed. The One Who is longed for, along with that which is with Him and The One Who is needed, He is our Lord.)
duas.reference: (Alhamdu lillahi hamdan katheeran tayyiban mubarakan feeh, ghayra makfiyyin wala muwaddaAAin, wala mustaghnan AAanhu rabbuna.)
duas.translation_fr: (Qu'Allah soit loué d'une abondante et belle louange bénie, une louange sans fin, une louange à laquelle nous ne dirons jamais adieu et une louange indispensable, Il est notre Seigneur.)(Il existe d'autres points de vue concernant la compréhension de cette supplication, d'entre eux : Allah soit loué d'une abondante et belle louange bénie. Il est Celui qui suffit, nourrit et n'est pas nourri. Celui que l'on désire, ainsi que ce qui est avec Lui et Celui dont on a besoin, Il est Celui qui est suffisant, nourrit et n'est pas nourri. Celui qui est désiré, ainsi que ce qui est avec Lui et Celui dont on a besoin, Il est notre Seigneur.)
duas.phonetic: Alhamdu lillahi hamdan katheeran tayyiban mubarakan feeh, ghayra makfiyyin wala muwaddaAAin, wala mustaghnan AAanhu rabbuna.

title_en: A dinner guest's invocation for his host

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَهُمْ فِيمَا رَزَقْتَهُم، وَاغْفِرْ لَهُمْ وَارْحَمْهُمْ)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, bless for them, that which You have provided them, forgive them and have mercy upon them.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma barik lahum feema razaqtahum, waghfir lahum warhamhum.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, bénis pour eux ce que Tu leur as accordé, pardonne-leur et aie pitié d'eux.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma barik lahum feema razaqtahum, waghfir lahum warhamhum.

title_fr: Invocation de l'invite pour son hote

title_en: Invocation for someone who gives you drink or offers it to you
title_ar: الدعاء لمن سقاه أو إذا أراد ذلك

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَطْعِمْ مَنْ أَطْعَمَنِي، وَاسْقِ مَنْ سَقَانِي)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, feed him who fed me, and provide with drink him who provided me with drink.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma atAAim man atAAamanee wasqi man saqanee.)
duas.translation_fr: (Ô Allah, nourris celui qui m'a nourri et donne à boire à celui qui m'a donné à boire.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma atAAim man atAAamanee wasqi man saqanee.

title_fr: Invocation pour celui qui vous offre a boire

title_en: Invocation for a family who invites you to break your fast with them
title_ar: الدعاء إذا أفطر عند أهل بيت

duas.arabic: ((أَفْطَرَ عِنْدَكُمُ الصَّائِمُونَ، وَأَكَلَ طَعَامَكُمُ الْأَبْرَارُ، وَصَلَّتْ عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَلاَئِكَةُ)).
duas.translation_en: (May the fasting break their fast in your home, and may the dutiful and pious eat your food, and may the angles send prayers upon you.)
duas.reference: (Aftara AAindakumus-sa-imoon, wa-akala taAAamakumul-abrar, wasallat AAalaykumul-mala-ikah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Que les jeûneurs rompent leur jeûne dans votre maison, que les gens respectueux et pieux mangent votre nourriture, et que les angles vous envoient des prières.)
duas.phonetic: Aftara AAindakumus-sa-imoon, wa-akala taAAamakumul-abrar, wasallat AAalaykumul-mala-ikah.

title_fr: Invocation pour la famille qui vous invite a rompre le jeune

title_en: Invocation for someone who offers you food when you are fasting, which you decline
title_ar: دعاء الصائم إذا حضر الطعام ولم يفطر

duas.arabic: ((إِذَا دُعِيَ أَحَدُكُمْ فَلْيُجِبْ، فَإِنْ كَانَ صَائِماً فَلْيُصَلِّ، وَإِنْ كَانَ مُفْطِراً فَلْيَطْعَمْ)) ، وَمَعْنَى فَلْيُصَلِّ أَيْ فَلْيَدْعُ.
duas.reference: (If you are not invited (to a meal) then answer.  If  you happen to be fasting, then supplicate (for those present) and if you are not fasting, then eat.)
duas.phonetic: If you are not invited (to a meal) then answer.  If  you happen to be fasting, then supplicate (for those present) and if you are not fasting, then eat.

title_fr: Invocation quand on decline une offre de nourriture pendant le jeune

title_en: What to say when you are fasting and someone is rude to you
title_ar: ما يقول الصائم إذا سابه أحد

duas.arabic: ((إِنِّي صَائِمٌ، إِنِّي صَائِمٌ)).
duas.translation_en: (I am fasting, I am fasting.)
duas.reference: (Innee sa-im, innee sa-im.)
duas.translation_fr: (Je jeûne, je jeûne.)
duas.phonetic: Innee sa-im, innee sa-im.

title_fr: Que dire quand on jeune et qu'on est agresse

title_en: Invocation for when you see the first dates of the season

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِي ثَمَرِنَا، وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي مَدِينَتِنَا، وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي صَاعِنَا، وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي مُدِّنَا)).
duas.translation_en: (O Allah, bless our fruit for us, bless our town for us, bless our saAA for us and bless our mudd for us.)(A saAA is equivalent to four mudds and a mudd is equivalent to a dry measure of an average man’s two palms.)
duas.reference: (Allahumma barik lana fee thamarina, wabarik lana fee madeenatina, wabarik lana fee saAAina wabarik lana fee muddina.)
duas.translation_fr: (O Allah, bénis nos fruits pour nous, bénis notre ville pour nous, bénis notre saAA pour nous et bénis notre boue pour nous.)(Un saAA équivaut à quatre boues et une boue équivaut à une mesure sèche des deux paumes d'un homme moyen.)
duas.phonetic: Allahumma barik lana fee thamarina, wabarik lana fee madeenatina, wabarik lana fee saAAina wabarik lana fee muddina.

title_fr: Invocation en voyant les premiers fruits de la saison

title_en: Invocation for sneezing

duas.arabic: ((إِذَا عَطَسَ أَحَدُكُم فَلْيَقُلِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، وَلْيَقُلْ لَهُ أَخُوهُ أَوْ صَاحِبُهُ: يَرْحَمُكَ اللَّهُ، فَإِذَا قَالَ لَهُ: يَرحَمُكَ اللَّهُ، فَلْيَقُلْ: يَهْدِيكُمُ اللَّهُ وَيُصْلِحُ بَالَكُمْ)).
duas.translation_en: (When one of you sneezes he should say:(All praise if for Allah.) and his brother or companion should say to him: (May Allah have mercy upon you.) and he (i.e. the one who sneezed) replies back to him:(May Allah guide you and rectify your condition.))
duas.reference: (When one of you sneezes he should say:(Alhamdu lillah.) and his brother or companion should say to him: (Yarhamukal-lah.) and he (i.e. the one who sneezed) replies back to him:(Yahdeekumul-lahu wayuslihu balakum.))
duas.translation_fr: (Quand l'un de vous éternue, il doit dire : (Location à Allah.) et son frère ou compagnon doit lui dire : (Qu'Allah vous fasse miséricorde.) et il (c'est-à-dire celui qui a éternué) lui répond : (Qu'Allah vous guide et rectifie votre état.))
duas.phonetic: When one of you sneezes he should say:(Alhamdu lillah.) and his brother or companion should say to him: (Yarhamukal-lah.) and he (i.e. the one who sneezed) replies back to him:(Yahdeekumul-lahu wayuslihu balakum.

title_en: What to say to the disbeliever if he sneezes and praises Allah
title_ar: ما يقالُ للكافر إذا عطس فحمد الله

duas.arabic: ((يَهْدِيكُمُ اللَّهُ وَيُصْلِحُ بَالَكُمْ)).
duas.translation_en: (May Allah guide you and rectify your condition.)
duas.reference: (Yahdeekum wayuslihu balakum.)
duas.translation_fr: (Qu'Allah vous guide et rectifie votre état.)
duas.phonetic: Yahdeekum wayuslihu balakum.

title_en: Invocation for the groom

duas.arabic: ((بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ، وَبَارَكَ عَلَيْكَ، وَجَمَعَ بَيْنَكُمَا فِي خَيْرٍ)).
duas.translation_en: (May Allah bless for you (your spouse) and bless you, and may He unite both of you in goodness.)
duas.reference: (Barakal-lahu lak, wabaraka AAalayk, wajamaAAa baynakuma fee khayr.)
duas.translation_fr: (Qu'Allah vous bénisse (votre conjoint) et vous bénisse, et qu'Il vous unisse tous les deux dans la bonté.)
duas.phonetic: Barakal-lahu lak, wabaraka AAalayk, wajamaAAa baynakuma fee khayr.

title_en: The groom’s supplication on the wedding night or when buying an animal
title_ar: دعاء المتزوج لنفسه ودعاء شراء الدابة

duas.arabic: إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ أَحَدُكُمُ امْرَأَةً، أَوْ إِذَا اشْتَرَى خَادِماً فَلْيَقُلْ: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا، وَخَيْرَ مَا جَبَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا، وَشَرِّ مَا جَبَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ، وَإِذَا اشْتَرَى بَعِيراً فَلْيَأْخُذْ بِذِرْوَةِ سَنَامِهِ وَلْيَقُلْ مِثْلَ ذَلِكَ)).
duas.translation_en: (when you marry a woman or buy a maidservant, you should say:(O Allah, I ask You for the goodness within her and the goodness that you have made her inclined towards, and I take refuge with You from the evil within her and the evil that you have made her inclined towards.))(and if you buy a camel, then you should take hold of it’s hump and say likewise.)
duas.reference: (when you marry a woman or buy a maidservant, you should say: (Allahumma innee as-aluka khayraha wakhayra ma jabaltaha AAalayh, wa-aAAoothu bika min sharriha washarri ma jabaltaha AAalayh.))(and if you buy a camel, then you should take hold of it’s hump and say likewise.)
duas.translation_fr: (Quand vous épousez une femme ou achetez une servante, vous devez dire : (Ô Allah, je te demande le bien en elle et le bien vers lequel tu l'as incitée, et je me réfugie auprès de toi contre le mal en elle et le mal vers lequel tu l'as incitée.))(et si tu achètes un chameau, alors tu dois saisir sa bosse et dire de même.)
duas.phonetic: when you marry a woman or buy a maidservant, you should say: (Allahumma innee as-aluka khayraha wakhayra ma jabaltaha AAalayh, wa-aAAoothu bika min sharriha washarri ma jabaltaha AAalayh.))(and if you buy a camel, then you should take hold of it’s hump and say likewise.

title_en: Invocation to be recited before intercourse

duas.arabic: ((بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، اللَّهُمَّ جَنِّبْنَا الشَّيْطَانَ، وَجَنِّبِ الشَّيْطَانَ مَا رَزَقْتَنَا)).
duas.translation_en: (In the name of Allah. O Allah, keep the devil away from us and keep the devil away from what you have blessed us with.)
duas.reference: (Bismil-lah, allahumma jannibnash-shaytan, wajannibish-shaytana ma razaqtana.)
duas.translation_fr: (Au nom d'Allah. Ô Allah, éloigne le diable de nous et éloigne le diable de ce dont tu nous as bénis.)
duas.phonetic: Bismil-lah, allahumma jannibnash-shaytan, wajannibish-shaytana ma razaqtana.

title_en: Invocation for anger

duas.arabic: ((أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ)).
duas.translation_en: (I take refuge with Allah from the accursed devil.)
duas.reference: (aAAoothu billahi minash-shaytanir-rajeem.)
duas.translation_fr: (Je me réfugie auprès d'Allah contre le diable maudit.)
duas.phonetic: aAAoothu billahi minash-shaytanir-rajeem.

title_en: What to say if you see someone afflicted by misfortune

duas.arabic: ((الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي مِمَّا ابْتَلاَكَ بِهِ، وَفَضَّلَنِي عَلَى كَثِيرٍ مِمَّنْ خَلَقَ تَفْضِيلاً)).
duas.translation_en: (All praise is for Allah Who saved me from that which He tested you with and Who most certainly favoured me over much of His creation.)
duas.reference: (Alhamdu lillahil-lathee AAafanee mimmab-talaka bih, wafaddalanee AAala katheerin mimman khalaqa tafdeela.)
duas.translation_fr: (Toute louange est à Allah qui m'a sauvé de ce avec quoi Il vous a mis à l'épreuve et qui m'a très certainement favorisé sur une grande partie de Sa création.)
duas.phonetic: Alhamdu lillahil-lathee AAafanee mimmab-talaka bih, wafaddalanee AAala katheerin mimman khalaqa tafdeela.

title_en: What to say while sitting in an assembly

duas.arabic: ((عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ رضي الله عنه قَاَلَ: كَانَ يُعَدُّ لِرَسُولِ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِي الْمَجْلِسِ الوَاحِدِ مِائَةُ مَرَّةٍ مِنْ قَبْلِ أَنْ يَقُومَ: ((رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي، وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الغَفُورُ)).
duas.translation_en: (Ibn AAumar  said: It would be counted that the Messenger of Allah  would say one hundred times at any one sitting before getting up: (O my Lord, forgive me and turn towards me (to accept my repentance). Verily You are The Oft-Returning. The Oft-Forgiving.))
duas.reference: (Ibn AAumar  said: It would be counted that the Messenger of Allah  would say one hundred times at any one sitting before getting up: (Rabbigh-fir lee watub AAalay, innaka antat-tawwabul-ghafoor.))
duas.translation_fr: (Ibn AAumar a dit : On compterait que le Messager d'Allah dise cent fois à une personne assise avant de se lever : (Ô mon Seigneur, pardonne-moi et tourne-toi vers moi (pour accepter mon repentir). En vérité, Tu es Celui qui revient souvent. Celui qui pardonne souvent.))
duas.phonetic: Ibn AAumar  said: It would be counted that the Messenger of Allah  would say one hundred times at any one sitting before getting up: (Rabbigh-fir lee watub AAalay, innaka antat-tawwabul-ghafoor.

title_en: The Expiation of Assembly - Kaffaratul-Majlis

duas.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْكَ)).
duas.translation_en: (How perfect You are O Allah, and I praise You.  I bear witness that None has the right to be worshipped except You.  I seek Your forgiveness and turn to You in repentance.)
duas.reference: (Subhanakal-lahumma wabihamdik, ashhadu an la ilaha illa ant, astaghfiruka wa-atoobu ilayk.)
duas.translation_fr: (Comme Tu es parfait, ô Allah, et je Te loue. J'atteste que nul n'a le droit d'être adoré en dehors de Toi. Je recherche Ton pardon et me tourne vers Toi dans la repentance.)
duas.phonetic: Subhanakal-lahumma wabihamdik, ashhadu an la ilaha illa ant, astaghfiruka wa-atoobu ilayk.

title_en: vocation for someone who says: May Allah forgive you
title_ar: الدعاء لمن قال غفر الله لك

duas.translation_en: (AAabdullah Ibn Sarjis  said: ‘I went to see the Prophet  and ate from his food and then said to him: (May Allah forgive you, O Messenger of Allah.) he  replied: (and you.))
duas.reference: (AAabdullah Ibn Sarjis  said: ‘I went to see the Prophet  and ate from his food and then said to him:(Ghafaral-lahu laka ya rasoolal-lah.) he  replied: (wa-lak))
duas.translation_fr: (AAabdullah Ibn Sarjis a dit : « Je suis allé voir le Prophète et j'ai mangé de sa nourriture, puis je lui ai dit : (Qu'Allah te pardonne, ô Messager d'Allah.) il a répondu : (et toi.))
duas.phonetic: AAabdullah Ibn Sarjis  said: ‘I went to see the Prophet  and ate from his food and then said to him:(Ghafaral-lahu laka ya rasoolal-lah.) he  replied: (wa-lak

title_fr: Invocation pour celui qui dit : qu'Allah te pardonne

title_en: Invocation for someone who does good to you

duas.arabic: ((جَزَاكَ اللَّهُ خَيْراً)).
duas.translation_en: (If someone does you a favour and you say: (May Allah reward you with goodness.) then you have indeed excelled in praising him.)
duas.reference: (If someone does you a favour and you say: (Jazakal-lahu khayran.) then you have indeed excelled in praising him.)
duas.translation_fr: (Si quelqu'un vous rend service et que vous dites : (Qu'Allah vous récompense par du bien.) alors vous avez vraiment excellé dans sa louange.)
duas.phonetic: If someone does you a favour and you say: (Jazakal-lahu khayran.) then you have indeed excelled in praising him.

title_fr: Invocation pour celui qui vous fait du bien

title_en: Invocation for Allah's protection from the False Messiah

duas.arabic: ((مَنْ حَفِظَ عَشْرَ آيَاتٍ مِنْ أَوَّلِ سُورَةِ الْكَهْفِ عُصِمَ مِنَ الدَّجَّالِ)) ، وَالْاسْتِعَاذَةُ بِاللَّهِ مِنْ فِتْنَتِهِ عَقِبَ التَّشَهُّدِ الْأَخِيرِ مِنْ كُلِّ صَلاَةٍ.
duas.translation_en: (Dajjal: among the great signs of the last hour and the greatest trials to befall mankind, which every Prophet has warned about.  Most of mankind will folow him. He will appear from Asbahan, Iran at the time when Muslims will conquer Constantinople.  He will be given special powers and will make the truth seem false and vice versa. He will claim to be righteous and then he will claim prophet-hood and finally, divinity. From his features is that he will be blind in his right eye which is a definite proof that contradicts his claim to be Allah as it is a sign of imperfection.  The word Kafir will be written between his eyes which every believer, literate or illiterate will recognise.)(Whoever memorises the first ten verses of soorat Al-Kahf will be protected from Dajjal.)(One should also seek refuge with Allah from the tribulations of the Dajjal after the last tashahhud in prayer.(Refer to supplications #55 & #56))
duas.translation_fr: (Dajjal : parmi les grands signes de la dernière heure et les plus grandes épreuves à venir pour l'humanité, contre lesquels tous les prophètes ont mis en garde. La plupart de l'humanité le suivra. Il apparaîtra d'Asbahan, en Iran, au moment où les musulmans conquériront Constantinople. Il recevra des pouvoirs spéciaux et fera paraître la vérité fausse et vice versa. Il prétendra être juste, puis il revendiquera le statut de prophète et enfin, la divinité. D'après ses traits, il sera aveugle de son œil droit, ce qui est une preuve définitive que contredit sa prétention d'être Allah car c'est un signe d'imperfection. Le mot Kafir sera écrit entre ses yeux et tout croyant, lettré ou analphabète, le reconnaîtra.) (Quiconque mémorise les dix premiers versets de la sourate Al-Kahf sera protégé du Dajjal.) (Il faut également chercher refuge auprès d'Allah contre les tribulations du Dajjal après le dernier tashahhud dans la prière. (Voir les supplications # 55 et #56))
duas.phonetic: ((man hafidha 'ashra aayaatin min aawali suwrahi alkahfi 'usima mina aldajaali)) waalasti'aadhahu biallahi min fitnatihi 'aqiba altashahudi alaakhiyri min kuli salaahin.

title_fr: Invocation pour la protection contre le faux Messie

title_en: Invocation for someone who tells you I love you for the sake of Allah
title_ar: الدعاء لمن قال إني أحبك في الله

duas.arabic: ((أَحَبَّكَ الَّذِي أَحْبَبْتَنِي لَهُ)).
duas.translation_en: (May He, for whom you have loved me, love you.)
duas.reference: (Ahabbakal-lathee ahbabtanee lah.)
duas.translation_fr: (Que Celui pour qui vous m'avez aimé vous aime.)
duas.phonetic: Ahabbakal-lathee ahbabtanee lah.

title_fr: Invocation pour celui qui dit : je t'aime pour Allah

title_en: Invocation for someone who offers you a share of his wealth

duas.arabic: ((بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فِي أَهْلِكَ وَمَالِكَ)).
duas.translation_en: (May Allah bless for you, your family and wealth.)
duas.reference: (Barakal-lahu laka fee ahlika wamalik.)
duas.translation_fr: (Qu'Allah vous bénisse, ainsi que votre famille et vos richesses.)
duas.phonetic: Barakal-lahu laka fee ahlika wamalik.

title_fr: Invocation pour celui qui vous offre de ses biens

title_en: Invocation (upon receipt of the loan) for someone who lends you money

duas.arabic: ((بارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فِي أَهْلِكَ وَمَالِكَ، إِنَّمَا جَزَاءُ السَّلَفِ الْحَمْدُ وَالأَدَاءُ)).
duas.translation_en: (May Allah bless for you, your family and wealth. Surely commendation and payment are the reward for a loan.)
duas.reference: (Barakal-lahu laka fee ahlika wamalik, innama jaza-os-salafil-hamdu wal-ada'.)
duas.translation_fr: (Qu'Allah vous bénisse, ainsi que votre famille et vos richesses. Les éloges et le paiement sont sûrement la récompense d'un prêt.)
duas.phonetic: Barakal-lahu laka fee ahlika wamalik, innama jaza-os-salafil-hamdu wal-ada'.

title_fr: Invocation pour celui qui vous prete de l'argent

title_en: Invocation for fear of Shirk

duas.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أُشْرِكَ بِكَ وَأَنَا أَعْلَمُ، وَأَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا لاَ أَعْلَمُ)).
duas.translation_en: (shirk: to associate others with Allah in those things which are specific to Him.  This can occur in (1) belief, e.g. to believe that other than Allah has the power to benefit or harm, (2) speech, e.g. to swear by other than Allah and (3) action, e.g. to bow or prostrate to other than Allah.)(O Allah, I take refuge in You lest I should commit shirk with You knowingly and I seek Your forgiveness for what I do unknowingly.)
duas.reference: (shirk: to associate others with Allah in those things which are specific to Him.  This can occur in (1) belief, e.g. to believe that other than Allah has the power to benefit or harm, (2) speech, e.g. to swear by other than Allah and (3) action, e.g. to bow or prostrate to other than Allah.)(Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika an oshrika bika wa-ana aAAlam, wa-astaghfiruka lima la aAAlam.)
duas.translation_fr: (shirk : associer les autres à Allah dans les choses qui Lui sont spécifiques. Cela peut se produire dans (1) la croyance, par exemple, croire qu'un autre qu'Allah a le pouvoir de bénéficier ou de nuire, (2) la parole, par exemple, jurer par un autre qu'Allah et (3) l'action, par exemple, s'incliner ou se prosterner devant un autre qu'Allah.) sans le savoir.)
duas.phonetic: shirk: to associate others with Allah in those things which are specific to Him.
